SECTION "7.1: Link Control Commands" 0x01
{
    COMMAND "Inquiry" 0x001
    {
        devs "*"=1 ("Inquiry_Length=0 indicates infinite inquiry length")
        PARAM "LAP"
            uint24
            min = 0x9E8B00
            max = 0x9E8B3F
            default = 0x9E8B33;
        PARAM "Inquiry_Length"
            uint8
            max = 0x30
            default = 0x08
            note "N * 1.28 sec, 0=infinite";
        PARAM "Num_Responses"
            uint8
            note "0=unlimited";
    }

    COMMAND "Inquiry_Cancel" 0x002
    {
        devs  "*"=1 ("Does not cancel an inquiry that resulted from Periodic_Inquiry_Mode"),
              "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Periodic_Inquiry_Mode" 0x003
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Max_Period_Length"
            uint16
            min = 0x03
            default = 0x2000
            note "N * 1.28 sec";
        PARAM "Min_Period_Length"
            uint16
            min = 0x02
            max = ("Max_Period_Length" - 1)
            default = 0x0010
            note "N * 1.28 sec";
        PARAM "LAP"
            uint24
            min = 0x9E8B00
            max = 0x9E8B3F
            default = 0x9E8B33;
        PARAM "Inquiry_Length"
            uint8
            min = 0x01
            max =   if (("Min_Period_Length" - 1) < 0x30) then  ("Min_Period_Length" - 1)
                    else                                        0x30
            default = 0x000F
            note "N * 1.28 sec";
        PARAM "Num_Responses"
            uint8
            default = 0x04
            note "0=unlimited";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Exit_Periodic_Inquiry_Mode" 0x004
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    DEFINE_ENUM "Page_Scan_Mode"
    {
        {0x00, "Mandatory Page Scan Mode"},
        {0x01, "Optional Page Scan Mode I"},
        {0x02, "Optional Page Scan Mode II"},
        {0x03, "Optional Page Scan Mode III"}
    }

    DEFINE_ENUM "R012"
    {
        {0x00, "R0"},
        {0x01, "R1"},
        {0x02, "R2"}
    }

    COMMAND "Create_Connection" 0x005
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Packet_Type"
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0002, "no 2-DH1"},
                {0x0004, "no 3-DH1"},
                {0x0008, "DM1"},
                {0x0010, "DH1"},
                {0x0100, "no 2-DH3"},
                {0x0200, "no 3-DH3"},
                {0x0400, "DM3"},
                {0x0800, "DH3"},
                {0x1000, "no 2-DH5"},
                {0x2000, "no 3-DH5"},
                {0x4000, "DM5"},
                {0x8000, "DH5"}
            }
            default = 0xCC18;
        PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode"
            uint8
            enum "R012"
            default = 1;
        PARAM "Page_Scan_Mode"
            uint8
            #enum "Page_Scan_Mode" - don't use the shared enum for backward compatibility
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Mandatory"},
                {0x01, "Optional Page Scan Mode I"},
                {0x02, "Optional Page Scan Mode II"},
                {0x03, "Optional Page Scan Mode III"}
            };
        PARAM "Clock_Offset_Valid"
            bool in uint16{15};
        PARAM "Clock_Offset"
            uint16{14:0}
            enabled_if ("Clock_Offset_Valid" = 1);
        PARAM "Allow_Role_Switch"
            bool8;
    }

    COMMAND "Disconnect" 0x006
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Reason"
            errorcode8
            default = 0x13;
    }

    COMMAND "Add_SCO_Connection" 0x007
    {
        devs    "*"=1 ( "Supported for Bluetooth 1.1 compatibility, but deprecated."
                        "Setup_Synchronous_Connection is preferred." ),
                "BCM2035"=1 (   "For SCO over transport, only a single connection is supported."
                                "For PCM, up to three SCO connections are supported." ),
                "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Packet_Type"
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0020, "HV1"},
                {0x0040, "HV2"},
                {0x0080, "HV3"}
            };
    }

    COMMAND "Create_Connection_Cancel" 0x008
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "Accept_Connection_Request" 0x009
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Role"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Master"},
                {0x01, "Slave"}
            }
            default = 1;
    }

    COMMAND "Reject_Connection_Request" 0x00A
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Reason"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Link_Key_Request_Reply" 0x00B
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Link_Key"
            uint8[16] little_endian;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "Link_Key_Request_Negative_Reply" 0x00C
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "PIN_Code_Request_Reply" 0x00D
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "PIN_Code_Length"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = ByteArrayValidLength("PIN_Code");
        PARAM "PIN_Code"
            uint8[16]
            valid_length = "PIN_Code_Length"
                min = 1;                                # Minimum array length in an array context
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "PIN_Code_Request_Negative_Reply" 0x00E
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "Change_Connection_Packet_Type" 0x00F
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Packet_Type"
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0002, "no 2-DH1"},
                {0x0004, "no 3-DH1"},
                {0x0008, "DM1"},
                {0x0010, "DH1"},
                {0x0100, "no 2-DH3"},
                {0x0200, "no 3-DH3"},
                {0x0400, "DM3"},
                {0x0800, "DH3"},
                {0x1000, "no 2-DH5"},
                {0x2000, "no 3-DH5"},
                {0x4000, "DM5"},
                {0x8000, "DH5"},
                {0x0020, "HV1"},
                {0x0040, "HV2"},
                {0x0080, "HV3"}
            }
            default = 0xCC18;
    }

    COMMAND "Authentication_Requested" 0x011
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Set_Connection_Encryption" 0x013
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Encryption_Enable"
            bool8;
    }

    COMMAND "Change_Connection_Link_Key" 0x015
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Master_Link_Key" 0x0017
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Key_Flag"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Use Semi-permanent Link Keys"},
                {0x01, "Use Temporary Link Key"}
            };
    }

    COMMAND "Remote_Name_Request" 0x019
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode"
            uint8
            enum "R012"
            default = 1;
        PARAM "Page_Scan_Mode"
            uint8
            #enum "Page_Scan_Mode" - don't use the shared enum for backward compatibility
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Mandatory"},
                {0x01, "Optional Page Scan Mode I"},
                {0x02, "Optional Page Scan Mode II"},
                {0x03, "Optional Page Scan Mode III"}
            };
        PARAM "Clock_Offset_Valid"
            bool in uint16{15};
        PARAM "Clock_Offset"
            uint16{14:0}
            enabled_if ("Clock_Offset_Valid" = 1);
    }

    COMMAND "Remote_Name_Request_Cancel" 0x01A
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Remote_Supported_Features" 0x01B
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Remote_Extended_Features" 0x01C
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Page_Number"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Remote_Version_Information" 0x01D
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Clock_Offset" 0x01F
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_LMP_Handle" 0x020
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "LMP_Handle"
            uint8;
        CC_PARAM "Reserved"
            uint32;
    }

    COMMAND "Setup_Synchronous_Connection" 0x028
    {
        devs    "*"=1 ("Can support up to 3 links of SCO or eSCO or a acombination of SCO+eSCO"),
                "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Transmit_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Receive_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Max_Latency"
            uint16
            note "interval and retransmission window, milliseconds, 0xFFFF=don't care"
            min = 4;
        PARAM "Input_Coding"
            uint16{15:8}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Linear"},
                {0x1, "u-law"},
                {0x2, "A-law"}
            };
        PARAM "Input_Data_Format"
            uint16{7:6}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "1's complement"},
                {0x1, "2's complement"},
                {0x2, "Sign-magnitude"},
                {0x3, "Unsigned"}
            }
            default = 1;
        PARAM "Sample_Size"
            uint16{5}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "8-bit"},
                {0x1, "16-bit"}
            }
            enabled_if ("Input_Coding" = 0);
        PARAM "Linear_PCM_Bit_Pos"
            uint16{4:2}
            enabled_if ("Input_Coding" = 0);
        PARAM "Air_Coding_Format"
            uint16{1:0}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "CVSD"},
                {0x1, "u-law"},
                {0x2, "A-law"},
                {0x3, "Transparent data"}
            };
        PARAM "Retransmission_Effort"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No retransmissions"},
                {0x1, "At least one retransmission, optimize for power consumption"},
                {0x2, "At least one retransmission, optimize for link quality"},
                {0xFF, "Don't care"}
            };
        PARAM "eSCO_Packet_Type"
            # Don't use "Packet_Type" since that has a different value space than other instances
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0001, "HV1"},
                {0x0002, "HV2"},
                {0x0004, "HV3"},
                {0x0008, "EV3"},
                {0x0010, "EV4"},
                {0x0020, "EV5"},
                {0x0040, "no 2-EV3"},
                {0x0080, "no 3-EV3"},
                {0x0100, "no 2-EV5"},
                {0x0200, "no 3-EV5"}
            }
            default = 0x003F;
    }

    COMMAND "Accept_Synchronous_Connection_Request" 0x029
    {
        devs    "*"=1 ("Can support up to 3 links of SCO or eSCO or a acombination of SCO+eSCO"),
                "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Transmit_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Receive_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Max_Latency"
            uint16
            min = 4
            note "interval and retransmission window, milliseconds, 0xFFFF=don't care";
        PARAM "Input_Coding"
            uint16{15:8}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Linear"},
                {0x1, "u-law"},
                {0x2, "A-law"}
            };
        PARAM "Input_Data_Format"
            uint16{7:6}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "1's complement"},
                {0x1, "2's complement"},
                {0x2, "Sign-magnitude"},
                {0x3, "Unsigned"}
            }
            default = 1;
        PARAM "Sample_Size"
            uint16{5}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "8-bit"},
                {0x1, "16-bit"}
            }
            enabled_if ("Input_Coding" = 0);
        PARAM "Linear_PCM_Bit_Pos"
            uint16{4:2}
            enabled_if ("Input_Coding" = 0);
        PARAM "Air_Coding_Format"
            uint16{1:0}
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "CVSD"},
                {0x1, "u-law"},
                {0x2, "A-law"},
                {0x3, "Transparent data"}
            };
        PARAM "Retransmission_Effort"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No retransmissions"},
                {0x1, "At least one retransmission, optimize for power consumption"},
                {0x2, "At least one retransmission, optimize for link quality"},
                {0xFF, "Don't care"}
            };
        PARAM "eSCO_Packet_Type"
            # Don't use "Packet_Type" since that has a different value space than other instances
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0001, "HV1"},
                {0x0002, "HV2"},
                {0x0004, "HV3"},
                {0x0008, "EV3"},
                {0x0010, "EV4"},
                {0x0020, "EV5"},
                {0x0040, "no 2-EV3"},
                {0x0080, "no 3-EV3"},
                {0x0100, "no 2-EV5"},
                {0x0200, "no 3-EV5"}
            }
            default = 0x003F;
    }

    COMMAND "Reject_Synchronous_Connection_Request" 0x02A
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Reason"
            errorcode8;
    }

    DEFINE_ENUM "Authentication_Requirements"
    {
        {0x0, "MITM Protection Not Required - Not Bonding Single Profile"},
        {0x1, "MITM Protection Required - Not Bonding Single Profile"},
        {0x2, "MITM Protection Not Required - All Profiles"},
        {0x3, "MITM Protection Required - All Profiles"},
        {0x4, "MITM Protection Not Required - General Bonding Single Profile"},
        {0x5, "MITM Protection Required - General Bonding Single Profile"}
    }

    COMMAND "IO_Capability_Request_Reply" 0x02B
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "IO_Capability"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Display only"},
                {0x1, "Display yes no"},
                {0x2, "Keyboard only"},
                {0x3, "No input no output"}
            };
        PARAM "OOB_Data_Present"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "OOB authentication data not present"},
                {0x1, "P-192 OOB authentication data from remote device present"},
                {0x2, "P-256 OOB authentication data from remote device present"},
                {0x3, "P-192 and P-256 OOB authentication data from remote device present"}
            };
        PARAM "Authentication_Requirements"
            uint8
            enum "Authentication_Requirements";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
    }

    COMMAND "User_Confirmation_Request_Reply" 0x02C

    COMMAND "Enhanced_Setup_Synchronous_Connection" 0x03D
    {
        devs    "*"=1 ("Can support up to 3 links of SCO or eSCO or a acombination of SCO+eSCO"),
                "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Transmit_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Receive_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Transmit_Coding_Format"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "u-law"},
                {0x1, "A-law"},
                {0x2, "CVSD"},
                {0x3, "Transparent"},
                {0x4, "Linear PCM"},
                {0x5, "mSBC"},
                {0xFF, "Vendor Specific"}
            }
            default = 3;
        PARAM "Transmit_Coding_Format-Vendor_Specific"
            uint8[4];
            #uint64
            #default = 0
            #note "Invalid if Transmit Coding Format is not Vendor Specific";
        PARAM "Receive_Coding_Format"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "u-law"},
                {0x1, "A-law"},
                {0x2, "CVSD"},
                {0x3, "Transparent"},
                {0x4, "Linear PCM"},
                {0x5, "mSBC"},
                {0xFF, "Vendor Specific"}
            }
            default = 3;
        PARAM "Receive_Coding_Format-Vendor_Specific"
            uint8[4];
            #uint64
            #default = 0
            #note "Invalid if ReceiveCoding Format is not Vendor Specific";
        PARAM "Transmit_Codec_Frame_Size"
            uint16
            default = 60;
        PARAM "Receive_Codec_Frame_Size"
            uint16
            default = 60;
        PARAM "Input_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Output_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            default = 8000
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Input_Coding_Format"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "u-law"},
                {0x1, "A-law"},
                {0x2, "CVSD"},
                {0x3, "Transparent"},
                {0x4, "Linear PCM"},
                {0x5, "mSBC"},
                {0xFF, "Vendor Specific"}
            }
            default = 3;
        PARAM "Input_Coding_Format-Vendor_Specific"
            uint8[4];
            #uint64
            #default = 0
            #note "Invalid if Input Coding Format is not Vendor Specific";
        PARAM "Output_Coding_Format"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "u-law"},
                {0x1, "A-law"},
                {0x2, "CVSD"},
                {0x3, "Transparent"},
                {0x4, "Linear PCM"},
                {0x5, "mSBC"},
                {0xFF, "Vendor Specific"}
            }
            default = 3;
        PARAM "Output_Coding_Format-Vendor_Specific"
            uint8[4];
            #uint64
            #default = 0
            #note "Invalid if Output Coding Format is not Vendor Specific";
        PARAM "Input_Coded_Data_Size"
            uint16
            default = 16
            note "Size, in bits, of the sample or framed data";
        PARAM "Output_Coded_Data_Size"
            uint16
            default = 16
            note "Size, in bits, of the sample or framed data";
        PARAM "Input_PCM_Data_Format"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Not Applicable"},
                {0x1, "1's complement"},
                {0x2, "2's complement"},
                {0x3, "Sign-magnitude"},
                {0x4, "Unsigned"}
            }
            default = 2;
        PARAM "Output_PCM_Data_Format"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Not Applicable"},
                {0x1, "1's complement"},
                {0x2, "2's complement"},
                {0x3, "Sign-magnitude"},
                {0x4, "Unsigned"}
            }
            default = 2;
        PARAM "Input_PCM_Sample_Payload_MSB_Position"
            uint8
            default = 0;
            #note "The number of  bit positions within an audio sample that the MSB of the sample is away from starting at the MSB of the data";
        PARAM "Output_PCM_Sample_Payload_MSB_Position"
            uint8
            default = 0;
            #note "The number of  bit positions within an audio sample that the MSB of the sample is away from starting at the MSB of the data";
        PARAM "Input_Data_Path"
            uint8
            note"0x00:HCI; 0x01-0xFE:PCM_Logical_Channel_Num; 0xFF:Audio test mode"
            default = 0;
        PARAM "Output_Data_Path"
            uint8
            note"0x00:HCI; 0x01-0xFE:PCM_Logical_Channel_Num; 0xFF:Audio test mode"
            default = 0;
        PARAM "Input_Transport_Unit_Size"
            uint8
            #note"The number of bits in each unit of data received from the Host over the audio data transport. 0x0: not applicable"
            note"0x0: not applicable"
            default = 0;
        PARAM "Output_Transport_Unit_Size"
            uint8
            #note"The number of bits in each unit of data sent to the Host over the audio data transport. 0x0: not applicable"
            note"0x0: not applicable"
            default = 0;
        PARAM "Max_Latency"
            uint16
            note "interval and retransmission window, milliseconds, 0xFFFF=don't care"
            min = 4
            default = 10;
        PARAM "Sco/eSco Packet_Type"
            # Don't use "Packet_Type" since that has a different value space than other instances
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0001, "HV1"},
                {0x0002, "HV2"},
                {0x0004, "HV3"},
                {0x0008, "EV3"},
                {0x0010, "EV4"},
                {0x0020, "EV5"},
                {0x0040, "no 2-EV3"},
                {0x0080, "no 3-EV3"},
                {0x0100, "no 2-EV5"},
                {0x0200, "no 3-EV5"}
            }
            default = 0x0038;
        PARAM "Retransmission_Effort"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No retransmissions"},
                {0x1, "At least one retransmission, optimize for power consumption"},
                {0x2, "At least one retransmission, optimize for link quality"},
                {0xFF, "Don't care"}
            }
            default = 0x00;
    }

SECTION "7.2: Link Policy Commands" 0x02
{
    COMMAND "Hold_Mode" 0x001
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;

            uint16
            min = 0x0002
            max = 0xFFFE
            default = 0x0080
            note "2*N slots";
        PARAM "Hold_Mode_Min_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x0002
            max = 0xFF00
            default = 0x0080
            note "2*N slots";
    }

    COMMAND "Sniff_Mode" 0x003
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Sniff_Max_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x0002
            max = 0xFFFE
            default = 0x0080
            note "slots";
        PARAM "Sniff_Min_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x0002
            max = "Sniff_Max_Interval"
            default = 0x0080
            note "slots";
        PARAM "Sniff_Attempt"
            uint16
            min = 0x0001
            max = 0x7FFF
            note "2*N-1 baseband slots";
        PARAM "Sniff_Timeout"
            uint16
            max = 0x7FFF
            note "2*N-1 baseband slots";
    }

    COMMAND "Exit_Sniff_Mode" 0x004
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Park_Mode" 0x005
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Beacon_Max_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x000E
            max = 0xFFFE
            default = 0x0100

        PARAM "Beacon_Min_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x000E
            max = 0xFFFE
            default = 0x0100
            note "2*N slots";
    }

    COMMAND "Exit_Park_Mode" 0x006
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "QoS_Setup" 0x007
    {

        devs    "*"=1 ( "Firmware will try to ensure the throughput is guaranteed by deducing a"
                        "correlated Tpoll value from the Token_Rate parameter together with the"
                        "packet type that is enabled at the time this command is issued. Once a"
                        "desirable token rate is deduced, the firmware will send"
                        "LMP_quality_of_service_req to the remote device. If the remote device"
                        "accepts the Tpoll, the firmware will send a \"QoS Setup Complete\" event"
                        "to the host. When the firmware receives LMP_quality_of_service_req, it"
                        "will send accept as long as the Tpoll is larger than 2 slots in single"
                        "connection scenario, or Tpoll is larger than 4 slots in a multiple"
                        "connection scenario."),
                "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "RESERVED"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0
            enabled_if (0 = 1);     # Never
        PARAM "Service_Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "No Traffic"},
                {0x01, "Best Effort"},
                {0x02, "Guaranteed"}
            };
        PARAM "Token_Rate"
            uint32
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Peak_Bandwidth"
            uint32
            note "bytes per second";
        PARAM "Latency"
            uint32
            note "microseconds";
        PARAM "Delay_Variation"
            uint32
            note "microseconds";
    }

    COMMAND "Role_Discovery" 0x009
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;

            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Master"},
                {0x01, "Slave"}
            };

    COMMAND "Switch_Role" 0x00B
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Role"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Master"},
                {0x01, "Slave"}
            };
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Link_Policy_Settings" 0x00C
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0

SECTION "7.3: Host Controller & Baseband Commands" 0x03
{
    COMMAND "Set_Event_Mask" 0x001
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Event_Mask"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "Inquiry Complete event"},
                {0x00000002, "Inquiry Result event"},
                {0x00000004, "Connection Complete event"},
                {0x00000008, "Connection Request event"},
                {0x00000010, "Disconnection Complete event"},
                {0x00000020, "Authentication Complete event"},
                {0x00000040, "Remote Name Request Complete event"},
                {0x00000080, "Encryption Change event"},
                {0x00000100, "Change Connection Link Key Complete event"},
                {0x00000200, "Master Link Key Complete event"},
                {0x00000400, "Read Remote Supported Features Complete event"},
                {0x00000800, "Read Remote Version Information Complete event"},
                {0x00001000, "QoS Setup Complete event"},
                #{0x00002000, "Command Complete event"}, (deprecated)
                #{0x00004000, "Command Status event"}, (deprecated)
                {0x00008000, "Hardware Error event"},
                {0x00010000, "Flush Occurred event"},
                {0x00020000, "Role Change event"},
                #{0x00040000, "Number Of Completed Packets event"}, (deprecated)
                {0x00080000, "Mode Change event"},
                {0x00100000, "Return Link Keys event"},
                {0x00200000, "PIN Code Request event"},
                {0x00400000, "Link Key Request event"},
                {0x00800000, "Link Key Notification event"},
                {0x01000000, "Loopback Command event"},
                {0x02000000, "Data Buffer Overflow event"},
                {0x04000000, "Max Slots Change event"},
                {0x08000000, "Read Clock Offset Complete event"},
                {0x10000000, "Connection Packet Type Changed event"},
                {0x20000000, "QoS Violation event"},
                {0x40000000, "Page Scan Mode Change event"},
                {0x80000000, "Page Scan Repetition Mode Change event"}
            }
            default = 0xFFFFFFFF;
        PARAM "Event_Mask (63:32)"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "Flow Specification Complete Event"},
                {0x00000002, "Inquiry result With RSSI event"},
                {0x00000004, "Read Remote Extended Features Complete event"},
                {0x00000800, "Synchronous Connection Complete event"},
                {0x00001000, "Synchronous Connection Changed event"},
                {0x00002000, "Sniff Subrating event"},
                {0x00004000, "Extended Inquiry Result event"},
                {0x00008000, "Encryption Key Refresh Complete event"},
                {0x00010000, "IO Capability Request event"},
                {0x00020000, "IO Capability Response event"},
                {0x00040000, "User Confirmation Request event"},
                {0x00080000, "User Passkey Request event"},
                {0x00100000, "Remote OOB Data Request event"},
                {0x00200000, "Simple Pairing Complete event"},
                {0x00800000, "Link Supervision Timeout Changed event"},
                {0x01000000, "Enhanced Flush event"},
                {0x04000000, "User Passkey Notification event"},
                {0x08000000, "Keypress Notification event"},
                {0x10000000, "Remote Host Supported Features Notification event"},
                {0x20000000, "LE Meta-event"}
            }
            default = 0x20003FFF;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Reset" 0x003
    {
        devs "*"=1
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Set_Event_Filter" 0x005
    {
        devs    "*"=1,
                "BCM2035"=1 ("Supports up to six filters."),
                "BCM2045"=1 ("No BD_ADDR filter condition is supported."),
                "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Filter_Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Clear All Filters"},
                {0x01, "Inquiry Result"},
                {0x02, "Connection Setup"}
            };
        PARAM "Inquiry_Result_Filter_Condition_Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "A new device responded to the Inquiry process"},
                {0x01, "A device with a specific Class of Device responded to the Inquiry process"},
                {0x02, "A device with a specific BD_ADDR responded to the Inquiry process"}
            }
            present_if ("Filter_Type" = 1);
        PARAM "Connection_Setup_Filter_Condition_Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Allow Connections from all devices"},
                {0x01, "Allow Connections from a device with a specific Class of Device"},
                {0x02, "Allow Connections from a device with a specific BD_ADDR"}
            }
            present_if ("Filter_Type" = 2);
        PARAM "Class_of_Device"
            uint24
            present_if  ((("Filter_Type" = 1) and ("Inquiry_Result_Filter_Condition_Type" = 1))
                        or
                        (("Filter_Type" = 2) and ("Connection_Setup_Filter_Condition_Type" = 1)));
        PARAM "Class_of_Device_Mask"
            uint24
            present_if  ((("Filter_Type" = 1) and ("Inquiry_Result_Filter_Condition_Type" = 1))
                        or
                        (("Filter_Type" = 2) and ("Connection_Setup_Filter_Condition_Type" = 1)));
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            present_if  ((("Filter_Type" = 1) and ("Inquiry_Result_Filter_Condition_Type" = 2))
                        or
                        (("Filter_Type" = 2) and ("Connection_Setup_Filter_Condition_Type" = 2)));
        PARAM "Auto_Accept_Flag"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "Do NOT Auto accept the connection"},
                {0x02, "Do Auto accept the connection with role switch disabled"},
                {0x03, "Do Auto accept the connection with role switch enabled"}
            }
            present_if ("Filter_Type" = 2);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Flush" 0x008
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"

            connhandle16;

    COMMAND "Read_Stored_Link_Key" 0x00D
    {
        devs    "*"=0,
                "BCM2035"=1 (   "Only on with FLASH or EEPROM enabled systems. Must be enabled via"
                                "configuration record setting.  Disabled by default." ),
                "BCM2045"=1 (   "Not supported by core firmware, but support can be provided by a"
                                "simple customer-specific application if nonvolatile memory is"
                                "available to store the Link_Key database.")
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Read_All_Flag"
            bool8;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;

            uint16;

    COMMAND "Write_Stored_Link_Key" 0x011
    {
        devs    "*"=0,
                "BCM2035"=1 (   "Only on with FLASH or EEPROM enabled systems. Must be enabled via"
                                "configuration record setting.  Disabled by default." ),
                "BCM2045"=1 (   "Not supported by core firmware, but support can be provided by a"
                                "simple customer-specific application if nonvolatile memory is"
                                "available to store the Link_Key database." )
        PARAM "Num_Keys_To_Write"
            uint8
            min = 1
            max = 11;

        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[0]"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Link_Key[0]"
            uint8[16] little_endian;

        # - Entry[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[1]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 1);
        PARAM "Link_Key[1]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 1);

        # - Entry[2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[2]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 2);
        PARAM "Link_Key[2]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 2);

        # - Entry[3] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[3]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 3);
        PARAM "Link_Key[3]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 3);

        # - Entry[4] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[4]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 4);
        PARAM "Link_Key[4]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 4);

        # - Entry[5] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[5]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 5);
        PARAM "Link_Key[5]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 5);

        # - Entry[6] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[6]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 6);
        PARAM "Link_Key[6]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 6);

        # - Entry[7] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[7]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 7);
        PARAM "Link_Key[7]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 7);

        # - Entry[8] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[8]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 8);
        PARAM "Link_Key[8]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 8);

        # - Entry[9] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[9]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 9);
        PARAM "Link_Key[9]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 9);

        # - Entry[10] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "BD_ADDR[10]"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 10);
        PARAM "Link_Key[10]"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            present_if ("Num_Keys_To_Write" > 10);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Num_Keys_Written"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Link_Supervision_Timeout" 0x036
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "Link_Supervision_Timeout"
            uint16
            note "baseband slots, 0=infinite";
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Link_Supervision_Timeout" 0x037
    {
        devs    "*"=1,
                "BCM2045"=1 ("Only master role will take effect"),
                "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Link_Supervision_Timeout"
            uint16
            note "baseband slots, 0=infinite";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Number_Of_Supported_IAC" 0x038
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Num_Support_IAC"
            uint8;
    }

                {0x00000008, "Physical Link Loss Early Warning Event"},
                {0x00000010, "Physical Link Recovery Event"},
                {0x00000020, "Logical Link Complete Event"},
                {0x00000040, "Disconnection Logical Link Complete Event"},
                {0x00000080, "Flow Spec Modify Complete Event"},
                {0x00000100, "Number of Completed Data Blocks Event"},
                {0x00000200, "AMP Start Test Event"},
                {0x00000400, "AMP Test End Event"},
                {0x00000800, "AMP Receiver Report Event"},
                {0x00001000, "Short Range Mode Change Complete Event"},
                {0x00002000, "AMP Status Change Event"},
                {0x00008000, "Synchronization Train Complete Event"},
                {0x00010000, "Synchronization Train Received Event"},
                {0x00020000, "Connectionless Slave Broadcast Receive Event"},
                {0x00040000, "Connectionless Slave Broadcast Timeout Event"},
                {0x00080000, "Truncated Page Complete Event"},
                {0x00100000, "Slave Page Response Timeout Event"},
                {0x00200000, "Connectionless Slave Broadcast Channel Map Change Event"},
                {0x00400000, "Inquiry Response Notification Event"},
                {0x00800000, "Authenticated Payload Timeout Expired Event"},
                {0x01000000, "SAM Status Change Event"}
            }
            default = 0x00000000;
            PARAM "Event_Mask (63:32)"
               uint32
               default = 0x00000000;
                CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Set_Reserved_LT_ADDR" 0x74
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            min = 1
            max = 7;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Delete_Reserved_LT_ADDR" 0x75
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            min = 1
            max = 7;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Connectionless_Broadcast_Data" 0x76
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            min = 1
            max = 7;
        PARAM "Fragment"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0, "Continuation Fragment"},
                {1, "Starting Fragment"},
                {2, "Ending Fragment"},
                {3, "Single fragment (no fragmentation)"}
            }
            default = 3;
        PARAM "Data_Length"
            uint8
            max = 252
            default = 10;
        PARAM "Data"
            uint8[252];
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Synchronization_Train_Parameters" 0x77
    {
        devs "*"=1
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Sync_Train_Ref_Interval"
            uint16;
        CC_PARAM "Timeout"
            uint32;
        CC_PARAM "Service_Data"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Synchronization_Train_Parameters" 0x78
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Interval_Min"
            uint16
            default = 128;
        PARAM "Interval_Max"
            uint16
            default = 128;
        PARAM "Timeout"
            uint32
            default = 0x2EE00;
        PARAM "Service_Data"
            uint8;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Sync_Train_Ref_Interval"
            uint16;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Secure_Connections_Host_Support" 0x079
    {
        devs "*"=1
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Secure_Connections_Host_Support"
            uint8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Secure_Connections_Host_Support" 0x07A
    {
        devs "*"=1

            {
                {0, "Secure_Connections_Host_Support disabled"},
                {1, "Secure_Connections_Host_Support enabled"}

    }

    COMMAND "Read_Authenticated_Payload_Timeout" 0x07B
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        CC_PARAM "Authenticated_Payload_Timeout"
            uint16
            min = 0x0001
            max = 0xFFFF;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Authenticated_Payload_Timeout" 0x07C
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Authenticated_Payload_Timeout"
            uint16
            min = 0x0001
            max = 0xFFFF
            default = 0x0BB8
            note "Maximum amount of time specified between packets authenticated by a MIC. Time = N * 10ms";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
    }


    COMMAND "Read_Local_OOB_Extended_Data" 0x07D
    {
        devs "*"=1
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "C_192"
            uint8[16];
        CC_PARAM "R_192"
            uint8[16];
        CC_PARAM "C_256"
           uint8[16];
        CC_PARAM "R_256"

    COMMAND "Read_Extended_Page_Timeout" 0x07E
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Extended_Page_Timeout"

    COMMAND "Read_Extended_Inquiry_Length" 0x080
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0

    COMMAND "Write_Extended_Inquiry_Length" 0x081
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Extended_Inquiry_Length"
            uint16
            note "slots";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Configure_Data_Path" 0x083
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Direction"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Input (from ADC)"},
                {0x01, "Output (to DAC)"}
            }
            default = 0x0;
        PARAM "Data_Path_ID"
            uint8
            default = 0x00;
        PARAM "Config_Length"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0, "Default config"},
                {1, "Sample Width"},
                {2, "Mix Level"}
            }
            default = 0;
        PARAM "Sample_Width_Bits"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {16, "16"},
                {24, "24"},
                {32, "32"}
            }
            default = 16
            present_if ("Config_Length" > 0);
        PARAM "Mix_Level"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0,"0dB"},
                {1,"-3.3dB"},
                {2,"-6.6dB"},
                {3,"-10dB"},
                {4,"-13.3dB"},
                {5,"-16.6dB"},
                {6,"-20dB"},
                {7,"-23.3dB"},
                {8,"-26.6dB"},
                {9,"-30dB"},
                {10,"-33.3dB"},
                {11,"-36.6dB"},
                {12,"-40dB"},
                {13,"-43.3dB"},
                {14,"-46.6dB"},
                {15,"Mute"}
            }
            default = 15
            present_if ("Config_Length" = 2);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }
}

SECTION "7.4: Informational Parameters" 0x04
{
    COMMAND "Read_Local_Version_Information" 0x001
    {
        devs    "*"=1,
                "BCM2045"=1 (   "LMP_Subversion bits:<br>"
                                "15:13 - firmware major revision<br>"
                                "12:8 - firmware minor revision<br>"
                                "7:0 - firmware build number<br>"
                                "<br>"
                                "HCI_Revision bits:<br>"
                                "15:10 - hardware revision number<br>"
                                "11:0 - config record revision" )

            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "HCI_Version"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Bluetooth HCI Specification 1.0B"},

    COMMAND "Read_Local_Supported_Features" 0x003
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "LMP_Features"
            uint32
            # See Bluetooth spec C:5.1.1, Bluetooth 1.2 spec Vol 2, C:3.3
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "3-slot packets"},
                {0x00000002, "5-slot packets"},
                {0x00000004, "Encryption"},
                {0x00000008, "Slot offset"},
                {0x00000010, "Timing accuracy"},
                {0x00000020, "Switch"},
                {0x00000040, "Hold mode"},
                {0x00000080, "Sniff mode"},
                {0x00000100, "Park mode"},
                {0x00000200, "Power control requests"},
                {0x00000400, "Channel quality driven data rate"},
                {0x00000800, "SCO link"},
                {0x00001000, "HV2 packets"},
                {0x00002000, "HV3 packets"},
                {0x00004000, "u-law log"},
                {0x00008000, "A-law log"},
                {0x00010000, "CVSD"},
                {0x00020000, "Paging scheme"},
                {0x00040000, "Power control"},
                {0x00080000, "3 transparent SCO data"},
                {0x00100000, "Flow control lag (bit0)"},
                {0x00200000, "Flow control lag (bit1)"},
                {0x00400000, "Flow control lag (bit2)"},
                {0x00800000, "Broadcast encryption"},
                {0x01000000, "Scatter mode"},
                {0x02000000, "Enhanced data rate ACL 2 Mbps mode"},
                {0x04000000, "Enhanced data rate ACL 3 Mbps mode"},
                {0x08000000, "Enhanced inquiry scan"},
                {0x10000000, "Interlaced inquiry scan"},
                {0x20000000, "Interlaced page scan"},
                {0x40000000, "RSSI with inquiry results"},
                {0x80000000, "Extended SCO link (EV3 packets)"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "LMP_Features (63:32)"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "EV4 packets"},
                {0x00000002, "EV5 packets"},
                {0x00000004, "Absence masks"},
                {0x00000008, "AFH capable slave"},
                {0x00000010, "AFH classification slave"},
                {0x00000020, "BR/EDR not supported"},
                {0x00000040, "LE supported (Controller)"},
                {0x00000080, "3-slot enhanced data rate ACL packets"},
                {0x00000100, "5-slot enhanced data rate ACL packets"},  # byte 5, bit 0
                {0x00000200, "Sniff subrating"},                        # byte 5, bit 1, per 7/28/05 spec
                {0x00000400, "Pause Encryption"},
                {0x00000800, "AFH capable master"},                     # byte 5, bit 3
                {0x00001000, "AFH classification master"},
                {0x00002000, "Enhanced data rate eSCO 2 Mbps mode"},
                {0x00004000, "Enhanced data rate eSCO 3 Mbps mode"},
                {0x00008000, "3-slot enhanced data rate eSCO packets"},
                {0x00010000, "Extended inquiry response"},
                {0x00020000, "Simultaneous LE and BR/EDR to the same device capable (Controller)"},
                {0x00080000, "Secure Simple Pairing"},
                {0x00100000, "Encapsulated PDU"},
                {0x00200000, "Erroneous Data Reporting"},
                {0x00400000, "Non-flushable Packet Boundary Flag"},
                {0x01000000, "Link Supervision Timeout Changed Event"},
                {0x02000000, "Inquiry Response Tx Power Level"},
                {0x04000000, "Enhanced Power Control"},
                {0x80000000, "Extended features"}
            };
    }

                {3,"LE_BIS"}
            }
            default = 2;

            }
            default = 6;
        PARAM "Company_ID"
            uint16
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0
            enabled_if (0 = 1);     # Never
        PARAM "Vendor_Defined_Codec_ID"
            uint16
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0
            enabled_if (0 = 1);     # Never
        PARAM "Transport"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {2,"LE_CIS"},
                {3,"LE_BIS"}
            }
            default = 2;
        PARAM "Direction"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0, "Input (from ADC)"},
                {1, "Output (to DAC)"}
            }
            default = 0;
        PARAM "Codec_Configuration_Length"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {11, "Sample Frequency, Frame Duration & Octets per Frame"},
                {17, "Sample Frequency, Frame Duration, Channel Allocation & Octets per Frame"},
                {20, "All Codec Configurations"}
            }
            default = 11;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Length_1"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 3;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Type_1"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 1;
        PARAM "Sample_Frequency"
            uint16
            enum
            {
                {0x1,"8000"},
                {0x2,"16000"},
                {0x4,"24000"},
                {0x8,"32000"},
                {0x10,"44100"},
                {0x20,"48000"}
            }
            default = 1;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Length_2"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 2;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Type_2"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 2;
        PARAM "Frame_Duration"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x1,"7.5ms"},
                {0x2,"10ms"}
            }
            default = 2;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Length_3"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 5
            present_if ("Codec_Configuration_Length" > 16);
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Type_3"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 3
            present_if ("Codec_Configuration_Length" > 16);
        PARAM "Channel_Allocation"
            uint32
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Mono"},
                {0x1, "Front Left"},
                {0x2, "Front Right"},
                {0x4, "Front Center"},
                {0x8, "Low Frequency Effects 1"},
                {0x10, "Back Left"},
                {0x20, "Back Right"},
                {0x40, "Front Left of Center"},
                {0x80, "Front Right of Center"},
                {0x100, "Back Center"},
                {0x200, "Low Frequency Effects 2"},
                {0x400, "Side Left"},
                {0x800, "Side Right"},
                {0x1000, "Top Front Left"},
                {0x2000, "Top Front Right"},
                {0x4000, "Top Front Center"},
                {0x8000, "Top Center"},
                {0x10000, "Top Back Left"},
                {0x20000, "Top Back Right"},
                {0x40000, "Top Side Left"},
                {0x80000, "Top Side Right"},
                {0x100000, "Top Back Center"},
                {0x200000, "Bottom Front Center"},
                {0x400000, "Bottom Front Left"},
                {0x800000, "Bottom Front Right"},
                {0x1000000, "Front Left Wide"},
                {0x2000000, "Front Right Wide"},
                {0x4000000, "Left Surround"},
                {0x8000000, "Right Surround"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if ("Codec_Configuration_Length" > 16);
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Length_4"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 3;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Type_4"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 4;
        PARAM "Octets_Per_Frame"
            uint16
            default = 20;
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Length_5"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 2
            present_if ("Codec_Configuration_Length" = 20);
        PARAM "Codec_Config_Type_5"
            uint8
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 5
            present_if ("Codec_Configuration_Length" = 20);
        PARAM "LC3_Blocks_Per_SDU"
            uint8
            default = 1
            present_if ("Codec_Configuration_Length" = 20);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "MinControllerDelay"
            uint24;
        CC_PARAM "MaxControllerDelay"
            uint24;
    }
}

    COMMAND "Read_BD_Clock" 0x007

                {0, "Local clock"},
                {1, "Piconet clock"}

    }

        COMMAND "Read_Encryption_Key_Size" 0x008
        {
                PARAM "Connection_Handle"
                        connhandle16;

                CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
                        connhandle16;

        }

        COMMAND "Get_MWS_Transport_Layer_Configuration" 0x00C
        {
                CC_PARAM "Status"
                        errorcode8;
                CC_PARAM "Num_Transports"
                        uint8;
                CC_PARAM "Transport_Layer[0]"
                        uint8
            present_if ("Num_Transports" > 0)
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Transport disabled"},
                {0x01, "1-wire interface"},
                {0x02, "2-wire interface"}
            };
                CC_PARAM "Num_Baud_Rates[0]"
                        uint8
            present_if ("Num_Transports" > 0);
                CC_PARAM "To_MWS_Baud_Rate[0][0]"
                        uint32
            present_if (("Num_Transports" > 0) and ("Num_Baud_Rates[0]" > 0));
                CC_PARAM "From_MWS_Baud_Rate[0][0]"
                        uint32
            present_if (("Num_Transports" > 0) and ("Num_Baud_Rates[0]" > 0));
        }

    COMMAND "Set_Triggered_Clock_Capture" 0x0D
    {
        devs "*"=1
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16;
        PARAM "Enable"
          bool8
          default = 1;
        PARAM "Which_Clock"
          uint8
          enum
        {
            {0x00, "Native clock"},
            {0x01, "Piconet clock"}
        };
        PARAM "LPO_Allowed"
                bool8
                default = 1;
        PARAM "Number_Of_Clock_Captures_To_Filter"
          uint8
          default = 16;
            CC_PARAM "Status"
                errorcode8;
    }
}

SECTION "7.8: LE Controller Commands" 0x08
{
    #########################################################
    # 1.    LE Controller Setup and Configuration
    COMMAND "LE_Set_Event_Mask" 0x001
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "LE_Event_Mask"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0000000000000001, "LE Connection Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000000002, "LE Advertising Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000000004, "LE Connection Update Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000000008, "LE Read Remote Features Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000000010, "LE Long Term Key Request Event"},
                {0x0000000000000020, "LE Remote Connection Parameter Request Event"},
                {0x0000000000000040, "LE Data Length Change Event"},
                {0x0000000000000080, "LE Read Local P256 Public Key Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000000100, "LE Generate DHKey Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000000200, "LE Enhanced Connection Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000000400, "LE Direct Advertising Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000000800, "LE PHY Update Complete Event"},
                {0x0000000000001000, "LE Extended Advertising Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000002000, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Established Event"},
                {0x0000000000004000, "LE Periodic Advertising Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000008000, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Lost Event"},
                {0x0000000000010000, "LE Extended Scan Timeout Event"},
                {0x0000000000020000, "LE Advertising Set Terminated Event"},
                {0x0000000000040000, "LE Extended Scan Request Received"},
                {0x0000000000080000, "LE Channel Selection Algorithm Event"},
                {0x0000000000100000, "LE Connectionless IQ Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000200000, "LE Connection IQ Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000400000, "LE CTE Request Failed Event"},
                {0x0000000000800000, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Transfer Received Event"},
                {0x0000000001000000, "LE CIS Established event"},
                {0x0000000002000000, "LE CIS Request event"},
                {0x0000000004000000, "LE Create BIG Complete event"},
                {0x0000000008000000, "LE Terminate BIG Complete event"},
                {0x0000000010000000, "LE BIG Sync Established event"},
                {0x0000000020000000, "LE BIG Sync Lost event"},
                {0x0000000040000000, "LE Request Peer SCA Complete event"},
                {0x0000000080000000, "LE Path Loss Threshold event"}
            }
            default = 0xFFFFFFFF;
        PARAM "LE_Event_Mask (63:32)"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0000000000000001, "LE Transmit Power Reporting event"},
                {0x0000000000000002, "LE BIGInfo Advertising Reporting event"},
                {0x0000000000000004, "LE Subrate Change Event"},
                {0x0000000800000008, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Established V2 Event"},
                {0x0000000000000010, "LE Periodic Advertising Report V2 Event"},
                {0x0000000000000020, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Transfer Received V2 Event"},
                {0x0000000000000040, "LE Periodic Advertising Subevent Data Request Event"},
                {0x0000000000000080, "LE Periodic Advertising Response Report Event"},
                {0x0000000000000100, "LE Enhanced Connection Complete V2 Event"},
                {0x0000000000010000, "LE HADM Read Remote Supported Capabilities Complete event"},
                {0x0000000000020000, "LE HADM Read Remote FAE Table Complete event"},
                {0x0000000000040000, "LE HADM Security Enabled Complete event"},
                {0x0000000000080000, "LE HADM Config Complete event"},
                {0x0000000000100000, "LE HADM Procedure Enable Complete event"},
                {0x0000000000200000, "LE HADM Event Result event"},
                {0x0000000000400000, "LE HADM Event Result Continue event"},
                {0x0000000000800000, "LE HADM Test End Complete event"}
            }
            default = 0x00000007;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "LE_Read_Buffer_Size" 0x002

    #########################################################
    # 2 LE Device Discovery Commands

    COMMAND "LE_Set_Advertising_Parameters" 0x006
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "Advertising_Interval_Min"
            uint16
            min = 0
            max = 16384
            default = 0x800
            note "in slots. Range: 20ms(32 slots) to 10.24s(16384 slots). Does not apply to connectable directed events";
        PARAM "Advertising_Interval_Max"
            uint16
            min = 0
            max = 16384
            default = 0x800
            note "in slots. Range: 20ms(32 slots) to 10.24s(16384 slots). Does not apply to connectable directed events";
        PARAM "Advertising_Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Connectable Undirected Advertising"},
                {0x01, "Connectable Directed Advertising"},
                {0x02, "Discoverable Undirected Advertising"},
                {0x03, "Non-connectable Undirected Advertising"},
                {0x04, "Connectable Low Duty Cycle Directed Advertising"}
            };
        PARAM "Own_Address_Type"
            uint8
                enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"},
                {0x02, "RPA or Public Address"},
                {0x03, "RPA or Random Address"}
            };
        PARAM "Direct_Address_Type"
            uint8
                enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"}
            }
            enabled_if (("Own_Address_Type" = 0x2) or ("Own_Address_Type" = 0x3) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x1) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x4));

        PARAM "Direct_Address"
            bdaddr
            enabled_if (("Own_Address_Type" = 0x2) or ("Own_Address_Type" = 0x3) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x1) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x4));

        PARAM "Advertising_Channel_Map"
            uint8
            bitmap
            {
                {0x01, "Chan_37"},
                {0x02, "Chan_38"},
                {0x04, "Chan_39"}
            }
            default = 0x7;

        PARAM "Advertising_Filter_Policy"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Allow Scan Request from Any, Allow Connect Request from Any"},
                {0x01, "Allow Scan Request from White List Only, Allow Connect Request from Any"},
                {0x02, "Allow Scan Request from Any, Allow Connect Request from White List Only"},
                {0x03, "Allow Scan Request from White List Only, Allow Connect Request from White List Only"}
            }
            default = 0x0
            enabled_if (("Advertising_Type" = 0x0) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x2) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x3));

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "LE_Read_Advertising_Channel_Tx_Power" 0x07

        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0

                {0x01, "Ignore advertisement packets not in the White List Only"},

                {0x03, "Accept all undirected listed in WL, all directed whose initA is RPA, and all directed being addressed to this device"}
                }

    #########################################################
    # 3 LE Link Layer Connection Management Commands

    COMMAND "LE_Create_Connection" 0x00D
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        PARAM "LE_Scan_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x0004
            max = 0x4000
            default = 100
            note "in slots. Range: 2.5ms to 10.25s";
        PARAM "LE_Scan_Window"
            uint16
            min = 0x0004
            max = 0x4000
            default = 50
            note "in slots. Range: 2.5ms to 10.25s";
        PARAM "InitiatorFilterPolicy"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "White List not used and the Peer address in this command is used"},
                {0x01, "White List is used and the Peer address in this command shall be ignored"}
            };
        PARAM "Peer_Address_Type"
            uint8
                enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"},
                {0x02, "Public Identity Address"},
                {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address"}
            };
        PARAM "Peer_Address"
            bdaddr;
        PARAM "Own_Address_Type"
            uint8
                enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"},
                {0x02, "RPA or Public Address"},
                {0x03, "RPA or Random Address"}
            };
        PARAM "Conn_Interval_Min"
            uint16
            min = 0x2
            max = 0xC80;
        PARAM "Conn_Interval_Max"
            uint16
            min = 0x2
            max = 0xC80;
        PARAM "Conn_Latency"
            uint16
            min = 0x0
            max = 0x01F4;
        PARAM "Supervision_Timeout"
            uint16
            min = 0xA
            max = 0xC80;
        PARAM "Minimum_CE_Len"
            uint16
            min = 0x0000
            max = 0xffff
            default = 0x0000
            note "in slots. Range:1 to 2*Conn_Interval";
        PARAM "Maximum_CE_Len"
            uint16
            min = 0x0000
            max = 0xffff
            default = 0x0000
            note "in slots. Range:1 to 2*Conn_Interval";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "LE_Create_Connection_Cancel" 0x00E

        COMMAND "LE_Read_White_List_Size" 0x00F

    COMMAND "LE_Read_Supported_LE_States" 0x01C
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "LE_States"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000000, "No state combinations supported"},
                {0x00000001, "Non-connectable Advertising State supported"},
                {0x00000002, "Discoverable Advertising State supported"},
                {0x00000004, "Connectable Advertising State supported"},
                {0x00000008, "Directed Advertising State supported"},
                {0x00000010, "Passive Scanning State supported"},
                {0x00000020, "Active Scanning State supported"},
                {0x00000040, "Initiating State supported, Connection State in the Master Role supported is also supported"},
                {0x00000080, "Connection State in the Slave Role supported"},
                {0x00000100, "Non-connectable Advertising State and Passive Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00000200, "Discoverable Advertising State and Passive Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00000400, "Connectable Advertising State and Passive Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00000800, "Directed Advertising State and Passive Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00001000, "Non-connectable Advertising State and Active Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00002000, "Discoverable Advertising State and Active Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00004000, "Connectable Advertising State and Active Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00008000, "Directed Advertising State and Active Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x00010000, "Non-connectable Advertising State and Initiating State combination supported"},
                {0x00020000, "Discoverable Advertising State and Initiating State combination supported"},
                {0x00040000, "Non-connectable Advertising State and Master Role combination supported"},
                {0x00080000, "Discoverable Advertising State and Master Role combination supported"},
                {0x00100000, "Non-connectable Advertising State and Slave Role combination supported"},
                {0x00200000, "Discoverable Advertising State and Slave Role combination supported"},
                {0x00400000, "Passive Scanning State and Initiating State combination supported"},
                {0x00800000, "Active Scanning State and Initiating State combination supported"},
                {0x01000000, "Passive Scanning State and Master Role combination supported"},
                {0x02000000, "Active Scanning State and Master Role combination supported"},
                {0x04000000, "Passive Scanning State and Slave Role combination supported"},
                {0x08000000, "Active Scanning State and Slave Role combination supported"},
                {0x10000000, "Initiating State and Master Role combination supported. Master Role and Master Role combination is also supported"},
                {0x20000000, "Low Duty Cycle Directed Advertising State supported"},
                {0x40000000, "Low Duty Cycle Directed Advertising State and Passive Scanning State combination supported"},
                {0x80000000, "Low Duty Cycle Directed Advertising State and Active Scanning State combination supported"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "LE_States (63:32)"
            uint32;
    }

                {0x01, "Allow Scan Request from White List Only, Allow Connect Request from Any"},

            uint8
            bitmap
            {
                {0x01, "the Host prefers to use the 1Ms/s receiver PHY"},

                {0x04, "the Host prefers to use the Coded receiver PHY"}

       CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "CIG_ID"
            uint8
            min=0x00
            max=0xEF;
        CC_PARAM "CIS_Count"
            uint8
            min=0x00
            max=0x10;
        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle[0]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 0);
        # - Entry[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle[1]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 1);
        # - Entry[2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle[2]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 2);
        # - Entry[3] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle[3]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 3);

    COMMAND "LE_Set_CIG_Parameters_Test" 0x63
    {
        devs "*"=0

        PARAM "CIG_ID"
            uint8
            min = 0x00
            max = 0xEF
            default = 0x00;
        PARAM "SDU_Interval_M_To_S"
            uint24
            min = 0x000FF
            max = 0xFFFFF;
        PARAM "SDU_Interval_S_To_M"
            uint24
            min = 0x000FF
            max = 0xFFFFF;
        PARAM "FT_M_To_S"
            uint8
            min = 0x01
            max = 0x1F
            default = 0x01;
        PARAM "FT_S_To_M"
            uint8
            min = 0x01
            max = 0x1F
            default = 0x01;
        PARAM "ISO_Interval"
            uint16
            min = 0x0004
            max = 0x0C80
            default = 0x04;
        PARAM "SCA"
            uint8
            min = 0x00
            max = 0x07
            default = 0x00;
        PARAM "Packing"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Sequential"},
                {0x01, "Interleaved"}
            }
            default = 0x00;
        PARAM "Framing"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Unframed"},
                {0x01, "Framed"}
            }
            default = 0x00;
        PARAM "CIS_Count"
            uint8
            min = 0x00
            max = 0x10;
        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "CIS_ID[0]"
            uint8
            min = 0x00
            max = 0xEF
            default = 0x00
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 0);

            uint8
            min = 0x01
            max = 0x1F
            default = 0x01
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 0);

            uint16
            min = 0x0000
            max = 0x0FFF

            {
                {0x01, "the Host prefers to use the 1Ms/s receiver PHY"},

    COMMAND "LE_Create_CIS" 0x64
    {
        devs "*"=0

        PARAM "CIS_Count"
            uint8
            min = 0x00
            max = 0x10;
        PARAM "CIS_Connection_Handle[0]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 0);
        PARAM "ACL_Connection_Handle[0]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 0);
        PARAM "CIS_Connection_Handle[1]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 1);
        PARAM "ACL_Connection_Handle[1]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 1);
        PARAM "CIS_Connection_Handle[2]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 2);
        PARAM "ACL_Connection_Handle[2]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 2);
        PARAM "CIS_Connection_Handle[3]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 3);
        PARAM "ACL_Connection_Handle[3]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 3);
        PARAM "CIS_Connection_Handle[4]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 4);
        PARAM "ACL_Connection_Handle[4]"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("CIS_Count" > 4);

                {0x40, "80us supported"},
                {0x80, "145us supported"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "T_FCS_times_Supported"
            uint16
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0001, "15us supported"},
                {0x0002, "20us supported"},
                {0x0004, "30us supported"},
                {0x0008, "40us supported"},
                {0x0010, "50us supported"},
                {0x0020, "60us supported"},
                {0x0040, "80us supported"},
                {0x0080, "100us supported"},
                {0x0100, "120us supported"},
                {0x0200, "150us supported"}
            };

            uint16

            {
                {0x01, "10us supported"},
                {0x02, "20us supported"},
                {0x04, "40us supported"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "T_SW_times_Supported"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "1us for the antenna switch period of the CS tones"},
                {0x02, "2us for the antenna switch period of the CS tones"},
                {0x04, "4us for the antenna switch period of the CS tones"},
                {0x0A, "10us for the antenna switch period of the CS tones"}
            };
    }
