    COMMAND "Write_Receive_Only" 0x02B
    {
        devs "*"=1
        doc "This command will set receive frequency. Used for RF testing only."
        PARAM "Receive_Frequency_Encoded"
            uint8
            doc "This is a Byte value indicating the frequency,"
                "which the receiver will camp on as an offset in MHz from 2400 Mhz."
                "Valid values are from 2 to 80."
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = ("Receive_Frequency" - 2400);
        PARAM "Receive_Frequency"
            uint16
            doc "An abstraction of Receive_Frequency_Encoded to indicate the actual frequency, from"
                "2402 to 2480 MHz to to simplify use of the command from scripts or the user"
                "interface."
            min = 2402
            max = 2480
            note "MHz"
            not_in_binary_message
            decode_value = ("Receive_Frequency_Encoded" + 2400);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Rate_Control" 0x02C
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1
        doc "This command will write rate control."
        PARAM "Allow_Rate_Control"
            bool8
            doc "0 -- AutoRate LMP not sent after connection<br>"
                "1 -- AutoRate LMP is sent after connection to allow the remote device to"
                "send the LMP preferred rate LMPs. LMP preferred rate is used to control"
                "the tx pkt types sent from this device to the remote device.";
        PARAM "Time_History_Duration"
            uint8
            doc "Length of time that pkt error statistics are saved"
                "for use in the link quality calculations that determine the use of the"
                "preferred rate LMP. The count value is in units of 1.28 seconds,"
                "i.e. a count of 10 provides a time history of 12.8 seconds."
            min = 8
            max = 64
            default = 40
            note "N * 1.28 sec";
        PARAM "Update_Rate_Duration"
            uint8
            doc "Length of time between the link quality calculations"
                "that determine the use of the preferred rate LMP. The count value is"
                "in units of 1.28 seconds, i.e. a count of 2 provides an update rate of 2.56 seconds."
            min = 2
            max = 128
            default = 20
            note "N * 1.28 sec";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Crystal_PPM" 0x02F
    {
        devs "*"=1
        doc "This command takes the PPM error measurement and calculates the associated RF_Trim and"
            "IF_Trim values that correct the clocks. The user may also enter the IF_Trim and"
            "RF_Trim values directly. The trim values may be committed to EEPROM if that option is"
            "chosen. For backward compatibility, ARM-based products do accept the 8051 calculated"
            "mode values, but in that case, all parameters other than PPM are ignored, and in that"
            "compatibility mode, the Factory_Commit option is not supported."
        PARAM "Mode"
            uint8
            doc "The mode by which crystal information is provided."
            enum
            {
                {0, "8051 calculated"},
                {1, "8051 if_trim and rf_trim"},
                {2, "ARM"},
                {3, "2042 calculated"}
            };
        PARAM "Freq_Int_Part"
            uint8
            doc "Only applicable if Mode is 8051 calculated or ARM."
                "Frequency whole integer part (values between 0 and 40 MHz) e.g. 19 for 19.68."
            enabled_if ("Mode" = 0)
            note "e.g. 19 for 19.68";
        PARAM "Freq_Fract_Part"
            uint8
            doc "Only applicable if Mode is 8051 calculated or ARM."
                "Frequency fractional part (values from 0 to 255 in units of 1/256 MHz)"
                "e.g. 256*0.68 for 19.68."
            enabled_if ("Mode" = 0)
            note "e.g. 256*0.68 for 19.68";
        PARAM "PPM"
            int8
            doc "Amount to trim the center frequency by, in 1 PPM steps.  A positive value will"
                "cause the center frequency to increase, while a negative value will cause the"
                "center frequency to decrease. Only applicable if Mode is 8051 calculated or ARM."
                "For 8051 calculated mode, the PPM value is absolute, with the trim being reapplied"
                "to the untrimmed base frequency represented in Freq_Int_Part and Freq_Fract_Part"
                "each time this function is called. Note that when an ARM-based product is"
                "emulating the 8051 calculated mode, the Freq_Int_Part and Freq_Fract_Part"
                "parameters are ignored, but the PPM value is still absolute. For ARM mode, the"
                "PPM value is relative to the current center frequency, which may have already been"
                "trimmed."
            enabled_if (("Mode" = 0) or ("Mode" = 2));
        PARAM "IF_Trim"
            uint8
            doc "Only applicable if Mode is 8051 if_trim and rf_trim."
                "Value used directly instead of calculation from MHz frequency and PPM information."
            enabled_if ("Mode" = 1);
        PARAM "RF_Trim"
            uint16
            doc "Only applicable if Mode is 8051 if_trim and rf_trim."
                "Value used directly instead of calculation from MHz frequency and PPM information."
            enabled_if ("Mode" = 1);
        PARAM "Factory_Commit"
            bool8
            doc "If 1, commit the (possibly calculated) IF_Trim and RF_Trim values to nonvolatile"
                "memory. For the 8051 modes, this operation is supported only if an EEPROM is"
                "installed. For ARM mode, this operation is supported if either an EEPROM or flash"
                "has been installed and pre-programmed with an inactive RF_PLL Trim configuration"
                "item. That item has a type code of 0xFD, and the int32 PPM value contained in the"
                "configuration item must have been set to 0xFFFFFFFF. The Factory_Commit option may"
                "be executed once and only once."
            enabled_if (("Mode" = 0) or ("Mode" = 1) or ("Mode" = 2));
        PARAM "2042_Register_Settings"
            uint8[11]
            doc "Jim to document!"
            present_if ("Mode" = 3);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Set_Power_Amp_Bias" 0x030
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "This command sets the power amp bias value."
        PARAM "Hot_Temp_Bias"
            uint8{7:4}
            doc "The power amp bias when the chip is hot.  Corresponds to an applied attenuation of"
                "between 0 and 6 db in 2 db increments. If the radio max output is nominally +3db, this"
                "command will reduce the output to a value in the range of +3 db to -3 db."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "0 dB"},
                {0x01, "-2 dB"},
                {0x02, "-4 dB"},
                {0x03, "-6 dB"}
            };
        PARAM "Warm_Temp_Bias"
            uint8{3:2}
            doc "The power amp bias when the chip is warm.  Corresponds to an applied attenuation of"
                "between 0 and 6 db in 2 db increments. If the radio max output is nominally +3db, this"
                "command will reduce the output to a value in the range of +3 db to -3 db."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "0 dB"},
                {0x01, "-2 dB"},
                {0x02, "-4 dB"},
                {0x03, "-6 dB"}
            };
        PARAM "Cold_Temp_Bias"
            uint8{1:0}
            doc "The power amp bias when the chip is cold.  Corresponds to an applied attenuation of"
                "between 0 and 6 db in 2 db increments. If the radio max output is nominally +3db, this"
                "command will reduce the output to a value in the range of +3 db to -3 db."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "0 dB"},
                {0x01, "-2 dB"},
                {0x02, "-4 dB"},
                {0x03, "-6 dB"}
            };
    }

    COMMAND "Set_Ham_Behavior" 0x031
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1
        doc "This command sets the HAM behavior."
        PARAM "Flag"
            uint8
            doc "0 -- Normal Mode. Poll the slave at Tpoll. If data is RX from the slave,"
                "send NULLs to the slave until the next scheduled task. This is to allow the"
                "slave to send data back to the master if data is pending in the slave's TX"
                "FIFO.<br>"
                "1 -- Always Send Nulls In Between Polls. Poll the slave at Tpoll and send"
                "NULL packets in every master TX slot other than the Poll packets.<br>"
                "2 -- No Nulls Inbetween Polls. Poll the slave at Tpoll. If the data is RX"
                "from the slave, do not send NULLs to allow the slave to transmit data back"
                "to the master. "
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Normal mode"},
                {0x01, "Always send NULLs between POLLs"},
                {0x02, "No NULLs between POLLs"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_RF_Reprogramming_Table" 0x03C
    {
        devs    "*"=1,
                "BCM2035"=1 ("Flash based systems or ROM with patch only."),
                "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "This command modifies default RF register settings. This command is only supported by"
            "flash based systems or systems with the required patch installed."
        PARAM "Number_Of_Entries"
            uint8
            doc "Number of settings to modify."
            min = 1
            max = 10;

        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[0]"
            uint8
            doc "RF Register offset for the associated entry. This parameter will be repeated for"
                "Number_Of_Entries, with all array parameters interleaved according to Bluetooth"
                "standard array parameter treatment.";
        PARAM "Register_Value[0]"
            uint8
            doc "RF Register value for the associated entry. This parameter will be repeated for"
                "Number_Of_Entries, with all array parameters interleaved according to Bluetooth"
                "standard array parameter treatment.";

        # - Entry[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[1]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 1);
        PARAM "Register_Value[1]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 1);

        # - Entry[2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[2]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 2);
        PARAM "Register_Value[2]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 2);

        # - Entry[3] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[3]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 3);
        PARAM "Register_Value[3]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 3);

        # - Entry[4] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[4]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 4);
        PARAM "Register_Value[4]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 4);

        # - Entry[5] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[5]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 5);
        PARAM "Register_Value[5]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 5);

        # - Entry[6] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[6]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 6);
        PARAM "Register_Value[6]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 6);

        # - Entry[7] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[7]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 7);
        PARAM "Register_Value[7]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 7);

        # - Entry[8] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[8]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 8);
        PARAM "Register_Value[8]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 8);

        # - Entry[9] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Register_Offset[9]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 9);
        PARAM "Register_Value[9]"
            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Entries" > 9);

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Automatic_Pairing_Requested" 0x03D
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1 ("Only supported when BTW UHE model enabled")
        doc "Requests that the transceiver perform automatic pairing with a discoverable mouse"
            "and/or keyboard, or suppresses that behavior in response to a pairing button"
            "press.<br>"
            "<br>"
            "In the event that the pairing button is pressed, a Vendor Specific event (event code"
            "0xFF) with the Automatic pairing request sub code (Sub_Code = 1) will be generated. If"
            "the host responds with an Automatic_Pairing_Requested command with the Host_Assisted"
            "flag being 1, the device will allow the host to perform pairing. If the Automatic"
            "pairing request event is not responded to, is responded to with the Host_Assisted flag"
            "being 0, or if the host initiates pairing on its own using an"
            "Automatic_Pairing_Requested command with the Host_Assisted flag being 0 which is not"
            "in response to an Automatic pairing request event, the transceiver will perform"
            "automatic pairing by inquiring for and pairing with a discoverable mouse and/or"
            "keyboard.  Note that pairing performed by the transceiver is inherently insecure due"
            "to the inability to present a PIN_Code for the user to enter, or to validate the user"
            "who is performing the pairing.<br>"
            "<br>"
            "This command is only supported if the UHE model used with BTW is active. Thus, support"
            "for this command is restricted to a subset of BCM2035 firmware builds and"
            "configuration records."
        PARAM "Host_Assisted"
            bool8
            doc "0 - The transceiver should perform an insecure pairing<br>"
                "1 - The host will perform the pairing";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_VS_Extension" 0x03E
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2040"=1, "BCM2042"=1
        doc "Reads the volatile section extended data"
        PARAM "Offset"
            uint8
            doc "The offset within the volatile section extended data from which to read."
            max = 99;
        PARAM "Length"
            uint8
            doc "The length to read.  The maximum length which can be read is 16 bytes."
            max = if ((100 - "Offset") > 16) then 16 else (100 - "Offset");
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Offset"
            uint8
            doc "The offset within the volatile section extended data from which the data was read.";
        CC_PARAM "Length"
            uint8
            doc "The length of data which was read";
        CC_PARAM "VS_Data"
            uint8[16]
            doc "The data which was read.  Only Length bytes of data are valid, although the VS_Data"
                "parameter is fixed at a length of 16 bytes."
            valid_length = "Length"
                min = 0;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_VS_Extension" 0x03F
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2040"=1, "BCM2042"=1
        doc "Writes the volatile section extended data."
        PARAM "Offset"
            uint8
            doc "The offset within the volatile section extended data at which to write.";
        PARAM "Length"
            uint8
            doc "The length to write.  The maximum length which can be written is 16 bytes."
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = ByteArrayValidLength("VS_Data");
        PARAM "VS_Data"
            uint8[16]
            doc "The data to be written.  Only Length bytes of data are valid, although the VS_Data"
                "parameter is fixed at a length of 16 bytes."
            valid_length = "Length"
                min = 1;                                # Minimum array length in an array context
        PARAM "VS_Extension_Length"
            uint8
            doc "The full length of the volatile section extended data segment. If the extended data"
                "section is longer than indicated in the command, the existing data will be"
                "truncated to this length.";
        PARAM "Commit"
            bool8
            doc "If 1, the volatile section is committed to nonvolatile memory. If 0, the data"
                "written by the command is written into the device's RAM, but is not committed to"
                "nonvolatile memory until a subsequent Write_VS_Extension command in which the"
                "Commit flag will be true. When more data is being written than can be contained"
                "in a single write, it is advisable to set te Commit parameter to 0 for all but the"
                "last Write_VS_Extension command.";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_Collaboration_Mode" 0x040
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "This command reads WLAN/Bluetooth Collaboration Configurations."
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "CS_Encoded"
            uint8
            doc "Bit 7 will be set to 0 for BCM2035, otherwise it will be set to 1.<br>"
                "For BCM2035:<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Bits 1:0: 2035_Collaboration_Solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;0 - No collaboration<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1 - 2 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2 - 4 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Bits 6:2: GPIO_PCM_Interface<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;0 - GPIO1/GPIO7 (uart interface configuration<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1 - PCM_IN/PCM_OUT (used with uart or usb when PCM is not required)<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2 - GPIO1/GPIO0 (usb interface when sideband power signalling not required)<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;3 - GPIO6/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;4 - GPIO4/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)<br>"
                "For other devices:<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Bits 6:0: 2045_Collaboration_Solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;0 - No collaboration<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1 - 2 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2 - 3 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;3 - WCS";
        CC_PARAM "Architecture"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate which architecture the response pertains"
                "to."
            not_in_binary_message
            enum
            {
                {0, "2035"},
                {1, "2045"}
            }
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" < 0x80) then   0
                            else                            1;

        # - 2045 ARCHITECTURE - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

        CC_PARAM "2045_Collaboration_Solution"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate, for devices other than BCM2035, which"
                "collaboration solution is enabled."
            not_in_binary_message
            enabled_if ("Architecture" = 1)
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No collaboration"},
                {0x1, "2 pin 2 pin solution"},
                {0x2, "3 pin 2 pin solution"},
                {0x3, "WCS"}
#               {0x4, "WiMax"}
            }
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x80) then       0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x81) then  1
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x82) then  2
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x83) then  3
                            else                    4;
        CC_PARAM "Priorities"
            uint32
            doc "Not present for BCM2035 command. Defines the priorities of Bluetooth tasks.  A 0"
                "bit indicates a low priority task, a 1 bit indicates a high priority task."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "STANDBY"},
                {0x00000002, "LOW_PRI_CONNECTION"},
                {0x00000004, "AFH_RSSISCAN"},
                {0x00000008, "BROADCAST"},
                {0x00000010, "INQUIRY"},
                {0x00000020, "PAGE"},
                {0x00000040, "CONNECTION"},
                {0x00000080, "DONT_RESET_LCU_MASTER_SCO (2048 only)"},
                {0x00000100, "TPOLL"},
                {0x00000200, "INQSCAN"},
                {0x00000400, "PAGESCAN"},
                {0x00000800, "MASTER_SLAVE_SWITCH"},
                {0x00001000, "NEW_CONNECTION"},
                {0x00002000, "SCAN_INVERSE_PRI_DURING_SCO"},
                {0x00004000, "MODULO"},
                {0x00008000, "HOLD"},
                {0x00010000, "SNIFF"},
                {0x00020000, "PARK"},
                {0x00040000, "SCO"},
                {0x00080000, "ESCO"},
                {0x00100000, "HI_PRI_PAGESCAN"},
                {0x00200000, "HI_PRI_CONNECTION"},
                {0x00400000, "SLAVE_POLL_LMP"},
                {0x00800000, "DISABLE_COEX_IF_AFH_ENABLE"},
                {0x01000000, "DEFER_HIGH_PRIORITY_FRAME (3 wires only)"},
                {0x02000000, "INCREASE_PRIORITY_AFTER_DEFFER_ENABLED"},
                {0x04000000, "DONT_RESET_LCU (2048 only)"},
                {0x08000000, "NON_CONNECTION_HW_SUPPORT  (2048 only)"},
                {0x40000000, "PAGE_SCAN_HW_SUPPORT_BIT_0 (2048 only)"},
                {0x80000000, "PAGE_SCAN_HW_SUPPORT_BIT_1 (2048 only)"}
            }
            present_if ("CS_Encoded" > 0x7F);       # 2045
        CC_PARAM "Channel_ID"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command when WCS collaboration solution is"
                "selected.  A value of 16 is not a valid WLAN channel ID, and therefore a value of"
                "16 will preserve allow the WLAN hardware to preserve its channel ID assignment."
                "Any other value will force the WLAN to use the specified channel ID."
            present_if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x83);       # 2045, WCS mode
        CC_PARAM "Number_Bypassed"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command when WCS collaboration solution is"
                "selected. The number of Bluetooth channels to be blocked across a WLAN channel."
            present_if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x83);       # 2045, WCS mode
        CC_PARAM "RESERVED_1"
            uint16
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command when WCS collaboration solution is not"
                "selected.  This serves to pad the Command Complete event to the same size for all"
                "non-BCM2035 responses."
            present_if ( ("CS_Encoded" = 0x80) or ("CS_Encoded" = 0x81) or ("CS_Encoded" = 0x82) );
        CC_PARAM "Priority_Inverse_Threshold"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command. Effective if"
                "INCREASE_PRIORITY_AFTER_DEFFER_ENABLED is enabled. This paramter defines after how"
                "many frames defered by the WLAN, the the priority of that defered frame will be"
                "increased"
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1);
        CC_PARAM "Configuration_Flags_1"
            uint32
            doc "Additional configuration flags."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "COEX auto selection "},
                {0x00000002, "COEX auto pad config "},
                {0x00100000, "Back power workaround "},
                {0x00200000, "Sample Rx "},
                {0x00400000, "Dynamic LCU reset "},
                {0x00800000, "Simurx workaround "},
                {0x01000000, "5Wire support "},
                {0x02000000, "A2DP_ACL_Priority_inv "},
                {0x04000000, "EIR scan mode "},
                {0x08000000, "Nonconnection LCU reset "},
                {0x10000000, "Connection HW support "},
                {0x40000000, "Nonconnection multi-sampling "},
                {0x80000000, "HW coexistence mode "},
                {0x00010000, "BLE COEX Nokia Mode"},
                {0x00008000, "BLE COEX Enable"}
            }
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1);
        CC_PARAM "Configuration_Flags_2"
            uint32
            doc "Additional configuration flags."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x02000000, "BLE Connection high priority"},
                {0x01000000, "BLE INIT high priority"},
                {0x00800000, "BLE SCAN high priority"},
                {0x00400000, "BLE ADV high priority"},
                {0x40000000, "PS and FHS low priority"},
                {0x80000000, "LMP high priority"}

            }
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1);

        # - 2035 ARCHITECTURE - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

        CC_PARAM "2035_Collaboration_Solution"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate, for BCM2035, which"
                "collaboration solution is enabled."
            not_in_binary_message
            enabled_if ("Architecture" = 0)
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No collaboration"},
                {0x1, "2 pin 2 pin solution"},
                {0x2, "4 pin 2 pin solution"}
            }
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x00) then       0   # GPIO1/GPIO7
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x04) then  0   # PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x08) then  0   # GPIO1/GPIO0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0C) then  0   # GPIO6/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x10) then  0   # GPIO4/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x01) then  1   # GPIO1/GPIO7
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x05) then  1   # PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x09) then  1   # GPIO1/GPIO0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0D) then  1   # GPIO6/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x11) then  1   # GPIO4/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x02) then  2   # GPIO1/GPIO7
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x06) then  2   # PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0A) then  2   # GPIO1/GPIO0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0E) then  2   # GPIO6/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x12) then  2   # GPIO4/GPIO5
                            else                                0;  # Invalid

        CC_PARAM "GPIO_PCM_Interface"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate, for BCM2035, which GPIOs are in use for"
                "collaborative coexistance."
            not_in_binary_message
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "GPIO1/GPIO7 (uart interface configuration)"},
                {0x1, "PCM_IN/PCM_OUT (used with uart or usb when PCM is not required)"},
                {0x2, "GPIO1/GPIO0 (usb interface when sideband power signalling not required)"},
                {0x3, "GPIO6/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)"},
                {0x4, "GPIO4/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)"}
            }
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x00) then       0   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x04) then  1   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x08) then  2   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0C) then  3   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x10) then  4   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x01) then  0   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x05) then  1   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x09) then  2   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0D) then  3   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x11) then  4   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x02) then  0   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x06) then  1   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0A) then  2   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0E) then  3   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x12) then  4   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else                                0;  # Invalid

        CC_PARAM "Low_Priority_Frame_Timer"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is not set to"
                "disable collaborative coexistance.  The timer controls how much delay will add on for"
                "low priority tasks. For example, ACL throughput is consider low priority relative to"
                "WLAN throughput. Units are in Bluetooth Frames (1.25ms)."
            note "N * 1.25ms"
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" > 0) );
        CC_PARAM "RESERVED_3"           # 2035 pad where Low_Priority_Frame_Timer is
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "disable collaborative coexistance.  This byte serves to pad the Command Complete event"
                "to the same size for all BCM2035 responses."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 0) );

        # - 2035 PRIORITY TABLE - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        CC_PARAM "RESERVED_4"           # 2035 pad for the priority table
            uint8[33]
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is not set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution.  These bytes serve to pad the Command Complete event to the same"
                "size for all BCM2035 responses."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" < 2) );

        CC_PARAM "PAGE_R0_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R0 page."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_R1_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R1 page."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_R2_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R2 page."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R0_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R0 page scan."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R1_L_200MS_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"

            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R1_G_200MS_Priority"

            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"

            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R2_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R2 page scan."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_RESPONSE_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to page response."

            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"

        CC_PARAM "TPOLL_EXPIRE_Priority"

            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"

                "master role."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "TPOLL_SNIFFTRANS_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to the sniff transition mode."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "INQUIRY_SCAN_1_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to inquiry scan, mode 1 ( RX ID)."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "INQUIRY_SCAN_2_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to inquiry scan, mode 2 (RX ID and"
                "TX FHS)."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to page scan."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "M_S_SWITCH_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to negotiating a master/slave switch."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "NEW_CONNECTION_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to new connection mode (POLL/NULL"
                "exchange)."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "8051_CMD_CONN_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to the initial connection setup mode."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "MODULO_CALC_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned when a modulo calulation is done for"
                "park or sniff."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "RETURN_FROM_HOLD_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to returning from a hold state."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "SNIFF_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to sniff."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "SCO_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to SCO."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "PARK_BEACON_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to a park beacon."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        CC_PARAM "AFH_INSTANT_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to an AFH instant."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
    }

    COMMAND "Write_Collaboration_Mode" 0x041
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "This command writes WLAN/Bluetooth Collaboration Configurations."
        PARAM "CS_Encoded"
            uint8
            doc "Bit 7 must be set to 0 for BCM2035, otherwise it must be set to 1.<br>"
                "For BCM2035:<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Bits 1:0: 2035_Collaboration_Solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;0 - No collaboration<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1 - 2 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2 - 4 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Bits 6:2: GPIO_PCM_Interface<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;0 - GPIO1/GPIO7 (uart interface configuration<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1 - PCM_IN/PCM_OUT (used with uart or usb when PCM is not required)<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2 - GPIO1/GPIO0 (usb interface when sideband power signalling not required)<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;3 - GPIO6/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;4 - GPIO4/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)<br>"
                "For other devices:<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Bits 6:0: 2045_Collaboration_Solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;0 - No collaboration<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1 - 2 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2 - 3 pin 2 pin solution<br>"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;3 - WCS"
                "&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;4 - WiMax"
            binary_message_only
            # 0x00 = 2035       No collaboration
            # 0x01 = 2035       2 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO1/GPIO7
            # 0x02 = 2035       4 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO1/GPIO7
            # 0x05 = 2035       2 pin 2 pin solution        PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
            # 0x06 = 2035       4 pin 2 pin solution        PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
            # 0x09 = 2035       2 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO1/GPIO0
            # 0x0A = 2035       4 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO1/GPIO0
            # 0x0D = 2035       2 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO6/GPIO5
            # 0x0E = 2035       4 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO6/GPIO5
            # 0x11 = 2035       2 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO4/GPIO5
            # 0x12 = 2035       4 pin 2 pin solution        GPIO4/GPIO5
            # 0x80 = 2045       No collaboration
            # 0x81 = 2045       2 pin 2 pin solution
            # 0x82 = 2045       3 pin 2 pin solution
            # 0x83 = 2045       WCS solution
            encode_value =  if ("Architecture" = 1)
                            then    # 2045
                                        if ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" = 0) then         0x80
                                        else if ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" = 1) then    0x81
                                        else if ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) then    0x82
                                        else if ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" = 3) then    0x83
                                        else                                        0x84
                            else    # 2035
                                        if ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 0) then
                                            # 2035 No collaboration
                                                                                            0x00
                                        else if ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 1) then
                                            # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                                            if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 0) then              0x01
                                            else if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 1) then         0x05
                                            else if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 2) then         0x09
                                            else if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 3) then         0x0D
                                            else                                            0x11
                                        else
                                            # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                                            if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 0) then              0x02
                                            else if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 1) then         0x06
                                            else if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 2) then         0x0A
                                            else if ("GPIO_PCM_Interface" = 3) then         0x0E
                                            else                                            0x12;

        PARAM "Architecture"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction of bit 7 of CS_Encoded to indicate which architecture the command"
                "pertains to."
            not_in_binary_message
            enum
            {
                {0, "2035"},
                {1, "2045"}
            }
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" < 0x80) then   0
                            else                            1;

        # - 2045 ARCHITECTURE - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

        PARAM "2045_Collaboration_Solution"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate, for devices other than BCM2035, which"
                "collaboration solution to enable."
            not_in_binary_message
            enabled_if ("Architecture" = 1)
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No collaboration"},
                {0x1, "2 pin 2 pin solution"},
                {0x2, "3 pin 2 pin solution"},
                {0x3, "WCS"}
#               {0x4, "WiMax"}
            }
            default = 0x1
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x80) then       0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x81) then  1
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x82) then  2
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x83) then  3
                            else                    4;
        PARAM "Priorities"
            uint32
            doc "Not present for BCM2035 command. Defines the priorities of Bluetooth tasks.  A 0"
                "bit indicates a low priority task, a 1 bit indicates a high priority task."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "STANDBY"},
                {0x00000002, "LOW_PRI_CONNECTION"},
                {0x00000004, "AFH_RSSISCAN"},
                {0x00000008, "BROADCAST"},
                {0x00000010, "INQUIRY"},
                {0x00000020, "PAGE"},
                {0x00000040, "CONNECTION"},
                {0x00000080, "DONT_RESET_LCU_MASTER_SCO (2048 only)"},
                {0x00000100, "TPOLL"},
                {0x00000200, "INQSCAN"},
                {0x00000400, "PAGESCAN"},
                {0x00000800, "MASTER_SLAVE_SWITCH"},
                {0x00001000, "NEW_CONNECTION"},
                {0x00002000, "SCAN_INVERSE_PRI_DURING_SCO"},
                {0x00004000, "MODULO"},
                {0x00008000, "HOLD"},
                {0x00010000, "SNIFF"},
                {0x00020000, "PARK"},
                {0x00040000, "SCO"},
                {0x00080000, "ESCO"},
                {0x00100000, "HI_PRI_PAGESCAN"},
                {0x00200000, "HI_PRI_CONNECTION"},
                {0x00400000, "SLAVE_POLL_LMP"},
                {0x00800000, "DISABLE_COEX_IF_AFH_ENABLE"},
                {0x01000000, "DEFER_HIGH_PRIORITY_FRAME (3 wires only)"},
                {0x02000000, "INCREASE_PRIORITY_AFTER_DEFFER_ENABLED"},
                {0x04000000, "DONT_RESET_LCU (2048 only)"},
                {0x08000000, "NON_CONNECTION_HW_SUPPORT  (2048 only)"},
                {0x40000000, "PAGE_SCAN_HW_SUPPORT_BIT_0 (2048 only)"},
                {0x80000000, "PAGE_SCAN_HW_SUPPORT_BIT_1 (2048 only)"}
            }
            default = 0xCB7FBDB0
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1) ;
        PARAM "Channel_ID"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command when WCS collaboration solution is"
                "selected.  A value of 16 is not a valid WLAN channel ID, and therefore a value of"
                "16 will preserve allow the WLAN hardware to preserve its channel ID assignment."
                "Any other value will force the WLAN to use the specified channel ID."
            max = 16
            default = 16
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 1) and ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" = 3) );
        PARAM "Number_Bypassed"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command when WCS collaboration solution is"
                "selected. The number of Bluetooth channels to be blocked across a WLAN channel."
            default = 10
            max = 40
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 1) and ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" = 3) );
        PARAM "RESERVED_1"
            uint16
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command when WCS collaboration solution is"
                "not selected. This serves as padding to fix the alignment of"
                "Priority_Inverse_Threshold to account for Channel_ID and Number_Bypassed."
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 1) and ("2045_Collaboration_Solution" < 3) )
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0;
        PARAM "Priority_Inverse_Threshold"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for non-BCM2035 command. Effective if"
                "INCREASE_PRIORITY_AFTER_DEFFER_ENABLED is enabled. This paramter defines after how"
                "many frames defered by the WLAN, the the priority of that defered frame will be"
                "increased"
            default = 10
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1);
        PARAM "Configuration_Flags_1"
            uint32
            doc "Additional configuration flags."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "COEX auto selection "},
                {0x00000002, "COEX auto pad config "},
                {0x00100000, "Back power workaround "},
                {0x00200000, "Sample Rx "},
                {0x00400000, "Dynamic LCU reset "},
                {0x00800000, "Simurx workaround "},
                {0x01000000, "5Wire support "},
                {0x02000000, "A2DP_ACL_Priority_inv "},
                {0x04000000, "EIR scan mode "},
                {0x08000000, "Nonconnection LCU reset "},
                {0x10000000, "Connection HW support "},
                {0x40000000, "Nonconnection multi-sampling "},
                {0x80000000, "HW coexistence mode "},
                {0x00010000, "BLE COEX Nokia Mode"},
                {0x00008000, "BLE COEX Enable"}
            }
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1);
        PARAM "Configuration_Flags_2"
            uint32
            doc "Additional configuration flags."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x02000000, "BLE Connection high priority"},
                {0x01000000, "BLE INIT high priority"},
                {0x00800000, "BLE SCAN high priority"},
                {0x00400000, "BLE ADV high priority"},
                {0x40000000, "PS and FHS low priority"},
                {0x80000000, "LMP high priority"}
            }
            present_if ("Architecture" = 1);

        # - 2035 ARCHITECTURE - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

        PARAM "2035_Collaboration_Solution"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate, for BCM2035, which"
                "collaboration solution to enable."
            not_in_binary_message
            enabled_if ("Architecture" = 0)
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "No collaboration"},
                {0x1, "2 pin 2 pin solution"},
                {0x2, "4 pin 2 pin solution"}
            }
            default = 0x1
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x00) then       0   # GPIO1/GPIO7
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x04) then  0   # PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x08) then  0   # GPIO1/GPIO0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0C) then  0   # GPIO6/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x10) then  0   # GPIO4/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x01) then  1   # GPIO1/GPIO7
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x05) then  1   # PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x09) then  1   # GPIO1/GPIO0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0D) then  1   # GPIO6/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x11) then  1   # GPIO4/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x02) then  2   # GPIO1/GPIO7
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x06) then  2   # PCM_IN/PCM_OUT
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0A) then  2   # GPIO1/GPIO0
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0E) then  2   # GPIO6/GPIO5
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x12) then  2   # GPIO4/GPIO5
                            else                                0;  # Invalid

        PARAM "GPIO_PCM_Interface"
            uint8
            doc "An abstraction from CS_Encoded to indicate, for BCM2035, which GPIOs to use for"
                "collaborative coexistance."
            not_in_binary_message
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "GPIO1/GPIO7 (uart interface configuration)"},
                {0x1, "PCM_IN/PCM_OUT (used with uart or usb when PCM is not required)"},
                {0x2, "GPIO1/GPIO0 (usb interface when sideband power signalling not required)"},
                {0x3, "GPIO6/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)"},
                {0x4, "GPIO4/GPIO5 (uart or usb when EEPROM is not in system)"}
            }
            default = 0x2
            enabled_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" > 0) )
            decode_value =  if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x00) then       0   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x04) then  1   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x08) then  2   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0C) then  3   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x10) then  4   # No collaboration
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x01) then  0   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x05) then  1   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x09) then  2   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0D) then  3   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x11) then  4   # 2 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x02) then  0   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x06) then  1   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0A) then  2   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x0E) then  3   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else if ("CS_Encoded" = 0x12) then  4   # 4 pin 2 pin solution
                            else                                0;  # Invalid

        PARAM "Low_Priority_Frame_Timer"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is not set to"
                "disable collaborative coexistance.  The timer controls how much delay will add on for"
                "low priority tasks. For example, ACL throughput is consider low priority relative to"
                "WLAN throughput. Units are in Bluetooth Frames (1.25ms)."
            default = 50
            note "N * 1.25ms"
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" > 0) );
        PARAM "PAGE_R0_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R0 page."
            max = 3
            default = 3
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_R1_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R1 page."
            max = 3
            default = 2
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_R2_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R2 page."
            max = 3
            default = 1
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R0_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R0 page scan."
            max = 3
            default = 3
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R1_L_200MS_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R1 page scan when the scan window"
                "is less than 200ms."
            max = 3
            default = 2
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R1_G_200MS_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R1 page scan when the scan window"
                "is greater than 200ms."
            max = 3
            default = 1
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_SCAN_R2_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to R2 page scan."
            max = 3
            default = 1
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );

            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"

            max = 3
            default = 0
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "INQUIRY_RESPONSE_Priority"

                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to inquiry response."
            max = 3
            default = 1
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "ACL_Priority"

            max = 3

            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "HID_ACTIVE_SNIFF_Priority"

                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to inquiry."
            max = 3
            default = 3
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "PAGE_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"
                "4 pin 2 pin solution. The priority assigned to paging."
            max = 3
            default = 3
            present_if ( ("Architecture" = 0) and ("2035_Collaboration_Solution" = 2) );
        PARAM "TPOLL_EXPIRE_Priority"
            uint8
            doc "Only present for BCM2035 architecture if 2035_Collaboration_Solution is set to"

    COMMAND "Write_New_Power_Amp_Biases" 0x042
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1
        doc "This command writes the Power Amplifier offset and Power Amplifier"
            "bias current values. These values are used to modify the power output"
            "over the entire temperature range. Each call to this command modifies"
            "the behavior of the power output for the specified temperature zone only."
            "To completely change the power output behavior over the entire temperature"
            "range requires the user to modify the values for each Temperature Zone"
            "(see Byte 1 of Parameters). Note that this command can cause the device"
            "to stop functioning and should be used with great care."
        PARAM "Temperature_Zone"
            uint8
            doc "The temperature zone selection."
            enum
            {
                {0, "T < -20C"},
                {1, "-20C <= T < 20C"},
                {2, "20C <= T < 40C"},
                {3, "40C <= T < 70C"},
                {4, "70C <= T < 90C"},
                {5, "T >= 90C"}
            };
        PARAM "Power_Amp_Bias"
            uint8
            doc "This value modifies the PA_Offset RF register.";
        PARAM "Power_Amp_Bias_Current"
            uint8
            doc "This value modifies the PA_IDAC_BIAS RF register.";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

                {71, "2473 MHz"},
                {72, "2474 MHz"},
                {73, "2475 MHz"},
                {74, "2476 MHz"},
                {75, "2477 MHz"},
                {76, "2478 MHz"},
                {77, "2479 MHz"},
                {78, "2480 MHz"}
            };
        PARAM "Sync_Window"
            uint32
            doc "The size of sync window to receive packet"
            default = 0xffffff;
        PARAM "Resync"
            bool8
            doc "Indicate whether resync to master clock is needed or not";
        PARAM "Adjust_Guard_Value"
            uint8
            doc "The guard period for receiving EDR packets"
            default = 12;
        PARAM "Logical_Channel"
            uint8
            doc "Which logical connection channel the Rx packet belongs to"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "ACL EDR"},
                {0x01, "ACL Basic"},
                {0x02, "eSCO EDR"},
                {0x03, "eSCO Basic"},
                {0x04, "SCO Basic"}
            };
        PARAM "Rx_Whitening_Enable"
            bool8
            doc "Whether to turn on whitening or not";
        PARAM "Rx_Length"
            uint16
            doc "The payload length of Rx packet"
            max = 1024;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_RAM" 0x04C
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "Writes data into the ARM's 32-bit linear address space or EEPROM. This command is"
            "primarily intended for use when the device has received a Download_Minidriver"
            "vendor-specific HCI command, placing it into download mode. A minidriver would"
            "typically be downloaded to RAM to facilitate reading or writing firmware and/or config"
            "data, and then the minidriver would receive Write_RAM commands to write to flash or"
            "EEPROM. When receiving configuration data to RAM, a minidriver is unnecessary and"
            "Write_RAM commands containing the configuration data are typically issued immediately"
            "after the Download_Minidriver command."
        PARAM "Address"
            uint32
            doc "The address to be written to. Addresses greater than or equal to 0xFF000000"
                "represent a virtual address in an EEPROM, with address 0xFF000000 corresponding to"
                "address zero in the EEPROM.";
        PARAM "Data"
            uint8[251] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "The data to write to the target address."
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("Data")
                min = 1;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Read_RAM" 0x04D
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "Reads data from the ARM's 32-bit linear address space or EEPROM. This command is"
            "primarily intended for use when the device has received a Download_Minidriver"
            "vendor-specific HCI command, placing it into download mode. A minidriver would"
            "typically have been downloaded to RAM to facilitate reading or writing firmware and/or"
            "config data, and then the minidriver would receive Read_RAM commands to read or verify"
            "the contents of its flash or EEPROM."
        PARAM "Address"
            uint32
            doc "The address to be read from.  Addresses greater than or equal to 0xFF000000"
                "represent a virtual address in an EEPROM, with address 0xFF000000 corresponding to"
                "address zero in the EEPROM. Reads from the EEPROM are limited to 32 bytes when in"
                "Bluetooth mode (when a Download_Minidriver vendor-specific HCI command has not"
                "been issued to the device).";
        PARAM "Length"
            uint8
            doc "The length of data to be read"
            max = 251;

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Data"
            uint8[251] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "The data which was read from the requested address."
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("Data")
                min = 1;
    }

    COMMAND "Launch_RAM" 0x04E
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "Jumps into the target address in thumb mode, typically a minidriver entry point, or"
            "in the case of an 0xFFFFFFFF target address, an implied Bluetooth mode reentry vector"
            "with acceptance of runtime RAM configuration data. This command is primarily intended"
            "to vector from firmware in download mode (having received a Download_Minidriver"
            "vendor-specific HCI command) into a minidriver which has just been received, to"
            "reset the device by jumping to the reset vector when the minidriver is no longer"
            "needed, or in the case of an 0xFFFFFFFF target address, to transition from download"
            "mode back to bluetooth mode with acceptance of configuration data which was downloaded"
            "by Write_RAM vendor-specific HCI commands."
        PARAM "Address"
            uint32
            doc "The address to be written to. A value of 0xFFFFFFFF indicates that a prior series"
                "of Write_RAM HCI commands contained a runtime RAM configuration data image, and"
                "that the firmware should reboot into Bluetooth mode, using that configuration"
                "data.";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Install_Patches" 0x04F
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2045"=1
        doc "Installed patches. Typically, patches are built with the autogen system and"
            "subsequently converted to an HCI-protocol download script. Most patches are"
            "implemented with a replacement instructions window which vectors to a block of code in"
            "RAM. That code will have been downloaded using Write_RAM vendor-specific HCI commands."
            "This command is intended for use in Bluetooth mode (when no Download_Minidriver"
            "command has been issued) for installing a dynamically loaded set of patches while"
            "preserving the effects of another set of configuration data. This is a very"
            "specialized use case and should not be confused with download of configuration data"
            "per se to RAM, which is referred to as runtime RAM configuration data. Provided that"
            "the Patch_Index parameters do not overlap, this command can be issued up to three"
            "times. To uninstall all patches installed previously using this command in preparation"
            "to receive a new set of patches, this command can be issued with the Number_Of_Patches"
            "parameter set to zero."
        PARAM "Number_Of_Patches"
            uint8
            doc "The number of patch entries to be installed."
            max = 19;

        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Patch_Index[0]"
            uint8
            doc "The hardware patch index to be installed."
            present_if ("Number_Of_Patches" > 0);
        PARAM "Break_Out_Block_Address[0]"
            uint32
            doc "The address of the replacement instructions window."
            present_if ("Number_Of_Patches" > 0);
        PARAM "Replacement_Instructions[0]"
            uint8[8]
            doc "The instructions to be executed in place of the rom instructions at the break out"
                "block address."
            present_if ("Number_Of_Patches" > 0);

        # - Entry[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

            uint8
            present_if ("Number_Of_Patches" > 1);

    COMMAND "Set_Link_Quality_Threshold" 0x050
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1 ("Flash based systems only.")
        doc "When Link Quality value (which is retrievable via Get_Link_Quality)"
            "reaches below this threshold, a vendor specific event will be sent to"
            "the host with subcode equals 0x3. The event will be sent only once per"
            "each command received. The event structure looks like:<br>"
            "<br>"
            "First byte: VS Event code, 0xFF<br>"
            "Second byte: event length<br>"
            "Third byte: subcode, 0x3<br>"
            "Forth and fifth byte: connection handle<br>"
            "Sixth byte: BER value.<br>"
            "<br>"
            "This command is only supported by flash based systems."
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16
            doc "The connection handle for which to generate the link quality drops too low.";
        PARAM "Link_Quality_Threshold "
            uint8
            doc "The link quality threshold below which to send the event";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

                {72, "2474 MHz"},
                {73, "2475 MHz"},
                {74, "2476 MHz"},
                {75, "2477 MHz"},
                {76, "2478 MHz"},
                {77, "2479 MHz"},
                {78, "2480 MHz"},
                {0xF0, "Fixed pattern"}
            };
        PARAM "Modulation_Type"
            uint8
            doc "Sets the data pattern that is continuously received"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "0x00 8-bit pattern"},
                {0x02, "0xFF 8-bit pattern"},
                {0x03, "0xAA 8-bit pattern"},
                {0x09, "0xF0 8-bit pattern"},
                {0x04, "PRBS9 pattern"}
            }
            default = 0x04;
        PARAM "Logical_Channel"
            uint8
            doc "Sets the logical channel. Only ACL Basic is supported if the Frequency is set to"
                "Fixed pattern."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "ACL EDR"},
                {0x01, "ACL Basic"},
                {0x02, "eSCO EDR"},
                {0x03, "eSCO Basic"},
                {0x04, "SCO Basic"}
            }
            default = 0x01;
        PARAM "BB_Packet_Type"
            uint8
            doc "Sets the packet type. Only DH1 / 2-DH1 is supported if the Frequency is set to"
                "Fixed pattern."
            enum
            {
                {0x03, "DM1"},
                {0x04, "DH1 / 2-DH1"},
                {0x05, "HV1"},
                {0x06, "HV2 / 2-EV3"},
                {0x07, "HV3 / EV3 / 3-EV3"},
                {0x08, "DV / 3-DH1"},
                {0x09, "AUX1"},
                {0x0A, "DM3 / 2-DH3"},
                {0x0B, "DH3 / 3-DH3"},
                {0x0C, "EV4 / 2-EV5"},
                {0x0D, "EV5 / 3-EV5"},
                {0x0E, "DM5 / 2-DH5"},
                {0x0F, "DH5 / 3-DH5"}
            }
            default = 0x0F;
        PARAM "BB_Packet_Length"
            uint16
            doc "The length in bytes for the BB Packet type selected"
            note "Firmware will limit len to max for BB_Packet_Type";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Connectionless_Tester_Loopback_Test" 0x055
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "Connectionless transmit test to send Bluetooth packets"
        PARAM "Local_Device_BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc "BD_ADDR for this device";
                PARAM "LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            doc "The Logical Transport Address of the BT link."
            min = 1
            max = 7
                default = 7;
        PARAM "Number_Of_Tests"
            uint8
            doc "Number of tests."
            min = 1
            max = 28;

        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
        PARAM "Number_Packets[0]"
        uint32{31:22}
            doc "Number of packets to be sent for this test"
        min = 1;

        PARAM "Packet_Type[0]"
        uint32{21:18}
        doc "Packet Type"
        enum
        {
            {0x4, "DH1 / 2-DH1"},
            {0x8, "3-DH1"},
            {0xA, "2-DH3"},

    COMMAND "Enhanced Rx_Test" 0x056
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "Connectionless receive test for Bluetooth packets"
        PARAM "Remote_Device_BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc "BD_ADDR of the remote transmitting device";
        PARAM "Report_Period"
            uint16
            doc "The report period in milliseconds. If set to 0 the stats will not be sent "
                "until the command is issued with the period set to 0xFFFF"
            default = 1000
            note "milliseconds";
        PARAM "Frequency"
            uint8
            doc "When Hopping_Mode for the peer Tx_Test is Single frequency, sets the receive"
                "test frequency. When Hopping_Mode for the peer Tx_Test is Fixed pattern, the"
                "Frequency value for the corresponding Tx_Test should likewise be Fixed pattern."
                "The Fixed pattern hopping mode will cause the Rx_Test to attempt synchronization"
                "with a transmitter which is transmitting the fixed pattern."
            enum
            {
                {0,  "2402 MHz"},
                {1,  "2403 MHz"},
                {2,  "2404 MHz"},
                {3,  "2405 MHz"},
                {4,  "2406 MHz"},
                {5,  "2407 MHz"},
                {6,  "2408 MHz"},
                {7,  "2409 MHz"},
                {8,  "2410 MHz"},
                {9,  "2411 MHz"},
                {10, "2412 MHz"},
                {11, "2413 MHz"},
                {12, "2414 MHz"},
                {13, "2415 MHz"},
                {14, "2416 MHz"},
                {15, "2417 MHz"},
                {16, "2418 MHz"},
                {17, "2419 MHz"},
                {18, "2420 MHz"},
                {19, "2421 MHz"},
                {20, "2422 MHz"},
                {21, "2423 MHz"},
                {22, "2424 MHz"},
                {23, "2425 MHz"},
                {24, "2426 MHz"},
                {25, "2427 MHz"},
                {26, "2428 MHz"},
                {27, "2429 MHz"},
                {28, "2430 MHz"},
                {29, "2431 MHz"},
                {30, "2432 MHz"},
                {31, "2433 MHz"},
                {32, "2434 MHz"},
                {33, "2435 MHz"},
                {34, "2436 MHz"},
                {35, "2437 MHz"},
                {36, "2438 MHz"},
                {37, "2439 MHz"},
                {38, "2440 MHz"},
                {39, "2441 MHz"},
                {40, "2442 MHz"},
                {41, "2443 MHz"},
                {42, "2444 MHz"},
                {43, "2445 MHz"},
                {44, "2446 MHz"},
                {45, "2447 MHz"},
                {46, "2448 MHz"},
                {47, "2449 MHz"},
                {48, "2450 MHz"},
                {49, "2451 MHz"},
                {50, "2452 MHz"},

            enum

                {0x01, "0x00 8-bit pattern"},

                {0x03, "0xAA 8-bit pattern"},

                {0x04, "PRBS9 pattern"}

            default = 0x04;

                "Fixed pattern."

                {0x02, "eSCO EDR"},
                {0x03, "eSCO Basic"},
                {0x04, "SCO Basic"}
            }
            default = 0x01;

            uint8

                "Fixed pattern."

                {0x03, "DM1"},
                {0x04, "DH1 / 2-DH1"},
                {0x05, "HV1"},
                {0x06, "HV2 / 2-EV3"},
                {0x07, "HV3 / EV3 / 3-EV3"},
                {0x08, "DV / 3-DH1"},
                {0x09, "AUX1"},
                {0x0A, "DM3 / 2-DH3"},
                {0x0B, "DH3 / 3-DH3"},
                {0x0C, "EV4 / 2-EV5"},
                {0x0D, "EV5 / 3-EV5"},
                {0x0E, "DM5 / 2-DH5"},
                {0x0F, "DH5 / 3-DH5"}
            }
            default = 0x0F;
        PARAM "BB_Packet_Length"
            uint16
            doc "The length in bytes for the BB Packet type selected"
            note "Firmware will limit len to max for BB_Packet_Type";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "Write_High_Priority_Connection" 0x057

            max = 7

        PARAM "Pad_Config"
            uint32
            doc "This is a uint32 for pad configuration. Each pin uses one byte. Starts from LSB, they maps to In, Out, Sync and Clk."
                "In the byte, bit[0] is input/output enable, bit[1] is pullup enable, bit[2] is pulldown enable.<br>"
                "PCM = 0x09090909; i.e. all pins are input, no pull.<br>"
                "I2S Master = 0x08080808; i.e. all pins are output, no pull.<br>"
                "I2S Slave = 0x09090809;i.e. DO = output, WS = input, CLK=input, no pull.";
        CC_PARAM "Status"

            doc "Types of diagnostic commmands."
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "Input Simulation"},
                {0x02, "Set Application Trace Level"},
                {0x06, "GPIO Test"},
                {0x08, "SVT Test"},
                {0x0E, "Assert Operations"},
                {0x12, "LED Log"},
                {0x19, "LED Test"},
                            {0x20, "Mic Test"}
            }
            enabled_if ("Raw command" = 0);

            uint8
            doc "LED ID"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Led 0"},
                {0x01, "Led 1"}
            }
            enabled_if (("Raw command" = 0) and ("Diagnostic_Command" = 0x19));

            {
                {0x00, "0"},

                {0x06, "6"},

                {0x00, "Button(s) Released"},

    COMMAND "Transport_Suspend" 0x07A
    {
        devs "*"=1
            doc "This command starts the dual stack host switching operation"
        PARAM "Tick"

            doc     "The number of slots device will wait before it flows"
