COMMAND "Factory_Cal_Read_Table" 0x11B
        {
       devs "*"=1
      doc "Reads the calibration trim constants table, which can be the table sent to the chip by host or the table at current temperature."
    PARAM "TableType"
            uint8
            doc         "Table Type"
            enum {
                {0x00, "Current power table in use (TCA Adjusted)"},
                {0x01, "Host power table"},
                {0x02, "RSSI Cal table"},
                {0x03, "RSSI debug Cal table"},
                {0x04, "Agc Bank Init Val Bt Pri table"},
                {0x10, "Current CC1 power table"},
                {0x11, "Host CC1 power table"},
                {0x30, "Current Tx_FrontEnd power table"},
                {0x31, "Host Tx_FrontEnd power table"},
                {0x50, "MSF FILE Readback"}
        }
        default = 0;
    PARAM "ePA"
            uint8
            doc         "ePA or iPA table"
        present_if (("TableType" > 0x2F) and ("TableType" < 0x50))
            min = 0
            max = 1
            default = 0;
    PARAM "Antenna"
            uint8
            doc         "Select Antenna"
        present_if (("TableType" > 0x2F ) and ("TableType" < 0x50))
            min = 0
            max = 3
            default = 0;
    PARAM "Country Code"
            uint8
            doc         "Select Country Code"
        present_if (("TableType" > 0x2F ) and ("TableType" < 0x50))
            min = 0
            max = 255   # max of 255 needed to support read back PF cal table
            default = 0;
    PARAM "Power Cap"
            uint8
            doc         "Select Power CAP"
        present_if (("TableType" > 0x2F ) and ("TableType" < 0x50))
            min = 0
            max = 1
            default = 0;
    PARAM "Transfer Type"
            uint8
            doc         "Select Transfer Type"
        present_if ("TableType" = 0x50 )
            min = 1
            max = 2
            default = 1;
    PARAM "Chunk Number"
            uint16
            doc         "Select Chunk Number"
        present_if ("TableType" = 0x50 )
            min = 0
            max = 20
            default = 0;
    CC_PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8
        doc "Command complete status";

    CC_PARAM "Choice"
        uint8
        doc "choice";

    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 0
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "CurrentTssiPowerTrimTable"
        uint8[42]
        doc "CurrentTssiPowerTrimTable"
        present_if ("Choice" = 0);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 1
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "TssiPowerTrimTable"
        uint8[20]
        doc "TssiPowerTrimTable"
        present_if ("Choice" = 1);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 2
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "RssiCalTable"
        uint8[206]
        doc "RssiCalTable"
        present_if ("Choice" = 2);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 3
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "DebugRssiCalTable"
        uint8[206]
        doc "DebugRssiCalTable"
        present_if ("Choice" = 3);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 4
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "AgcBankInitValPriTable"
        uint8[192]
        doc "AgcBankInitValPriTable"
        present_if ("Choice" = 4);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 0x10
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "CurrentCC1PowerTable"
        uint8[20]
        doc "Current CC1 power table"
        present_if ("Choice" = 16);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 0x11
    # ...............................
    CC_PARAM "HostCC1PowerTrimTable"
        uint8[20]
        doc "Host CC1 power table"
        present_if ("Choice" = 17);
    # ...............................

    # ...............................

        doc "Current power table"
        present_if ("Choice" = 0x30);
    # ...............................
    #  Choice = 0x31
    # ...............................

   #      UINT8  step;
   #      UINT8  frequency // channel;

   #      UINT8  mode;
   #   } RX_RSSI_TEST_INPUT;

COMMAND "Factory_Cal_RxRssi_Test" 0x11D
        {
       devs "*"=1, "BCM43342A0"=1
       doc "Parameters input for Factory_Cal_RxRssi_Test"

            uint8
           doc "step {1.2.3.4}"
           min = 1
           max = 4
           default = 1;
       PARAM "Channel"
            uint8
           doc  "BT channel number 0-78. channel = freq - 2402"
            min = 0
            max = 78
           default = 24;
    PARAM "Power"
            int8
           doc "Rx power level -100 dBm to 0 dBm"
           min =-100
           max = 0
           default = -60;
       PARAM "Gain_Range"
            uint8
           doc "gainRange {0 to 4}"
            min = 0
           max = 4
            default = 0;
    PARAM "Mode"
            uint8
           doc "Debugging parameter for any extra calibration mode"
            min = 0
            max = 7
            default = 0;

    errorcode8
    doc "Command complete status";

           doc "cal_status";

    COMMAND "LE_Meta2_VSC" 0x123
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2049"=1, "BCM2076"=1, "BCM20702"=1, "BCM20730"=1, "BCM4330"=1
        doc "This command is wrapper for Broadcom LE Vendor Specific Commands."
        PARAM "HCI_LE_ext_opcode"
            uint8
            doc "This is the real extension opcode for each command."
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "Write LE2 Config Flags"},
                {0x02, "Read LE2 Config Flags"},
                {0x03, "Write LE Extended Packet Length Config"},
                {0x04, "Read LE Extended Packet Length Config"}
            }
            default = 0x1;

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # HCI_LE_ext_opcode = 0x01, "Write_LE2_Config_Flags"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Write_LE2_Config_Flags"
            uint8
            doc     "Write LE2 Config Flags."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "LE2 ADV Enable"},
                {0x00000002, "LE2 Scan Enable"},
                {0x00000004, "LE2 Connection Enable"}
            }
            default = 0x0
            present_if ("HCI_LE_ext_opcode" = 0x01);

        PARAM "Write_LE2_Access_Address1"
            uint32
            doc     "Write LE2 Test mode Access Code1"
            default = 0x71764129
            present_if ("HCI_LE_ext_opcode" = 0x01);

        PARAM "Write_LE2_Access_Address2"
            uint32
            doc     "Write LE2 Test mode Access Code2"
            default = 0x71764129
            present_if ("HCI_LE_ext_opcode" = 0x01);

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # HCI_LE_ext_opcode = 0x03, "Write LE Extended Packet Length Config"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Write_LE_Extended_Packet_Length_Mode"
            uint8
            doc     "Write LE extended Packet Length Mode Configuration."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Use Packet Header bit [4:0], support max 31 bytes, spec 4.0 standard (includes 4 bytes encryption MIC)"},
                {0x01, "Use Packet Header bit [6:5], support max 127 bytes, default mode (includes 4 bytes encryption MIC)"},
                {0x02, "Use Packet Header bit 7, 5, support max 127 bytes (includes 4 bytes encryption MIC)"},
                {0x03, "Use Packet Header bit [7:0], support max 255 bytes (includes 4 bytes encryption MIC)"}
            }
            default = 0x1
            present_if ("HCI_LE_ext_opcode" = 0x03);

        PARAM "Write_LE_Max_Packet_Length"
            uint8
            doc     "Write maximum LE packet length. 255 is for unencrypted data, 251 is for encrypted data packet length"
            default = 251
            max = 255
            present_if ("HCI_LE_ext_opcode" = 0x03);

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Return parameter for all LE Meta VSC
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8
            doc "Return status";

        CC_PARAM "Event_LE_ext_Opcode"
            uint8
            doc "Return real extension opcode for this command."
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "Write LE2 Config Flags"},
                {0x02, "Read LE2 Config Flags"},
                {0x03, "Write LE Extended Packet Length Config"},
                {0x04, "Read LE Extended Packet Length Config"},
                {0x05, "Override LLT connection parameters"}
            };

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Command Complete Event parameters for Event_LE_ext_Opcode 0x2
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        CC_PARAM "LE2_Config_Flags"
            uint8
            doc "Return LE2 Config Flags."
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "LE2 ADV Enable"},
                {0x00000002, "LE2 Scan Enable"},
                {0x00000004, "LE2 Connection Enable"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_LE_ext_Opcode" = 0x02);

        CC_PARAM "LE2_Access_Address1"
            uint32
            doc "LE2 Access Address1"
            present_if ("Event_LE_ext_Opcode" = 0x02);

        CC_PARAM "LE2_Access_Address2"
            uint32
            doc "LE2 Access Address2"
            present_if ("Event_LE_ext_Opcode" = 0x02);

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Command Complete Event parameters for "Read LE Extended Packet Length Config" 0x4
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        CC_PARAM "Read_LE_Extended_Packet_Length_Mode"
            uint8
            doc "Return LE extended Packet Length Mode Configuration."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Use Packet Header bit [4:0], support max 31 bytes, spec 4.0 standard (includes 4 bytes encryption MIC)"},
                {0x01, "Use Packet Header bit [6:5], support max 127 bytes default mode, (includes 4 bytes encryption MIC)"},
                {0x02, "Use Packet Header bit 7, 5, support max 127 bytes (include 4 bytes encryption MIC)"},
                {0x03, "Use Packet Header bit [7:0], support max 255 bytes (include 4 bytes encryption MIC)"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_LE_ext_Opcode" = 0x04);

        CC_PARAM "Read_LE_Max_Packet_Length"
            uint8
            doc "Return LE maximum Packet Length setting."
            present_if ("Event_LE_ext_Opcode" = 0x04);
    }

    COMMAND "Read Retransmission Status" 0x12A
    {
        devs    "*"=1
        doc "This command reads back the Retransmission Counter"
        PARAM "Reset_Counter"
            uint8
            doc     "Reset_Counter"
            bitmap

            uint32
            doc "The PRU HAL alert value"
            # See the A4WP Specification for alert bit positions
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "Reserved"},
                {0x00000002, "Over temperature protection triggered by sensor 1"},
                {0x00000004, "Over temperature protection triggered by sensor 2"},
                {0x00000008, "Over temperature recovery detected by sensor 1"},
                {0x00000010, "Over temperature recovery detected by sensor 2"},
                {0x00000020, "NTC hot"},
                {0x00000040, "NTC cold"},
                {0x00000080, "Over current"},
                {0x00000100, "Wired Charging detected. VBUS_HIGH_LOW"},
                {0x00000200, "Voltage too low, UVLO_Detect"},
                {0x00000400, "Watch dog triggered., WDT_EXP"},
                {0x00000800, "Detuning overvoltage protection, VRECT_PRE_OVP"},
                {0x00001000, "Over Voltage, VRECT_OVP"},
                {0x00010000, "WPT REG ON to OFF"},
                {0x00020000, "WPT REG OFF to ON"},
                {0x00040000, "BT REG ON to OFF"},
                {0x00080000, "BT REG OFF to ON"},
                {0x00100000, "Shutdown triggered"},
                {0x00200000, "Charge Complete"}

    COMMAND "TVWAKE_Command" 0x137
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1 ("Only supported when BTW UHE model enabled")
        doc "TVWAKE Command"
        PARAM "command"
            uint8
            doc "Command Subopcode"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Reset"},
                {0x01, "Add Device"},
                {0x02, "Remove Device"}
            }
            default = 0x01;
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc "BdAddr of the device for which the command is issued"
            present_if (    ("command" = 0x01)
                         or ("command" = 0x02)
                       );
        PARAM "Link_Key"
            uint8[16] little_endian
            doc "The link key for the pairing with this device"
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);
        PARAM "Class_of_Device"
            uint24
            doc "class of device for the device being added"
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);
        PARAM "Num_Profiles"
            uint8
            doc "Number of profiles for which wake data is available"
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);
        # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;
        PARAM "Profile_ID[0]"
            uint8
            doc "Profile ID"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "HID"}
            }
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);

            uint8
            doc "Number of Wake Records"
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);

        # - Record[0][0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;
        PARAM "Len_0[0]"
            uint8
            doc "Length of the wake record"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = ByteArrayValidLength("Data_0[0]")
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);
        PARAM "Data_0[0]"
            uint8[10] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "wake record"
            valid_length = "Len_0[0]"
            present_if ("command" = 0x01);

        # - Record[0][1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;

            uint8
            doc "Length of the wake record"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = ByteArrayValidLength("Data_0[1]")

                        and ("Num_Records[0]" > 1)
                       );

            valid_length = "Len_0[1]"

                        and ("Num_Records[0]" > 1)
                       );

        # - Record[0][2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;

            uint8
            doc "Length of the wake record"

            encode_value = ByteArrayValidLength("Data_0[2]")

                        and ("Num_Records[0]" > 2)

            doc "wake record"
            valid_length = "Len_0[2]"
            present_if (    ("command" = 0x01)
                        and ("Num_Records[0]" > 2)
                       );

        # - Record[0][3] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;

            uint8
            doc "Length of the wake record"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = ByteArrayValidLength("Data_0[3]")

    COMMAND "LE_ADV_BRCM_Packet_Content_Filter" 0x157
    {
        devs "BCM4335"=1
        doc "This command handles LE ADV BRCM Packet Content Filter setting."
        PARAM "Sub_Command"
            uint8
            doc "Sub_Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LE ADV BRCM Packet Content Filter Enable"},
                {0x01, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Set Filtering Parameters"},
                {0x02, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Broadcaster Address"},
                {0x03, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Service UUID"},
                {0x04, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Service Solicitation UUID"},
                {0x05, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Local Name"},
                {0x06, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Manufacturer Data"},
                {0x07, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Service Data"}
            };

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Enable"
            bool8
            doc     "Enable/disable Adv Content Filter Selection"
            default = 0x0
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x00);

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action"
            uint8
            doc     "Add/Delete/Clear Adv Content Filter"
                    "or Add/Delete/Clear an item (e.g. Broadcaster Address or UUID) to/from the list"
            enum
            {
                {0, "Add"},
                {1, "Delete"},
                {2, "Clear"}
            }
            default = 0x0
            present_if (("Sub_Command" > 0x00) and ("Sub_Command" < 0x08));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Filter_Index"
            uint8
            doc     "Filter Index"
            default = 0x0
            max = 31
            present_if ((("Sub_Command" = 1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 2)) or
            (("Sub_Command" > 0x01) and ("Sub_Command" < 0x08) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 3)));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Feature_Selection"
            uint16
            doc     "Enable/Disable Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter features"
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Broadcast Address"},
                {0x00000002, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service Data Change"},
                {0x00000004, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service UUID"},
                {0x00000008, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service Solicitation UUID"},
                {0x00000010, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Local Name"},
                {0x00000020, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Manufacturer Data"},
                {0x00000040, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service Data"}
            }
            default = 0x0
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Feature_Logical_Type (check: AND, uncheck: OR)"
            uint16
            doc     "Set Logical Type of Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter features"
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Broadcast Address"},
                {0x00000002, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service Data Change"},
                {0x00000004, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service UUID"},
                {0x00000008, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service Solicitation UUID"},
                {0x00000010, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Local Name"},
                {0x00000020, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Manufacturer Data"},
                {0x00000040, "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Service Data"}
            }
            default = 0x0
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Filter_Logical_Type"
            uint8
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Filter Logical operation type"
            enum
            {
                {0, "OR"},
                {1, "AND"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_RSSI_High_Threshold (in dBm)"
            int8
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF RSSI High Threshold"
            default = -128
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Delivery_Mode"
            uint8
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Delivery Mode"
            enum
            {
                {0, "Immediate"},
                {1, "On_found"},
                {2, "Batched"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Onfound_Timeout (in millisecond)"
            uint16
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Onfound Timeout"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Delivery_Mode" = 1));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Onfound_Timeout_Cnt"
            uint8
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Onfound Timeout Cnt"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Delivery_Mode" = 1));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_RSSI_Low_Threshold (in dBm)"
            int8
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF RSSI Low Threshold"
            default = -128
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Delivery_Mode" = 1));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Onlost_Timeout (in millisecond)"
            uint16
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Onlost Timeout"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Delivery_Mode" = 1));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Num_Of_Tracking_Entries)"
            uint16
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Num of TackingEntries"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" = 0) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Delivery_Mode" = 1));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Broadcaster_Address"
            bdaddr
            doc     "Broadcaster address to add to the list"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x2) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 2));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Broadcaster_Address_Type"
            uint8
            doc     "Broadcaster address type (NA means the setting applies to ALL addresses)"
            enum
            {
                {0, "Public Address"},
                {1, "Random Address"},
                {2, "NA"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x2) and ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 2));

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_UUID"
            uint8[16] omit_pad_bytes
            doc     "UUID"
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_UUID")
            min = 2
            present_if ( (("Sub_Command" = 0x3) or
                      ("Sub_Command" = 0x4)) and
                      ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 2) );

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_UUID_MASK"
            uint8[16] omit_pad_bytes
            doc     "UUID mask"
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_UUID_MASK")
            min = 2
            present_if ( (("Sub_Command" = 0x3) or
                      ("Sub_Command" = 0x4)) and
                      ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 1) );

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_LocName_or_ManData_or_SerData"
            uint8[29] omit_pad_bytes
            doc     "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF Local Name or Manufacturer Data or Service Data"
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_LocName_or_ManData_or_SerData")
            min = 0
            present_if ( (("Sub_Command" = 0x5) or
                     ("Sub_Command" = 0x6)or
                     ("Sub_Command" = 0x7)) and
                     ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 2) );

        PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_ManData_or_SerData_MASK"
            uint8[29] omit_pad_bytes
            doc     "ManData or SerData mask"
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_ManData_or_SerData_MASK")
            min = 0
            present_if ( ( ("Sub_Command" = 0x6)or
                     ("Sub_Command" = 0x7)) and
                     ("LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action" < 1) );

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8
            doc "Return status";

        CC_PARAM "Sub_Command"
            uint8
            doc "Sub_Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LE ADV BRCM Packet Content Filter Enable"},
                {0x01, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Set Filtering Parameters"},
                {0x02, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Broadcaster Address"},
                {0x03, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Service UUID"},
                {0x04, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Service Solicitation UUID"},
                {0x05, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Local Name"},
                {0x06, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Manufacturer Data"},
                {0x07, "LE Adv BRCM Packet Content Filter Service Data"}
            };

        CC_PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Enable"
            bool8
            doc     "Enable/disable Adv Content Filter Selection"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x00);

        CC_PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_Action"
            uint8
            doc "Add/Delete/Clear Adv Content Filter"
                "or Add/Delete/Clear an item (e.g. Broadcaster Address or UUID) to/from the list"
            enum
            {
                {0, "Add or Write"},
                {1, "Delete or Read"},
                {2, "Clear"}
            }
            present_if (("Sub_Command" > 0x00) and ("Sub_Command" < 0x08));

        CC_PARAM "LE_ADV_BRCM_PCF_AvailableSpaces"
            uint8
            doc "Number of free spaces available in the list"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" > 0x00) and ("Sub_Command" < 0x08));
    }

    COMMAND "LE_RPA_Offload" 0x155
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2049"=1, "BCM2076"=1, "BCM20702"=1, "BCM20730"=1, "BCM4330"=1
        doc "This command is wrapper for LE RPA Offload (IRK RPA resolution) Vendor Specific Commands."
        PARAM "RPA_offload_opcode"
            uint8
            doc "This is the real extension opcode for each command."
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LE Enable Customer Specific Features"},
                {0x02, "LE Add IRK to the List"},
                {0x03, "LE Remove IRK from the List"},
                {0x04, "LE Clear IRK List"},
                {0x05, "LE Read IRK List Entry"}
            }
            default = 0x1;

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # RPA_offload_opcode = 0x01, "LE_Enable_CS_Features"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Enable customer specific feature set"
            uint8
            doc     "Enable/Disable LE PRA offloading feature."
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Disable offloaded RPA feature"},
                {0x1, "Enable offloaded RPA feature"}
            }
            default = 0x1
            present_if ("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x01);

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # RPA_offload_opcode = 0x02, "LE Add IRK to the List"
        # RPA_offload_opcode = 0x03, "LE Remove IRK from the List"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "LE_IRK"
            uint8[16]
            doc     "Add IRK to the List."
            present_if ("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x02);

        PARAM "Address_Type"
            uint8
            doc     "Address Type for IRK associated Device Address."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"}
            }
            present_if (("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x02) or ("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x03));

        PARAM "LE_Device_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc     "The device address associated to the IRK that add to or remove from the list."
            present_if (("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x02) or ("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x03));

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # RPA_offload_opcode = 0x04, "LE Clear IRK List"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # no PARAM for command

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # RPA_offload_opcode = 0x05, "LE Read IRK List Entry"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "LE_IRK_List_Entry_Index"
            uint8
            doc     "Read a IRK list entry by its index."
            present_if ("RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x05);

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Return parameter for all LE Meta VSC
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8
            doc "Return status";

        CC_PARAM "Event_RPA_offload_opcode"
            uint8
            doc "Return real extension opcode for this command."
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LE Enable Customer Specific Features"},
                {0x02, "LE Add IRK to the List"},
                {0x03, "LE Remove IRK from the List"},
                {0x04, "LE Clear IRK List"},
                {0x05, "LE Read IRK List Entry"}
            };
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Command Complete Event parameters for Event_RPA_offload_opcode 0x2 to 0x4
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        CC_PARAM "LE_IrkList_AvailableSpaces"
            uint8
            doc "Return number of available entries in the IRK list."
            present_if (("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" > 0x01) and ("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" < 0x05));

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Event_RPA_offload_opcode = 0x05, "LE Read IRK List Entry"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        CC_PARAM "LE_IRK_List_Entry_Index"
            uint8
            doc     "Read a IRK list entry by its index."
            present_if ("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x05);

        CC_PARAM "LE_IRK"
            uint8[16]
            doc     "Add IRK to the List or Remove IRK from the list."
            present_if ("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x05);

        CC_PARAM "Address_Type"
            uint8
            doc     "Address Type for the Device Address."
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x05);

        CC_PARAM "LE_Device_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc     "The device address (Public or Random, but not resolvable private address)"
                    "assoicated to the IRK that add to the list."
            present_if ("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x05);

        CC_PARAM "LE_Resolved_Private_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc     "The current resolved Resolvable Private address for this IRK"
            present_if ("Event_RPA_offload_opcode" = 0x05);
    }

    COMMAND "LE_Batch_Scan_Command" 0x156
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "This command controls the operation of Google LE Batch Scan feature."
        PARAM "Batch_Scan_Opcode"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan Opcode"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "Enable_Customer_Specific_Feature"},
                {0x02, "Set_Batch_Scan_Storage_Parameters"},
                {0x03, "Set_Batch_Scan_Parameters"},
                {0x04, "Read_Batch_Scan_Results"}
            };

        ##############  Opcode 0x01 = Enable_Customer_Specific_Feature ##############
        PARAM "Enable_Customer_Specific_Feature"
            uint8
            doc "Enable Batch Scan feature flag"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Disable Batch Scan Feature"},
                {0x01, "Enable Batch Scan Feature"}
            }
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x1);

        ##############  Opcode 0x02 = Set_Batch_Scan_Storage_Parameters ##############
        PARAM "Batch_Scan_Full_Max"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan max storage space % for full style batching"
            min = 0
            max = 100
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x2);

        PARAM "Batch_Scan_Truncated_Max"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan max storage space % for truncated style batching"
            min = 0
            max = 100
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x2);

        PARAM "Batch_Scan_Notify_Threshold"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan total storage usage percentage threshold to send notification"
            min = 0
            max = 100
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x2);

        ##############  Opcode 0x03 = Set_Batch_Scan_Parameters ##############
        PARAM "Batch_Scan_Mode"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan Mode"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Batch Scan Disabled"},
                {0x01, "Truncated Mode Enabled"},
                {0x02, "Full Mode Enabled"},
                {0x03, "Truncated And Full Mode Enabled"}
            }
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x3);

        PARAM "Duty_Cycle_Scan_Window"
            uint32
            doc "Scan window (in slots) to use for Batch Scan"
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x3);

        PARAM "Duty_Cycle_Scan_Interval"
            uint32
            doc "Scan window (in slots) to use for Batch Scan"
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x3);

        PARAM "Own_Address_Type"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan own address type"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"}
            }
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x3);

        PARAM "Batch_Scan_Discard_Rule"
            uint8
            doc "Batch Scan Replacement method"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Discard Oldest"},
                {0x01, "Discard Lowest RSSI"}
            }
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x3);

        ##############  Opcode 0x04 = Read_Batch_Scan_Results ##############

            uint8
            doc "Command to read Batch Scan records"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "Truncated Mode"},
                {0x02, "Full Mode"}
            }
            present_if ("Batch_Scan_Opcode" = 0x4);

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Batch_Scan_Opcode"

            doc "Batch Scan Opcode repeated to host"

            uint8
            doc "Action: 0 for ADD and 1 for REMOVE"

            {
                {0x00, "Add Advertiser Entry"},
                {0x01, "Delete Advertiser Entry"}
            };

                {0x01, "Random Address"}
            };

            bdaddr
            doc "Advertiser address";

            uint8
            doc "Timeout for detecting lost advertiser"
                min = 0
                max = 127

    COMMAND "LE_Extended_Set_Scan_Parameters" 0x15A
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "This command sets extended scan parameters for Android"
        PARAM "LE_Scan_Type"
            uint8
            doc "LE Scan Type"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Passive Scanning"},
                {0x01, "Active Scanning"}
            }
            default = 0;
        PARAM "LE_Scan_Interval"
            uint32
            doc "LE Scan Interval"
            min = 0x0004
            max = 0xFFFFFF
            default = 0x10
            note "in slots. Range: 2.5ms to 10485.75s";
        PARAM "LE_Scan_Window"
            uint32
            doc "LE Scan Window"
            min = 0x0004
            max = 0xFFFF
            default = 0x10
            note "in slots. Range: 2.5ms to 40.95s";
        PARAM "Own_Address_Type"
            uint8
            doc "Own Address Type"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"},
                {0x02, "RPA or Public Address"},
                {0x03, "RPA or Random Address"}
            };
        PARAM "Scanning_Filter_Policy"
            uint8
            doc "LE Scan Filter Policy"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Accept all advertisement packets except Directed Adv not directed to you"},
                {0x01, "Ignore advertisement packets not in the White List Only"},
                {0x02, "Accept all undirected, all directed whose initA is RPA, and all directed being addressed to this device"},
                {0x03, "Accept all undirected listed in WL, all directed whose initA is RPA, and all directed being addressed to this device"}
                }
            default = 0x0;
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "DF_META_VSC" 0x166
    {   devs "*"=1
        doc "This command is wrapper for all the DF Unicast Vendor Specific Commands."

        PARAM "Cmd_DF_SubCode"
            uint8
            doc "This is the sub-code for each command."
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LE_Set_CO_Directionality_Xmit_Parameters"},
                {0x02, "LE_Set_CO_Directionality_Recv_Parameters"},
                {0x03, "LE_Set_CO_Directionality_Enable"},
                {0x04, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Xmit_Parameter"},
                {0x05, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Recv_Parameter"},
                {0x06, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Enable"},
                {0x07, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Add_To_White_List"},
                {0x08, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Remove_From_White_List"},
                {0x09, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Clear_White_List"},
                {0x0A, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Set_Ad_Type_Filter"},
                {0x0B, "LE_Accept_CL_Sync_Directionality_Reply"},
                {0x0C, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Recv_Remove_Parameter"},
                {0x0D, "LE_Set_CL_Directionality_Recv_Clear_Parameter"},
                {0x0E, "DF_Debug_IQ_Sample_Dump"},
                {0x0F, "DF_Configure_Sample_Timing_Registers"},
                {0x10, "DF Debug Request"}
            }
            default = 0x1;

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Cmd_DF_SubCode = 0x01, "This subcode writes Directionality Parameters"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Connection handle"
            connhandle16
            doc "Connection Handle"
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x01) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x03) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x0B));

        PARAM "Interval"
            uint16
            doc "Interval for sending DF_REQ or DF_RSP packets. 0xFFFFFFFF for one-time only"
            note "ms"
            default = 100
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x01) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02));

        PARAM "AntennaPatternLength"
            uint8
            doc "Antenna Switch Pattern"
            max = 0x10
            default = 16
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x01) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x04) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "AntennaPattern[]"
            uint8[16] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Antenna Pattern"
            valid_length = "AntennaPatternLength"
            min = 0
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x01) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x04) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "slopeCalcOffset[]"
            uint8[16] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Slope Calculation offset corresponding to Antenna"
            valid_length = "AntennaPatternLength"
            min = 0
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "SlopeCalcLength"
            uint8
            doc "Slope Calculation Length"
            max = 0x0C
            default = 0
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "SampleWidth"
            uint8
            doc "Number of DFE bits per antenna to transmit/receive"
            default = 4
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x01) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x04) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "SampleSize"
            uint8
            doc "Number of samples in DFE"
            min = 1
            max = 80
            default = 16
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x01) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x04) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "I&Q or MagAndPhase"
            uint8
            doc "I&Q or Mag and Phase to returned in Directionality Report Event"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "I&Q Samples in Reports"},
                {0x01, "Magnitude and Phase in Reports"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "ResultBitAccuracy"
            uint8
            doc "Result bit width of sample returned in returned in Directionality Report Event"
            default = 0x08
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "ReportsPerEvent"
            uint8
            doc "Number of reports/sample to be cached by FW before sending to host"
            default = 4
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x02) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x05));

        PARAM "Enable"
            uint8
            doc "0=Disable, 1=Enable"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Disable"},
                {0x01, "Enable"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x03) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x06) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x10));

        PARAM "UseWhiteList"
            uint8
            doc "0 - Do not use WL, 1 - Use WL"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Do not Use WL"},
                {0x01, "Use WL"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x06);

        PARAM "UseAdTypeFilter"
            uint8
            doc "0 - Do not use AD Filter, 1 - Use AD Filter"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Do not Use AD Filter"},
                {0x01, "Use AD Filter"}
            }
            default = 0
            present_if ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x06);

        PARAM "Address Type"
            uint8
            doc "Address type."
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x07) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x08));

        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc "Device address."
            present_if (("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x07) or ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x08));

        PARAM "AdTypeFilterLength"
            uint8
            doc "AD Type Filter Length"
            default = 0
            present_if ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x0A);

        PARAM "AdTypeFilter"
            uint8[255] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "AD Type Filter"
            valid_length = "AdTypeFilterLength"
            min = 0
            present_if ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x0A);

        PARAM "AcceptOrDecline"
            uint8
            doc "0=Decline, 1=Accept"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Decline"},
                {0x01, "Accept"}
            }
            default = 1
            present_if ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x0B);

        PARAM "CL_Recv_Param_Handle"
            uint16
            doc "Handle used to identify CL receive parameter block"
            min = 0x0000
            max = 0x0320
            default = 0

            doc "0=OFF, 1=Single Report, 2=Continuous Reports"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Turn Off"},
                {0x01, "Single Report Mode"},

            default = 0

            {
                {0x00, "Absolute"},
                {0x01, "Enable_Offset"}
            }
            default = 0

            max = 0x3FF

            min = 0
            max = 0xFF
            default = 0
            present_if ("Cmd_DF_SubCode" = 0x0F);

        PARAM "aoaEst_04:MemWrStartOffset_value[7:0]"
            uint16{7:0}
            doc "(6~1MHz) dedicated delay for memory dumping"

            max = 0xFF

            uint16
            doc "CL Receive Parameter handle for allocated block"

                {0x01, "Read"}
            };

            uint8

            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Inactive"},

            }
            present_if ("Action" = 0x01);

        COMMAND "Microsoft Commands" 0x178
        {
            devs "*"=1
            doc "This VSC combines all Microsoft specific commands. <br>The format is CommandID followed by variable parameters based on the command."
            PARAM "Command_Type"
                uint8
                doc " Command ID"
                enum
                {
                    {0x0, "MSFT Read Supported Features"},
                    {0x1, "MSFT Monitor RSSI"},
                    {0x2, "MSFT Cancel Monitor RSSI"},
                    {0x3, "MSFT LE Monitor Advertisement"},
                    {0x4, "MSFT LE Cancel Monitor Advertisement"},
                    {0x5, "MSFT LE Set Advertisemnt Filter Enable"},
                    {0x6, "MSFT Read Absolut RSSI"}
                };
            PARAM "Connection_Handle"
                connhandle16
                doc         "The Handle for the connection for which the RSSI has to be monitored"
                default = 0xFF
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x1) or ("Command_Type" = 0x2) or ("Command_Type" = 0x6));

            PARAM "RSSI_Threshold_High"
                int8
                doc         "RSSI Threshold High"
                min = -128
                max = 127
                default = 0
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x1) or ("Command_Type" = 0x3));

            PARAM "RSSI_Threshold_Low"
                int8
                doc         "RSSI Threshold Low"
                min = -128
                max = 127
                default = 0
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x1) or ("Command_Type" = 0x3));

            PARAM "RSSI_Threshold_Low_Time_Interval"
                uint8
                doc         "RSSI Threshold Low Time Interval (0x00 to 0x3C seconds)"
                min = 0x00
                max = 0x3C
                default = 0
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x1) or ("Command_Type" = 0x3));

            PARAM "RSSI_Sampling_Period"
                uint8
                doc         "RSSI Sampling Period (0x00 to 0xFF time in uits of 100 ms)"
                min = 0x00
                max = 0xFF
                default = 0
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x1) or ("Command_Type" = 0x3));

            PARAM "Condition_Type"
                uint8
                doc "Condition Type"
                enum {
                    {0x01, "The condition specified is a patten that has to be matched on the advertisement"},
                    {0x02, "The condition specified contains a UUID Type and a UUID"},
                    {0x03, "The condition specified is the resolution of an IRK"},
                    {0x04, "The condition specified is a Bluetooth address"}
                }
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x3);

            PARAM "Number_of_Patterns"
                uint8
                doc "The number of patterns specified within the Pattern parameter"
                min = 0x01
                max = 0x10
                default = 1
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ("Condition_Type" = 0x01));

            PARAM "Pattern_Data"
        uint8[240]
                doc "Pattern data"
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ("Condition_Type" = 0x01));

            PARAM "UUID_Type"
                uint8
                doc "UUID Type"
                enum {
                    {0x01, "The UUID is a 16-bit service"},
                    {0x02, "The UUID is a 32-bit service"},
                    {0x03, "The UUID is a 128-bit service"}
                }
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ("Condition_Type" = 0x02));

            PARAM "UUID"
        uint8[16]
                doc "UUID"
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ("Condition_Type" = 0x02));

            PARAM "IRK"
        uint8[16]
                doc "IRK"
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ("Condition_Type" = 0x03));

            PARAM "BD_ADDR_Type"
                uint8
                doc "BD ADDR Type"
                enum {
                    {0x00, "Public Device Address"},
                    {0x01, "Random Device Address"}
                }
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ( ("Condition_Type" = 0x03) or ("Condition_Type" = 0x04)));

            PARAM "BD_ADDR"
                bdaddr
                doc "BD ADDR"
                present_if ( ("Command_Type" = 0x3) and ("Condition_Type" = 0x04));

            PARAM "Monitor_Handle"
                uint8
                doc         "The Handle for the filter that is being cancelled"
                default = 0xFF
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x4);

            PARAM "Filter_Enable"
                uint8
                doc "Filter Enable"
                enum {
                    {0x00, "Filter Disable, Revert to current whitelist behavior but continue monitoring devices"},
                    {0x01, "Filter Enable"}
                }
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x5);

            CC_PARAM "Status"
                errorcode8;

            CC_PARAM "Command_Type"
                uint8
                doc " Command ID"
                enum
                {
                    {0x0, "MSFT Read Supported Features"},
                    {0x1, "MSFT Monitor RSSI"},
                    {0x2, "MSFT Cancel Monitor RSSI"},
                    {0x3, "MSFT LE Monitor Advertisement"},
                    {0x4, "MSFT LE Cancel Monitor Advertisement"},
                    {0x5, "MSFT LE Set Advertisemnt Filter Enable"},
                    {0x6, "MSFT Read Absolute RSSI"}
                };

            CC_PARAM "Supported_Features (31:0)"
        uint32
                doc "Supported Features (31:0)"
        bitmap
        {
            {0x00000001, "RSSI Monitoring for BR/EDR connections"},
            {0x00000002, "RSSI Monitoring for LE connections"},
            {0x00000004, "RSSI Monitoring of LE advertisements"},
            {0x00000008, "Advertisement Monitoring of LE advertisements"}
        }
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x0);

            CC_PARAM "Supported_Features (63:32)"
        uint32
                doc "Supported Features (63:32)"
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x0);

            CC_PARAM "MSFT_Event_Prefix_Length"
                uint8
                doc "MSFT Event Prefix Length"
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x0);

            CC_PARAM "MSFT_Event_Prefix"
                uint8
                doc "MSFT Event Prefix"
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x0);

            CC_PARAM "Monitor_Handle"
                uint8
                doc "Monitor Handle"
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x3);

            CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
                connhandle16
                doc         "connection handle"
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x6);

            CC_PARAM "rssi"
                int8
                doc "rssi"
                note "dB"
                present_if ("Command_Type" = 0x6);

    COMMAND "FLOOD MESH_COMMAND" 0x192
    {
        devs "*"=1
        doc "This command send FLOOD MESH commands to embedded application"
        PARAM "MeshCommand"
            uint8
            doc     "Mesh Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_VERSION"},
                {0x01, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_CONFIG"},
                {0x02, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_CONFIG"},
                {0x03, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_ADD_GROUP"},
                {0x04, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_START"},
                {0x05, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_STOP"},
                {0x06, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_DATA"},
                {0x07, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_P2PDATA"},
                {0x08, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_ACK"},

                {0x0A, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_STOP_BEACON"},

                {0x0D, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_SET_EVT_MASK"},
                {0x0E, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_ENABLE_CAN_YOU_SEE_ME_PACKET"},
                {0x0F, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_GET_VISIBILITY_MAP"},
                {0x10, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_P2M_ACK"},
                {0x11, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_START_DISCOVERY_MODE"},
                {0x12, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_STOP_DISCOVERY_MODE"},
                {0x13, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SCAN_CONFIG"},
                {0xF0, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_GET_LE_SCAN_PARAM"},
                {0xF1, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_CYSM"}
            };
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_CONFIG
        #
        PARAM "adv_interval"
            uint16
            doc     "ADV interval"
            default = 160
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        PARAM "adv_repeat_time"
            uint16
            doc     "ADV Repeat Count"
            default = 3
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        PARAM "p2m_ack_timeout"
            uint16
            doc     "P2M Acknowledgement Timeout"
            default = 2
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        PARAM "p2p_ack_timeout"
            uint16
            doc     "P2P Acknowledgement Timeout"
            default = 2
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        PARAM "beacon_interval"
            uint16
            doc     "Beacon Interval"
            default = 320
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        PARAM "visibility_map_poll_interval"
            uint16
            doc     "visibility map poll interval"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        PARAM "force_node_reset"
            uint8
            doc     "Force reset Node"
            default = 0
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x1);
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_CONFIG
        #
        PARAM "node_id"
            uint8
            doc     "Node ID"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x2);
        PARAM "net_iv"
            uint8[8]
            doc     "Net packet counter Base for this node"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x2);
        PARAM "net_key"
            uint8[16]
            doc     "Net key common to all nodes in that mesh"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x2);
        PARAM "node_iv"
            uint8[8]
            doc     "Node IV"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x2);
        PARAM "node_key"
            uint8[16]
            doc     "Node key"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x2);
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_ADD_GROUP
        #
        PARAM "group_op"
            uint8
            doc     "Group Operation"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "FLOOD_MESH_ADD_GROUP"},
                {0x01, "FLOOD_MESH_DEL_GROUP"}
            }
            default = 0x00
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x3);
        PARAM "group_id"
            uint8
            doc     "Group ID"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x3);

        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_DATA
        #
        PARAM "Type"
            uint8
            doc     "Packet Type"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "FLOOD_MESH_PKT_TYPE_RAW"},
                {0x01, "FLOOD_MESH_PKT_TYPE_POINT_TO_MULTI_ACTUATOR"},
                {0x02, "FLOOD_MESH_PKT_TYPE_POINT_TO_MULTI_POINT"}
            }
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x6);
        PARAM "p2m_ack_ref"
            uint32
            doc     "P2M Ack Ref"
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x6) and ("Type" = 0x02));
        PARAM "exp_ack_cnt"
            uint8
            doc     "Expected ACK count"
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x6) and ("Type" = 0x02));
        PARAM "mesh_data_len"
            uint8
            doc     "Mesh raw_data length"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x6);
        PARAM "MeshRawData"
            uint8[14] omit_pad_bytes
            doc     "Mesh Raw Data"
            valid_length = "mesh_data_len"
            min = 1
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x6) and ("Type" = 0x00));

        PARAM "MeshCtrlData"
            uint8[13]
            doc     "Mesh Ctrl Data"
            valid_length = "mesh_data_len"
            min = 2
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x6) and ("Type" = 0x01));
        PARAM "MeshP2MDestId"
            uint8
            doc     "Mesh P2M Destination Id(GroupId/NodeId)"
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x6) and ("Type" = 0x02));
        PARAM "MeshP2MData"
            uint8[13]
            doc     "Mesh multipoint Data"
            valid_length = "mesh_data_len"
            min = 1
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x6) and ("Type" = 0x02));

    #
    # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_P2PDATA
    #
        PARAM "dest_id"
            uint8
            doc     "Destination Node Id"
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x7) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x8) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x10));
        PARAM "ack_ref"
            uint32
            doc     "Ack Ref"
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x7) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x8) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x10));
        PARAM "dest_pkt_cntr"
            uint8[5]
            doc     "Destination Node Packet counter"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x7);
        PARAM "dest_iv"
            uint8[8]
            doc     "Node IV"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x7);
        PARAM "dest_key"
            uint8[16]
            doc     "Node key"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x7);
        PARAM "data_len"
            uint8
            doc     "P2P data length"
            min = 1
            max = 8
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x7);
        PARAM "data"
            uint8[8]
            doc     "P2P Data"
            valid_length = "data_len"
            min = 1
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x7);

    #
    # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_ACK & FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_P2M_ACK
    #
    # dest_id is resused from that of SEND_P2PDATA
    # ack_ref is resused from that of SEND_P2PDATA
        PARAM "ack_len"
            uint8
            doc     "ACK data length"
            min = 1
            max = 8
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x8) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x10));
        PARAM "ack_data"
            uint8[13]
            doc     "ACK Data"
            valid_length = "ack_len"
            min = 1
            present_if (("MeshCommand" = 0x8) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x10));
    #
    # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_RESTORE
    #
        PARAM "mesh_info_len"
            uint8
            doc "Node Info Length"
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x0B);
        PARAM "node_info"
            uint8[128]
            doc "Node Info"
            valid_length = "mesh_info_len"
                min = 80
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x0B);

    #
    # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_SET_EVT_MASK
    #
        PARAM "event_mask"
            uint32
            doc     "Event Mask"
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "Raw Data Event"},
                {0x00000002, "Actuator Data Event"},
                {0x00000004, "P2M Data Event"},
                {0x00000008, "P2P Data Event"},
                {0x00000010, "P2P Ack Event"},
                {0x00000020, "Sync Info Event"},
                {0x00000040, "P2M Ack Event"}
            }
            default = 0x20
            present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x0D);
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_ENABLE_CAN_YOU_SEE_ME_PACKET
        #
        #
            PARAM "enable/disable"
                uint8
                doc     "Enable/Disable Can-You-See-Me Packet"
                enum
                {
                    {0x00, "DISABLE CAN-YOU-SEE-ME PACKET"},
                    {0x01, "ENABLE CAN-YOU-SEE-ME PACKET"}
                }
                default = 0x00
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x0E);
            PARAM "Local_Vis_Ind"
                uint8
                doc     "Local Visiblity Indicator"
                enum
                {
                    {0x00, "RESET LOCAL VISIBILITY INDICATOR"},
                    {0x01, "SET LOCAL VISIBILITY INDICATOR"}
                }
                default = 0x01
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x0E);
            PARAM "DestId"
                uint8
                doc     "Node Id for sending Can-you-See-Me Packets"
                default = 0xFF
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x0E);
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_CYSM
        #
        #
            PARAM "Neighbor_Map"
                uint8[32] omit_pad_bytes
                doc "32 bytes of neighbor map"
                present_if("MeshCommand" = 0xF1);
            PARAM "Network_Map"
                uint8[32] omit_pad_bytes
                doc "32 bytes of network map"
                present_if("MeshCommand" = 0xF1);
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SCAN_CONFIG
        #
        #
            PARAM "interval"
                uint16
                doc     "LE Mesh Scan Interval"
                default = 0x30
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x13);
            PARAM "window"
                uint16
                doc     "LE Mesh Scan Window"
                default = 0x2E
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x13);
            PARAM "priority"
                uint8
                doc     "Priority of the LE Mesh Scan to be used"
                enum
                {
                    {0x00, "Continuous LE Scan Priority"},
                    {0x01, "More than Inq/Page Scan Priority"},
                    {0x02, "More than ACL and Sniff Timeout Priority"},
                    {0x03, "More than A2DP Priority"}
                }
                default = 0x01
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x13);
            PARAM "num_priority_slots"
                uint16
                doc     "Number of slots for which the high priority will be maintained"
                default = 0x10
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x13);
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_START_DISCOVERY_MODE
        #
        #
            PARAM "name_len"
                uint8
                doc     "Name Length"
                min = 1
                max = 29
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x11);
            PARAM "name"
                uint8[29]   omit_pad_bytes
                doc     "Name"
                min = 1
                max = 29
                present_if ("MeshCommand" = 0x11);
        #
        #  FLOOD MESH response in command complete
        #
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        #
        #  MESH header
        #
        CC_PARAM "MeshCommand"
            uint8
            doc     "Mesh Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_VERSION"},
                {0x01, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_CONFIG"},
                {0x02, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_CONFIG"},
                {0x03, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_ADD_GROUP"},
                {0x04, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_START"},
                {0x05, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_STOP"},
                {0x06, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_DATA"},
                {0x07, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_P2PDATA"},
                {0x08, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_ACK"},
                {0x09, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_START_BEACON"},
                {0x0A, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_STOP_BEACON"},
                {0x0B, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_RESTORE"},
                {0x0C, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_GET_INFO"},
                {0x0D, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_SET_EVT_MASK"},
                {0x0E, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_ENABLE_CAN_YOU_SEE_ME_PACKET"},
                {0x0F, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_GET_VISIBILITY_MAP"},
                {0x10, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_P2M_ACK"},
                {0x11, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_START_DISCOVERY_MODE"},
                {0x12, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_STOP_DISCOVERY_MODE"},
                {0x13, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_SCAN_CONFIG"},
                {0xF0, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_GET_LE_SCAN_PARAM"},
                {0xF1, "FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_CYSM"}
            };
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_VERSION
        #
        CC_PARAM "Version"
            uint32
            doc "Mesh Version"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0x00));
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_CONFIG/FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_CONFIG
        #
        CC_PARAM "Node_Provision_Status"
            uint8
            doc "Node provision status"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and (("MeshCommand" = 0x01) or ("MeshCommand" = 0x02)));
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_GET_INFO
        #
        CC_PARAM "mesh_info_len"
            uint8
            doc "Node Info Length"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0x0C));
        CC_PARAM "node_info"
            uint8[128] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Node Info"
            valid_length = "mesh_info_len"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0x0C));
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_GET_VISIBILITY_MAP
        #
        CC_PARAM "AllNodeMap"
            uint8[32]
            doc "Map of All Nodes"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0x0F));
        CC_PARAM "DirectNodeMap"
            uint8[32]
            doc "Map of All Direct Nodes"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0x0F));
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_GET_LE_SCAN_PARAM
        #
        CC_PARAM "scan_window"
            uint32
            doc "Scan Window"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0xF0));
        CC_PARAM "scan_interval"
            uint32
            doc "Scan Interval"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0xF0));
        CC_PARAM "scan_type"
            uint32
            doc "Scan Type"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0xF0));
        CC_PARAM "filter_policy"
            uint32
            doc "Scan Filter Policy"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MeshCommand" = 0xF0));
        CC_PARAM "own_address_type"

            doc "Own Address Type"

            uint8[16]
            doc     "Key to be used"
            present_if ("subopcode" = 0xF1);
        PARAM "Salt"
            uint8[4]
            doc     "Salt to be used"
            present_if ("subopcode" = 0xF1);
        PARAM "Info"
            uint8[4]
            doc     "Info to be used"
            present_if ("subopcode" = 0xF1);

        #
        #  SMART MESH response in command complete
        #
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        #
        #  MESH header
        #
        CC_PARAM "subopcode"
            uint8
            doc     "Mesh Sub Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_VERSION"},
                {0x01, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_RESET"},
                {0x02, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_CONFIG"},
                {0x03, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_ENABLE"},
                {0x04, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_MESH_START"},
                {0x05, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_ROAMING_NODE_ADD"},
                {0x06, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_ROAMING_NODE_DELETE"},
                {0x07, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_SET_NODE_RELAY_STATE"},
                {0x10, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_KEY_ADD"},
                {0x11, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_KEY_DELETE"},
                {0x12, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_KEY_UPDATE"},
                {0x13, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NET_ADDRESS_ADD"},
                {0x14, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_GENERIC_BEACON"},
                {0x15, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_SECURE_BEACON"},
                {0x20, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_APP_KEY_ADD"},
                {0x21, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_APP_KEY_UPDATE"},
                {0x22, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_APP_KEY_DELETE"},
                {0x23, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_APP_ADDR_ADD"},
                {0x24, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_PING"},
                {0x30, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_DATA_COMMAND"},
                {0x31, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_SEND_DEVICE_DATA_COMMAND"},
                {0x32, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_MESH_PACKET_RECIEVED"},
                {0xF0, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_DB_DBG_COMMAND"},
                {0xF1, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_GET_GEN_KEY_COMMAND"},
                {0xF2, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_CRYPT_DBG_COMMAND"},
                {0xF3, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_GET_MESH_INFO_COMMAND"},
                {0xF4, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_MESH_RESTORE_COMMAND"},
                {0xF6, "SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_DBG_ADV_CONFIG"}
            };
        #
        # FLOODMESH_SUB_OCF_VERSION
        #
        CC_PARAM "Version"
            uint32
            doc "Mesh Version"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("subopcode" = 0x00));
        #
        # SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_NODE_CONFIG
        #
        CC_PARAM "mesh_index"
            uint8
            doc "Mesh Index"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and (("subopcode" = 0x02) or ("subopcode" = 0x01) or ("subopcode" = 0x03)
                        or ("subopcode" = 0x10) or ("subopcode" = 0x11) or ("subopcode" = 0x12) or ("subopcode" = 0x13)
                        or ("subopcode" = 0x20) or ("subopcode" = 0x21) or ("subopcode" = 0x22) or ("subopcode" = 0x23)
                        or ("subopcode" = 0x24) or ("subopcode" = 0x30) or ("subopcode" = 0x31) or ("subopcode" = 0xF3)
                        or ("subopcode" = 0xF4) or ("subopcode" = 0x15)));
        #
        # SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_VERSION
        #
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            uint32
            doc "Command Status"
            present_if ("Status" = 0x14);
        #
        #
        # SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_DB_DBG_COMMAND
        #
        CC_PARAM "sub_opcode"
            uint8
            doc "Sub Debug command opcode"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "SMARTMESH_DB_DBG_GET_MESH_SUBOPCODE"},
                {0x01, "SMARTMESH_DB_DBG_GET_NET_SUBOPCODE"},

            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("subopcode" = 0xF0));

        # SMARTMESH_SUB_OCF_CRYPT_DBG_COMMAND

    COMMAND "MFI Authentication" 0x1AD
    {
        devs "*"=1
        doc "This command send MFI Auth commands to embedded application"
        PARAM "MfiCommand"
            uint8
            doc     "MFI Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "MFI_SUB_OCF_INIT"},
                {0x02, "MFI_SUB_OCF_COPY_CERTIFICATE"},
                {0x03, "MFI_SUB_OCF_GENERATE_SIGNATURE"},
                {0x04, "MFI_SUB_OCF_FINALIZE"},
                {0x05, "MFI_SUB_OCF_READ_CHIP_INFO"}
            };
        #
        # MFI_SUB_OCF_COPY_CERTIFICATE
        #
        PARAM "offset"
            uint16
            doc     "Offset"
            default = 0
            present_if ("MfiCommand" = 0x2);
        #
        # MFI_SUB_OCF_GENERATE_SIGNATURE
        #

            uint8[20]
            doc     "Digest"
            present_if ("MfiCommand" = 0x3);

        # MFI_SUB_OCF_READ_CHIP_INFO
        #

            uint8
            doc     "Info Id"
            present_if ("MfiCommand" = 0x5);
        #
        #  MFI response in command complete
        #

            errorcode8;
        #
        #  MFI header
        #
        CC_PARAM "MfiCommand"
            uint8
            doc     "MFI Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "MFI_SUB_OCF_INIT"},
                {0x02, "MFI_SUB_OCF_COPY_CERTIFICATE"},
                {0x03, "MFI_SUB_OCF_GENERATE_SIGNATURE"},
                {0x04, "MFI_SUB_OCF_FINALIZE"},
                {0x05, "MFI_SUB_OCF_READ_CHIP_INFO"}
            };
        #
        # MFI_SUB_OCF_COPY_CERTIFICATE
        #

            uint8[250] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Certificate Data"
            min = 1
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("certificate_data")

        # MFI_SUB_OCF_GENERATE_SIGNATURE
        #

            uint8[128]
            doc "Signature"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MfiCommand" = 0x03));

        #

            uint8[4] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Auth Chip Info"
            present_if (("Status" = 0) and ("MfiCommand" = 0x05));
    }

    COMMAND "Store_LE_HID_Attributes_For_Caching" 0x1B8
    {
        devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1 ("Only supported when BTW UHE model enabled")
        doc "This command stores the needed LE HID attributes (HID report map information) into"
             "UHE/Embedded mode. This is called as ATT caching."

        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            doc "Bluetooth device address of the paired LE device of which LE HID attributes to be stored for the ATT caching";
        PARAM "Bd_Addr_Type"
            uint8
            doc "Bluetooth device address type of the paired LE device of which LE HID attributes to be stored for the ATT caching";
        PARAM "Protocol_Mode_Handle"
            uint16
            doc "UHE HID Host does support only a Boot protocol mode of a LE HID device in Embedded stack/EFI mode of operation."
                "HID Host needs to set a desired protocol mode (here boot protocol mode only) on the HID device and this can be achieved"
                "by writing of the protocol mode the LE HID service at/with a given protocol mode handle.";
        PARAM "No_of_Reports"
            uint8
            doc "UHE as a Boot Host does support only a Boot protocol mode. In that mode, it supports following characteristic of a HID device in UHE/Boot/EFI mode."
                "1. Boot Keyboard Input Report characteristic, 2. Boot Keyboard Output Report characteristic and 3. Boot Mouse Input Report characteristic"
                "Thus, a total number of HID reports is 0x02 for Keyboard (Keyboard Input and Keyboard output), 0x01 for Mouse (Mouse Input) and 0x03 for a combo"
                "device (Keyboard input, Keyboard output and Mouse input)."
            min = 1
            max = 3
            default = 1;

        # - Report[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;
        PARAM "Report_UUID[0]"
            uint16
            doc "The Report UUID field is a 16-bit Bluetooth UUID that describes the type of Characteristic Value. It is defined by Bluetooth SIG"
                "(See GATT characteristic assigned numbers). As UHE HID Host does support only a Boot protocol mode, only three types of reports are anticipated as listed below."
                "0x2A22 - Boot Keyboard Input Report, 0x2A32 - Boot Keyboard Output Report, 0x2A33 - Boot Mouse Input Report";
        PARAM "CCD_Handle[0]"
            uint16
            doc "Attribute Handle of a client characteristic configuration descriptor (0x2902- UUID)";
        PARAM "Report_Handle[0]"
            uint16
            doc "It is a GATT attribute handle of the HID report";

        # - Report[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;
        PARAM "Report_UUID[1]"
            uint16
            present_if ("No_of_Reports" > 1);
        PARAM "CCD_Handle[1]"
            uint16
            present_if ("No_of_Reports" > 1);
        PARAM "Report_Handle[1]"
            uint16
        present_if ("No_of_Reports" > 1);

        # - Report[2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -;
        PARAM "Report_UUID[2]"
            uint16
            present_if ("No_of_Reports" > 2);
        PARAM "CCD_Handle[2]"
            uint16
            present_if ("No_of_Reports" > 2);
        PARAM "Report_Handle[2]"
            uint16
        present_if ("No_of_Reports" > 2);

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }

    COMMAND "LRAC_Meta_Command" 0x1CF
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc    "This command controls the operation of the Left/Right Audio sync feature."
        PARAM "Sub_Command"
            uint8
            doc    "Sub Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LRAC_Get_ACL_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand"},
                {0x01, "LRAC_SetAndEnable_ACL_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand"},
                {0x02, "LRAC_Pause_Link_Subcommand"},
                {0x03, "LRAC_AssociateAPPS_Link_Subcommand"},
                {0x04, "LRAC_Stop_Eavesdropping_Subcommand"},
                {0x05, "LRAC_FW_Statistics_Subcommand"},
                {0x06, "LRAC_Get_SCO_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand"},
                {0x07, "LRAC_SetAndEnable_SCO_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand"},
                {0x08, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Start_Subcommand"},
                {0x09, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Param_Get_Subcommand"},
                {0x0a, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Execute_Subcommand"},
                {0x0b, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Finalize_Subcommand"},
                {0x0c, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Abort_Subcommand"}
            };

        ##############  Opcode 0x00 = LRAC_Get_ACL_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand ##############

        # NOTE: for the LRAC_Get_SCO_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand, this connection handle
        # actually corresponds to the SCO conn handle, not the ACL connection handle
        PARAM "Connection Handle AudSrc Primary"
            connhandle16
            doc    "Audio Source->Primary Connection Handle"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x0) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x3) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x6) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x8) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x9) or ("Sub_Command" = 0xa) or ("Sub_Command" = 0xb) or ("Sub_Command" = 0xc));

        PARAM "Connection Handle Primary Secondary"
            connhandle16
            doc    "Primary->Secondary Connection Handle"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x0) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x1) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x3) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x6) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x7) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x8) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x9) or ("Sub_Command" = 0xa) or ("Sub_Command" = 0xb) or ("Sub_Command" = 0xc));

        ##############  Opcode 0x01 = LRAC_SetAndEnable_ACL_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand ##############

        # NOTE: this is common to SETANDENABLE_ACL_EAVESDROPPING_PARAMS and
        # SETANDENABLE_SCO_EAVESDROPPING_PARAMS subcommands
        PARAM "Data "
            uint8[200] omit_pad_bytes
            doc    "Eavesdropping Parameters Data"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x7));

        ##############  Opcode 0x02 = LRAC_Pause_Link_Subcommand ##############

        PARAM "Connection Handle AudSrc Primary  "
            connhandle16
            doc    "Audio Source->Primary Connection Handle"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x2);

        PARAM "Enable Pause  "
            bool8
            doc "Pause A2DP Link"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x2)
            default = 0;

        ##############  Opcode 0x04 = LRAC_Pause_Link_Subcommand ##############

            connhandle16
            doc    "Eavesdropping Connection Handle"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x4);

            default = 0x13

        # the same general format

        ##############  Opcode 0x07 = LRAC_SetAndEnable_SCO_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand ##############

        # incorporated under LRAC_SetAndEnable_ACL_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand above, since they have
        # the same general format

        ##############  Command Complete Parameters ##############

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;

            uint8
            doc    "Sub Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LRAC_Get_ACL_Eavesdropping_Parameters_Subcommand"},
