                {0x02, "LRAC_Pause_Link_Subcommand"},

                {0x05, "LRAC_FW_Statistics_Subcommand"},

                {0x08, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Start_Subcommand"},
                {0x09, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Param_Get_Subcommand"},
                {0x0a, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Execute_Subcommand"},
                {0x0b, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Finalize_Subcommand"},
                {0x0c, "LRAC_PSSwitch_Abort_Subcommand"}
            };

        CC_PARAM "Eavesdropping Data"
            uint8[240] omit_pad_bytes
            doc    "Eavesdropping Parameters"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x0) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x6));

        CC_PARAM "Connection Handle"
            connhandle16
            doc    "Eavesdropping connection Handle"
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x1) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x5) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x7));

                {0x03, "Allow Scan Request from White List Only, Allow Connect Request from White List Only"}
            }
            default = 0x0;
#            enabled_if (("Advertising_Type" = 0x0) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x2) or ("Advertising_Type" = 0x3));

            binary_message_only

        PARAM "Scan_Response_Data"
            uint8[31]
            doc    "Multi Advertising scan response data"
            valid_length = "Scan_Response_Data_Length"
            min = 0;

        PARAM "Tx_Power"
            int8
            doc    "TX Power used for the advertising instance"
            min = -70
            max = 20
            default = 9;

        ##############  Command Complete Parameters ##############
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
    }


    COMMAND "LE_TX_Power_Control_VS" 0x1DE
    {
        devs "*"=0
        doc "This command controls the operation of BT Sig LE Power control code."
        PARAM "LE_Tx_Power_Opcode"
            uint8
            doc "TX Power Control Opcode"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LE_Tx_Control_Params_Sub_Cmd"},
                {0x02, "Set_LE_Engine_Control_Params_Sub_Cmd"},
                {0x03, "Test_LE_Tx_Power_Control_Sub_Cmd"},
                {0x04, "Test_LE_PathLoss_Sub_Cmd"}
            };

        ##############  Opcode 0x01 = LE_Tx_Control_Params_Sub_Cmd ##############

        PARAM "action"
            uint8
            doc "0-Get parameters, 1-Set Parameters"
            enum
            {
                {0, "Get"},
                {1, "Set"}
            }
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x1);

        PARAM "AvL"
            uint8
            doc "packets weigh LESS in the rssi averaging"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "AvS"
            uint8
            doc "packets weigh MORE in the rssi averaging"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Tp_Mod"
            uint8
            doc "factor for slow timer"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Pkt_Cnt_Thr"
            uint8
            doc "Packet count to determine if using AvL or AvS"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Low_RSSI_Thr"
            int8
            doc "Base RSSI to drop incoming signal to"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Med_RSSI_Thr"
            int8
            doc "Mid RSSI level to quickly drop hotter signal too"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "RSSI_margin"
            uint8
            doc "Range value that RSSI should be in (Low_RSSI_Thr + margin)"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Int_Incr"
            uint8
            doc "Interference Increment value"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Int_Thr"
            uint8
            doc "Interference threshold to ask remote to increase power"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Int_Factor"
            uint8
            doc "factor for calculating interference threshold"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
        PARAM "Pkt_Factor"
            uint8
            doc "this value * slave_latency calculates num packets before we ask for power increase (sync timeouts)"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
       PARAM "Pwr_Step_Min"
            int8
            doc "Small step amount to adjust the power"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
       PARAM "Pwr_Step_Max"
            int8
            doc "Large step amount to adjust the power"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));
       PARAM "Ack_TO"
            uint8
            doc "timeout for ACK before sedning another request -> val * (125ms * Tp_Mod)"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 1));


        ##############  Opcode 0x02 = Set_LE_Engine_Control_Params_Sub_Cmd ##############

        PARAM "engineEnableFlag"
            uint16
            doc "0-Disable 1-Enable Tx Power control engine"
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x2);

        ##############  Opcode 0x03 = Test_LE_Tx_Power_Control_Sub_Cmd ##############

        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            uint16
            doc "Connection handle"
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x3);
        PARAM "PHY"
            uint8
            doc "Phy value"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LE 1M PHY"},
                {0x02, "LE 2M PHY"},
                {0x03, "LE Coded S8 PHY"},
                {0x04, "LE Coded S2 PHY"}
            }
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x3);
        PARAM "Power_Adjust"
            int8
            doc "Signed 8 bit value to adjust power by"
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x3);
        PARAM "APR"
            uint8
            doc "Unsigned 8 bit REDUCTION value for to use for APR of next response"
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x3);

        ##############  Opcode 0x04 = Test_LE_PathLoss_Sub_Cmd ##############
        PARAM "rssi"
            int8
            doc "fake rssi value for lmulp_power testing, FW will ignore if 0x7F"
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x4);
        PARAM "adj_rssi"
            int8
            doc "fake rssi adjustment value for lmulp_power testing"
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 0x4);

        ##############  Command Complete Parameters ##############
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "LE_Tx_Power_Opcode"
            uint8
            doc "Multi Advertising Opcode repeated to host"
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LE_Tx_Control_Params_Sub_Cmd"},
                {0x02, "Set_LE_Engine_Control_Params_Sub_Cmd"},
                {0x03, "Test_LE_Tx_Power_Control_Sub_Cmd"},
                {0x04, "Test_LE_PathLoss_Sub_Cmd"}
            };

        # Present ONLY for 2,3,4
        CC_PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            uint16
            doc "Connection handle - optional depending on what LE_Tx_Power_Opcode was sent down"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 2) or ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 3) or ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 4));

        # Present ONLY  for opcode 1
        CC_PARAM "action"
            uint8
            doc "0-Get parameters, 1-Set Parameters"
            enum
            {
                {0, "Get parameters"},
                {1, "Set Parameters"}
            }
            present_if ("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1);
        CC_PARAM "AvL"
            uint8
            doc "packets weigh LESS in the rssi averaging"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "AvS"
            uint8
            doc "packets weigh MORE in the rssi averaging"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Tp_Mod"
            uint8
            doc "factor for slow timer"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Pkt_Cnt_Thr"
            uint8
            doc "Packet count to determine if using AvL or AvS"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Low_RSSI_Thr"
            int8
            doc "Base RSSI to drop incoming signal to"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Med_RSSI_Thr"
            int8
            doc "Mid RSSI level to quickly drop hotter signal too"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "RSSI_margin"
            uint8
            doc "Range value that RSSI should be in (Low_RSSI_Thr + margin)"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Int_Incr"
            uint8
            doc "Interference Increment value"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Int_Thr"
            uint8
            doc "Interference threshold to ask remote to increase power"
            present_if (("LE_Tx_Power_Opcode" = 1) and ("action" = 0));
        CC_PARAM "Int_Factor"

    COMMAND "LE Isochronous Channels Meta Command" 0x1DF
    {
        devs "*"=0
        doc "This command is used to extend testability/usability of LE Isochronous Channnels Feature"
        PARAM "Sub_Code"
            uint8
            doc "Sub code"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Extended Transmit Test"},
                {0x01, "Extended Receive Test"},
                {0x02, "Enable/Disable Iso traffic over ACL"},
                {0x03, "Enable/Disable NACK Peer"},
                {0x04, "Enable/Disable ZL SDU"},
                {0x05, "Enable/Disable SDU Drop Notification"},
                {0x06, "Set ISO Duty cycle limit"}
            };
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16
            doc "CIS/BIS connection handle"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) or ("Sub_Code" = 0x1) or ("Sub_Code" = 0x3));
        PARAM "Payload_Type"
            uint8
            doc "Payload Type"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Zero Length Payload"},
                {0x01, "Variable Length Payload"},
                {0x02, "Maximum length payload"},
                {0xFE, "Custom Length Payload Sequence"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x0);
        PARAM "Num_SDUs_To_Transmit"
            uint32
            doc "Number of SDUs to transmit"
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x0);
        PARAM "Num_Valid_Custom_SDU_Lengths"
            uint8
            doc "Number of Valid Custom SDU Lengths"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) and ("Payload_Type" = 0xFE));

        # NOTE: these variable size elements must be the last set of fields for a given subcode
        PARAM "Custom_SDU_Lengths[0]"
            uint16
            doc "Array of Custom SDU Lengths"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) and ("Payload_Type" = 0x3) and ("Num_Valid_Custom_SDU_Lengths" > 0));
        PARAM "Custom_SDU_Lengths[1]"
            uint16
            doc "Array of Custom SDU Lengths"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) and ("Payload_Type" = 0x3) and ("Num_Valid_Custom_SDU_Lengths" > 1));
        PARAM "Custom_SDU_Lengths[2]"
            uint16
            doc "Array of Custom SDU Lengths"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) and ("Payload_Type" = 0x3) and ("Num_Valid_Custom_SDU_Lengths" > 2));
        PARAM "Custom_SDU_Lengths[3]"
            uint16
            doc "Array of Custom SDU Lengths"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) and ("Payload_Type" = 0x3) and ("Num_Valid_Custom_SDU_Lengths" > 3));
        PARAM "Custom_SDU_Lengths[4]"
            uint16
            doc "Array of Custom SDU Lengths"
            present_if (("Sub_Code" = 0x0) and ("Payload_Type" = 0x3) and ("Num_Valid_Custom_SDU_Lengths" > 4));
        # -------------------- {0x00, "Extended Transmit Test"} ------------------
        PARAM "TX_Test_Flags"
            uint8
            doc "Extended TX Test flag bits"
            bitmap
            {
                {0x01, "Use ACL transport for Isochronous Packets"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x0);
        # -------------------- {0x01, "Extended Receive Test"} ------------------
        PARAM "RX_Test_Flags"
            uint8
            doc "Extended RX Test flag bits"
            bitmap
            {
                {0x01, "Disable recombination & reassembly"},
                {0x02, "Use ACL transport for Isochronous Packets"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x1);
        # -------------------- {0x02, "Enable/Disable Iso traffic over ACL"} ------------------
        PARAM "EnableIsoOverAcl"
            uint8
            doc "Setting this flag enables Iso traffic Over Acl transport"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Disable Iso traffic Over Acl transport"},
                {0x01, "Enable Iso traffic Over Acl transport"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x2);
        # -------------------- {0x03, "Enable/Disable Nack Peer"} ------------------
        PARAM "enableNack"
            uint8
            doc "Setting this flag enables CIS to Nack all peer packets"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Disable Peer Nack Behaviour"},
                {0x01, "Enable Peer Nack Behaviour"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x3);
        # -------------------- {0x04, "Enable/Disable ZL SDU Indication"} ------------------
        PARAM "enableLostSDUIndication"
            uint8
            doc "Setting this flag enables ISOAL to send Lost SDU indication via HCI packets"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Disable Zero Length SDU indications"},
                {0x01, "Enable Zero Length SDU indications"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x4);
        # -------------------- {0x05, "Enable/Disable SDU Drop Notification"} ------------------
        PARAM "enableSDUDropNotifcation"
            uint8
            doc "Setting this flag enables ISOAL to send SDU Drop Notification when particular SDU is dropped due to incorrect PSN/timestamp based on current controller timing"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Disable SDU Drop Notification"},
                {0x01, "Enable SDU Drop Notification"}
            }
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x5);
        # -------------------- {0x06, "Set ISO Duty cycle limit"} ------------------
        PARAM "isoDutyCycleLimit"
            uint8
            doc "Overwrite the Max ISO event length"
            min = 0
            max = 100
            default = 60
            present_if ("Sub_Code" = 0x6);
    }

        ##############  Command Complete Parameters ##############

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;

        CC_PARAM "Sub_Command"
            uint8
            doc "Sub Command"
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "BMS_Enable_Subcommand"},
                {0x01, "BMS_Set_Event_Mask_Subcommand"},
                {0xFE, "BMS_PAWR_IOP_TEST_Subcommand"}
            };

        CC_PARAM "BMS_Handle"
            uint8
            doc "BMS Handle"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x0);

            uint32
            doc "the offset from start of packet to triggered point"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x0);
    }

   COMMAND "Extended_Transmit_Power_Table_Config" 0x1e0
    {
        devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
        doc "Extended transmit power table configuration for multiple transmit paths"
        PARAM "Sub_Command"
            uint8
            doc "Sub commands"
            enum
            {
                {0x0, "Get_Active_Power_Table_Info"},
                {0x1, "Set_Active_Power_Table_Index"},
                {0x2, "Set_Power_Table_Tx_Path"},
                {0x3, "Set_Power_Table_Data"},
                {0x4, "Get_Power_Table_Data"}
            };
        PARAM "Table_Index"
            uint8
            doc "Power table index"
            min = 0
            max = 4
            default = 0
            present_if ("Sub_Command" > 0x00);
        PARAM "Tx_Path"
            uint8
            doc "Transmit path index"
            min = 0
            max = 4
            default = 0
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x02);
        PARAM "Tx_Mode"
            uint8
            doc "RF Mode"
            enum 
            {
                {0x0, "BDR"},
                {0x1, "EDR"},
                {0x2, "BLE"}
            }
            present_if (("Sub_Command" = 0x03) or ("Sub_Command" = 0x04));
        PARAM "Power_Table"
            uint8[64] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Number of power levels"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x03);
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Sub_Command"
            uint8
            doc "Sub commands"
            enum 
            {
                {0x0, "Get_Active_Power_Table_Info"},
                {0x1, "Set_Active_Power_Table_Index"},
                {0x2, "Set_Power_Table_Tx_Path"},
                {0x3, "Set_Power_Table_Data"},
                {0x4, "Get_Power_Table_Data"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "Table_Index"
            uint8
            doc "Active power table index";
        CC_PARAM "Num_Power_Tables"
            uint8
            doc "Number of power tables";
        CC_PARAM "Tx_Path"
            uint8
            doc "Active transmit power path";
        CC_PARAM "Num_Tx_Path"
            uint8
            doc "Number of transmit power path";
        CC_PARAM "Num_Tx_Modes"
            uint8
            doc "Number of RF transmit modes";
        CC_PARAM "Num_Power_Levels"
            uint8
            doc "Number of power levels";
        CC_PARAM "Power_Table"
            uint8[64] omit_pad_bytes
            doc "Number of power levels"
            present_if ("Sub_Command" = 0x04);
    }

    COMMAND "HCI_Uart_Rx_Error_Recovery" 0x1E6
    {
        devs "*"=0

            uint32
            doc "Additional time interval per packet apart from total interval given for a set of bytes";

    COMMAND "Enter_Download_Mode" 0x3ed
    {
        devs "*"=0
        doc "More extensible version of Download_Minidriver, and with the name being more"
            "representative of what its function is for modern use cases.  The command is also"
            "structured to provide an extended synchronization window for autobaud operation."
        PARAM "AB_sync0_3"
            uint32
            doc "Byte 0 to 3 of the autobaud synch window"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0xffffffff;

            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0xffffffff;
        PARAM "AB_sync12_15"
            uint32
            doc "Byte 12 to 15 of the autobaud synch window"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0xffffffff;
        PARAM "Opcode_Reiterated"
            uint16
            doc "Reiterated command opcode, for confirmation after the UART has locked onto the"
                "byte boundary alignment in the autobaud synchronization window"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 0xffed;
        PARAM "Inner_Command_length"
            uint8
            doc "The length of the parameters after this one"
            binary_message_only
            encode_value = 1;
        PARAM "Command_Version"
            uint8
            doc "The version of the Enter_Download_Mode command for extensibility"
            default = 0;

        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;

            uint8
            doc "The command version that was received";
        CC_PARAM "Chip_Number"
            uint32
            doc "The chip number (e.g. 13480 from BCM13480B2)";
        CC_PARAM "Silicon_Revision"
            uint8
            doc "The chip silicon layers revision (often ASCII, e.g. 0x42 = 'B' from BCM13480B2)";
        CC_PARAM "Metal_Revision"
            uint8
            doc "The chip metal layers revision (e.g. 2 from BCM13480B2)";
        CC_PARAM "Firmware_Major_Revision"
            uint8
            doc "The firmware major revision,(e.g. 1 from 001.002.100)";
        CC_PARAM "Firmware_Minor_Revision"
            uint8
            doc "The firmware minor revision,(e.g. 2 from 001.002.100)";
        CC_PARAM "Firmware_Build_Number"
            uint8
            doc "The firmware minor revision,(e.g. 100 from 001.002.100)";
        CC_PARAM "Config_Format_Hash"
            uint32
            doc "The config data format hash as understood by this firmware version (to be used by"
                "the host to assure that if it is about to download configuration data, it is"
                "actually compatible with this device";
        CC_PARAM "Safe_Minidriver_Address"
            uint32
            doc "The address of the largest block where it would be safe to download a minidriver,"
                "should the host choose to do so";
        CC_PARAM "Safe_Minidriver_Length"
            uint32
            doc "The length of the largest block where it would be safe to download a minidriver,"
                "should the host choose to do so";
    }

    COMMAND "Minidriver_RAM_ROM_Clock_Test" 0x3FF
    {
        devs "*"=0
        doc "This command is supported only through a minidriver. The command is used to execute a"
            "RAM test, return the ROM checksum, and output a 500 KHz square wave on GPIO 0 while"
            "GPIO1 is high to allow an external device to test the 24 MHz clock. Before the"
            "command complete event, status messages will be sent in the form of vendor-specific"
            "debug events with the Event_Sub_Code being RAM ROM Clock Test Status."
        PARAM "Clock_Test_Cycles"
            uint32
            doc "The number of cycles to strobe GPIO0 high/low during the clock test.";
        PARAM "Checksum_Length"
            uint32
            doc "The length of ROM for which to return a checksum.";
        CC_PARAM "Status"
            errorcode8;
        CC_PARAM "Result"
            uint8
            doc "Indicates the test result."
            enum
            {
                {0, "No errors detected"},
                {1, "Transport error"},
                {2, "RAM test failed"},
                {3, "ROM test failed"}
            };
        CC_PARAM "ROM_Checksum_32"
            uint32
            doc "The 32-bit checksum of the ROM."
            present_if ("Result" = 0);
        CC_PARAM "ROM_Checksum_32_rl1"
            uint32
            doc "The 32-bit checksum of the ROM, where the result is rotated right by 1 bit after"
                "each addition operation."
            present_if ("Result" = 0);
    }

        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 17);
    PARAM "Class_of_Device[17]"
        uint24
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 17);
    PARAM "Clock_Offset[17]"
        uint16
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 17);
}

EVENT "Connection Complete" 0x03
{
    devs "*"=1
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Link_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "SCO connection"},
            {0x01, "ACL connection"}
        };
    PARAM "Encryption_Status"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Link level encryption disabled"},
            {0x01, "Link level encryption enabled"}
        };
}

EVENT "Connection Request" 0x04
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Class_Of_Device"
        uint24;
    PARAM "Link_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "SCO connection"},
            {0x01, "ACL connection"},
            {0x02, "eSCO connection"}
        };
}

EVENT "Read Remote Supported Features Complete" 0x0B
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "LMP_Features"
        uint32
        # See Bluetooth spec C:5.1.1, Bluetooth 1.2 spec Vol 2, C:3.3
        bitmap
        {
            {0x00000001, "3-slot packets"},
            {0x00000002, "5-slot packets"},
            {0x00000004, "Encryption"},
            {0x00000008, "Slot offset"},
            {0x00000010, "Timing accuracy"},
            {0x00000020, "Switch"},
            {0x00000040, "Hold mode"},
            {0x00000080, "Sniff mode"},
            {0x00000100, "Park mode"},
            {0x00000200, "Power control requests"},
            {0x00000400, "Channel quality driven data rate"},
            {0x00000800, "SCO link"},
            {0x00001000, "HV2 packets"},
            {0x00002000, "HV3 packets"},
            {0x00004000, "u-law log"},
            {0x00008000, "A-law log"},
            {0x00010000, "CVSD"},
            {0x00020000, "Paging scheme"},
            {0x00040000, "Power control"},
            {0x00080000, "3 transparent SCO data"},
            {0x00100000, "Flow control lag (bit0)"},
            {0x00200000, "Flow control lag (bit1)"},
            {0x00400000, "Flow control lag (bit2)"},
            {0x00800000, "Broadcast encryption"},
            {0x01000000, "Scatter mode"},
            {0x02000000, "Enhanced data rate ACL 2 Mbps mode"},
            {0x04000000, "Enhanced data rate ACL 3 Mbps mode"},
            {0x08000000, "Enhanced inquiry scan"},
            {0x10000000, "Interlaced inquiry scan"},
            {0x20000000, "Interlaced page scan"},
            {0x40000000, "RSSI with inquiry results"},
            {0x80000000, "Extended SCO link (EV3 packets)"}
        };
    PARAM "LMP_Features (63:32)"
        uint32
        bitmap
        {
            {0x00000001, "EV4 packets"},
            {0x00000002, "EV5 packets"},
            {0x00000004, "Absence masks"},
            {0x00000008, "AFH capable slave"},
            {0x00000010, "AFH classification slave"},
            {0x00000020, "ULP"},
            {0x00000040, "ULP BR/EDR not supported"},
            {0x00000080, "3-slot enhanced data rate ACL packets"},
            {0x00000100, "5-slot enhanced data rate ACL packets"},  # byte 5, bit 0
            {0x00000200, "Sniff subrating"},                        # byte 5, bit 1, per 7/28/05 spec
            {0x00000400, "Pause Encryption"},
            {0x00000800, "AFH capable master"},                     # byte 5, bit 3
            {0x00001000, "AFH classification master"},
            {0x00002000, "Enhanced data rate eSCO 2 Mbps mode"},
            {0x00004000, "Enhanced data rate eSCO 3 Mbps mode"},
            {0x00008000, "3-slot enhanced data rate eSCO packets"},
            {0x00010000, "Extended inquiry response"},
            {0x00080000, "Secure Simple Pairing"},
            {0x00100000, "Encapsulated PDU"},
            {0x00200000, "Erroneous Data Reporting"},
            {0x00400000, "Non-flushable Packet Boundary Flag"},
            {0x01000000, "Link Supervision Timeout Changed Event"},
            {0x02000000, "Inquiry Response Tx Power Level"},
            {0x04000000, "Enhanced Power Control"},
            {0x80000000, "Extended features"}
        };
}

EVENT "QoS Setup Complete" 0x0D

    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0

        errorcode8;

        connhandle16;

            {0x00, "No Traffic"},

            {0x02, "Guaranteed"}

        note "bytes per second";

        note "bytes per second";
    PARAM "Latency"

        note "microseconds";
    PARAM "Delay_Variation"
        uint32
        note "microseconds";

EVENT "Command Complete" 0x0E
{
    devs "*"=1
    PARAM "Num_HCI_Command_Packets"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Command_Opcode"
        opcode16;
    RETURN_PARAMETERS;
        # See Bluetooth spec section 2-E:7.7.14
        # Parametes depend on the CC_PARAM entries in the COMMAND with the
        # Command_Opcode specified in the Command Complete event
}

        opcode16;

EVENT "Hardware Error" 0x10
{
    devs    "*"=1 ( "The HCI_Hardware_Error_Event is issued when platform specific hardware errors"
                    "are detected.  The following actions are recommended on the reception of"
                    "specific hardware errors:<br>"
                    "<br>"
                    "Hardware_Code == 0: UART or USB Parsing Error<br>"
                    "The issuing of two consecutive HCI Reset commands are required to recover from"
                    "this error.<br>"
                    "<br>"
                    "Hardware_Code == 1: Internal Soft Error Major<br>"
                    "A major soft error has occurred.  The issuing of an HCI Reset command is"
                    "required to recover from this error.<br>"
                    "<br>"
                    "Hardware_Code == 2: Internal Soft Error Severe<br>"
                    "A severe soft error has occurred and soft reset has been issued.  A subsequent"
                    "HCI Reset command needs to be issued to ensure that the Host is in sync with"
                    "the device." ),
            "BCM2045"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Hardware_Code"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "UART Parsing Error"},
            {0x01, "Internal Soft Error Major"},
            {0x02, "Internal Soft Error Severe"},
            {0x03, "HW Error BCS Reset"},
            {0x04, "HW Error out of memory fundamental"},
            {0x05, "HW Error out of HSSI task"},
            {0x06, "HW Error out of LEA buffer"},
            {0x07, "HW Error IPC parsing error"},

            # Codes 0xF0-0xFF are reserved for MCU use
            {0xF0, "HW Error MCU error 0"},
            {0xF1, "HW Error MCU error 1"},
            {0xF2, "HW Error MCU error 2"},
            {0xF3, "HW Error MCU error 3"},
            {0xF4, "HW Error MCU error 4"},
            {0xF5, "HW Error MCU error 5"},
            {0xF6, "HW Error MCU error 6"},
            {0xF7, "HW Error MCU error 7"},
            {0xF8, "HW Error MCU error 8"},
            {0xF9, "HW Error MCU error 9"},
            {0xFA, "HW Error MCU error 10"},
            {0xFB, "HW Error MCU error 11"},
            {0xFC, "HW Error MCU error 12"},
            {0xFD, "HW Error MCU error 13"},
            {0xFE, "HW Error MCU error 14"},
            {0xFF, "HW Error MCU error 15"}
        };
}

EVENT "Mode Change" 0x14
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "Current_Mode"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Active Mode"},
            {0x01, "Hold Mode"},
            {0x02, "Sniff Mode"},
            {0x03, "Park Mode"}
        };
    PARAM "Interval"
        uint16
        note "slots";
}

EVENT "Return Link Keys" 0x15
{
    devs    "*"=0,
            "BCM2035"=1,
            "BCM2045"=1 (   "Not supported by core firmware, but support can be provided by a"
                            "simple customer-specific application if nonvolatile memory is"
                            "available to store the Link_Key database." )
    PARAM "Num_Keys"
        uint8;

    # - Response[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[0]"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Link_Key[0]"
        uint8[16] little_endian;

    # - Response[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[1]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 1);
    PARAM "Link_Key[1]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 1);

    # - Response[2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[2]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 2);
    PARAM "Link_Key[2]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 2);

    # - Response[3] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[3]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 3);
    PARAM "Link_Key[3]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 3);

    # - Response[4] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[4]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 4);
    PARAM "Link_Key[4]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 4);

    # - Response[5] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[5]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 5);
    PARAM "Link_Key[5]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 5);

    # - Response[6] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[6]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 6);
    PARAM "Link_Key[6]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 6);

    # - Response[7] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[7]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 7);
    PARAM "Link_Key[7]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 7);

    # - Response[8] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[8]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 8);
    PARAM "Link_Key[8]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 8);

    # - Response[9] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[9]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 9);
    PARAM "Link_Key[9]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 9);

    # - Response[10] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[10]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 10);
    PARAM "Link_Key[10]"
        uint8[16] little_endian
        present_if ("Num_Keys" > 10);
}

EVENT "PIN Code Request" 0x16
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
}

EVENT "Link Key Request" 0x17
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
}

EVENT "Link Key Notification" 0x18
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Link_Key"
        uint8[16] little_endian;
    PARAM "Key_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Combination Key"},
            {0x01, "Local Unit Key"},
            {0x02, "Remote Unit Key"},
            {0x03, "Debug Combination Key"},
            {0x04, "Unauthenticated Combination Key"},
            {0x05, "Authenticated Combination Key"},
            {0x06, "Changed Combination Key"},
            {0x07, "Unauthenticated Combination Key generated from P256"},
            {0x08, "Authenticated Combination Key generated from P256"}
        };
}

EVENT "Loopback Command" 0x19
{
    devs "*"=0
    HCI_COMMAND_PACKET;
        # See Bluetooth spec section 2-E:7.7.25
        # Param: opcode, string
        # Other parameters are as specified for the command
}

EVENT "Data Buffer Overflow" 0x1A
{
    devs "*"=0
    PARAM "Link_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "SCO Buffer Overflow"},
            {0x01, "ACL Buffer Overflow"}
        };
}

    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "LMP_Max_Slots"

}

EVENT "Read Clock Offset Complete" 0x1C
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "Clock_Offset"

EVENT "Connection Packet Type Changed" 0x1D
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "Packet_Type"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
                {0x0002, "no 2-DH1"},
                {0x0004, "no 3-DH1"},
                {0x0008, "DM1"},
                {0x0010, "DH1"},
                {0x0100, "no 2-DH3"},
                {0x0200, "no 3-DH3"},
                {0x0400, "DM3"},
                {0x0800, "DH3"},
                {0x1000, "no 2-DH5"},
                {0x2000, "no 3-DH5"},
                {0x4000, "DM5"},
                {0x8000, "DH5"},
                {0x0020, "HV1"},
                {0x0040, "HV2"},
                {0x0080, "HV3"}
        };
}

EVENT "QoS Violation" 0x1E
{
    devs "*"=0
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
}

EVENT "Page Scan Repetition Mode Change" 0x20
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2045"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode"
        uint8
        enum "R012";
}

EVENT "Flow Specification Complete" 0x21
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "Flags"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Flow_Direction"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Outgoing Flow"},
            {0x01, "Incoming Flow"}
        };
    PARAM "Service_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "No Traffic"},
            {0x01, "Best Effort"},
            {0x02, "Guaranteed"}
        };
    PARAM "Token_Rate"
        uint32
        note "bytes per second";
    PARAM "Token_Bucket_Size"
        uint32;
    PARAM "Peak_Bandwidth"
        uint32
        note "bytes per second";
    PARAM "Access_Latency"
        uint32
        note "microseconds";
}

EVENT "Inquiry Result with RSSI" 0x22
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Num_Responses"
        uint8;

    # - Response[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[0]"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode[0]"
        uint8
        enum "R012";
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Period_Mode[0]"
        uint8
        enum "P012";
    PARAM "Class_of_Device[0]"
        uint24;
    PARAM "Clock_Offset[0]"
        uint16;
    PARAM "RSSI[0]"
        int8
        min = -127
        max = 20;

    # - Response[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[1]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 1);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode[1]"

    PARAM "Class_of_Device[9]"
        uint24
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 9);
    PARAM "Clock_Offset[9]"
        uint16
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 9);
    PARAM "RSSI[9]"
        int8
        min = -127
        max = 20
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 9);

    # - Response[10] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[10]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 10);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode[10]"
        uint8
        enum "R012"
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 10);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Period_Mode[10]"
        uint8
        enum "P012"
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 10);
    PARAM "Class_of_Device[10]"
        uint24
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 10);
    PARAM "Clock_Offset[10]"
        uint16
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 10);
    PARAM "RSSI[10]"
        int8
        min = -127
        max = 20
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 10);

    # - Response[11] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BD_ADDR[11]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 11);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode[11]"
        uint8
        enum "R012"
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 11);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Period_Mode[11]"
        uint8
        enum "P012"
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 11);
    PARAM "Class_of_Device[11]"
        uint24
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 11);
    PARAM "Clock_Offset[11]"
        uint16
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 11);
    PARAM "RSSI[11]"
        int8
        min = -127
        max = 20
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 11);

    # - Response[12] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

        bdaddr
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 12);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Repetition_Mode[12]"
        uint8
        enum "R012"
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 12);
    PARAM "Page_Scan_Period_Mode[12]"
        uint8
        enum "P012"

    PARAM "Class_of_Device[12]"
        uint24
        present_if ("Num_Responses" > 12);

        max = 20

EVENT "Read Remote Extended Features Complete" 0x23
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "Page_Number"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Maximum_Page_Number"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Extended_LMP_Features"
        uint32
        # For now, there's only one page
        # See Bluetooth spec C:5.1.1, Bluetooth 1.2 spec Vol 2, C:3.3
        bitmap
        {
            {0x00000001, "3-slot packets"},
            {0x00000002, "5-slot packets"},
            {0x00000004, "Encryption"},
            {0x00000008, "Slot offset"},
            {0x00000010, "Timing accuracy"},
            {0x00000020, "Switch"},
            {0x00000040, "Hold mode"},
            {0x00000080, "Sniff mode"},
            {0x00000100, "Park mode"},
            {0x00000200, "Power control requests"},
            {0x00000400, "Channel quality driven data rate"},
            {0x00000800, "SCO link"},
            {0x00001000, "HV2 packets"},
            {0x00002000, "HV3 packets"},
            {0x00004000, "u-law log"},
            {0x00008000, "A-law log"},
            {0x00010000, "CVSD"},
            {0x00020000, "Paging scheme"},
            {0x00040000, "Power control"},
            {0x00080000, "3 transparent SCO data"},
            {0x00100000, "Flow control lag (bit0)"},
            {0x00200000, "Flow control lag (bit1)"},
            {0x00400000, "Flow control lag (bit2)"},
            {0x00800000, "Broadcast encryption"},
            {0x01000000, "Scatter mode"},
            {0x02000000, "Enhanced data rate ACL 2 Mbps mode"},
            {0x04000000, "Enhanced data rate ACL 3 Mbps mode"},
            {0x08000000, "Enhanced inquiry scan"},
            {0x10000000, "Interlaced inquiry scan"},
            {0x20000000, "Interlaced page scan"},
            {0x40000000, "RSSI with inquiry results"},
            {0x80000000, "Extended SCO link (EV3 packets)"}
        }
        present_if ( "Page_Number" = 0);

    PARAM "Extended_LMP_Features (63:32)"
        uint32
        bitmap
        {
            {0x00000001, "EV4 packets"},
            {0x00000002, "EV5 packets"},
            {0x00000004, "Absence masks"},
            {0x00000008, "AFH capable slave"},
            {0x00000010, "AFH classification slave"},
            {0x00000080, "3-slot enhanced data rate ACL packets"},
            {0x00000100, "5-slot enhanced data rate ACL packets"},  # byte 5, bit 0
            {0x00000200, "Sniff subrating"},                        # byte 5, bit 1, per 7/28/05 spec
            {0x00000400, "Pause Encryption"},
            {0x00000800, "AFH capable master"},                     # byte 5, bit 3
            {0x00001000, "AFH classification master"},
            {0x00002000, "Enhanced data rate eSCO 2 Mbps mode"},
            {0x00004000, "Enhanced data rate eSCO 3 Mbps mode"},
            {0x00008000, "3-slot enhanced data rate eSCO packets"},
            {0x00010000, "Extended inquiry response"},
            {0x00080000, "Secure Simple Pairing"},
            {0x00100000, "Encapsulated PDU"},
            {0x00200000, "Erroneous Data Reporting"},
            {0x00400000, "Non-flushable Packet Boundary Flag"},
            {0x01000000, "Link Supervision Timeout Changed Event"},
            {0x02000000, "Inquiry Response Tx Power Level"},
            {0x80000000, "Extended features"}
        }
        present_if ( "Page_Number" = 0);

    PARAM "Extended_LMP_Features (page 1, 31:0)"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "Secure Simple Pairing (Host Support)"},
                {0x00000002, "LE Supported (Host)"},
                {0x00000004, "Simultaneous LE and BR/EDR to Same Device Capable (Host)"},
                {0x00000008, "Secure Connections (Host Support)"}
            }
        present_if ( "Page_Number" = 1);

    PARAM "Extended_LMP_Features (page 1, 63:32)"
            uint32
        present_if ( "Page_Number" = 1);

    PARAM "Extended_LMP_Features (page 2, 31:0)"
            uint32
            bitmap
            {
                {0x00000001, "Connectionless Slave Broadcast - Master Operation"},
                {0x00000002, "Connectionless Slave Broadcast - Slave Operation"},
                {0x00000004, "Synchronization train (master)"},
                {0x00000008, "Synchronization train (slave)"},
                {0x00000010, "Inquiry Response Notification Event"},
                {0x00000020, "Generalized Interlaced Scan"},
                {0x00000040, "Coarse Clock Adjustment"},
                {0x00000080, "Reserved"},
                {0x00000100, "Secure Connections (Controller Support)"},
                {0x00000200, "Ping"},
                {0x00000400, "Slot Availability Mask"},
                {0x00000800, "Train Nudging"}
            }
        present_if ( "Page_Number" = 2);

    PARAM "Extended_LMP_Features (page 2, 63:32)"
            uint32
        present_if ( "Page_Number" = 2);
}

EVENT "Synchronous Connection Complete" 0x2C
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Link_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "SCO connection"},
            {0x01, "ACL connection"},
            {0x02, "eSCO connection"}
        };
    PARAM "Transmission_Interval"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Retransmission_Window"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Rx_Packet_Length"
        uint16;
    PARAM "Tx_Packet_Length"
        uint16;
    PARAM "Air_Mode"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "u-law log"},
            {0x01, "A-law log"},
            {0x02, "CVSD"},
            {0x03, "Transparent data"}
        };
}

#LE Meta Event
EVENT "LE Event" 0x03E
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0

    # present for all LE event code
    PARAM "LE_Event_Code"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "LE Connection Complete Event"},
            {0x02, "LE Advertising Report Event"},
            {0x03, "LE Connection Update Complete Event"},
            {0x04, "LE Read Remote Features Complete Event"},
            {0x05, "LE Long Term Key Request Event"},
            {0x06, "LE Remote connection Parameter Request Event"},
            {0x07, "LE Data Length Change Event"},
            {0x08, "LE Read Local P256 Public Key Complete Event"},
            {0x09, "LE Generate DHKey Complete Event"},
            {0x0A, "LE Enhanced Connection Complete Event"},
            {0x0B, "LE Direct Advertising Report Event"},
            {0x0C, "LE PHY Update Complete Event"},
            {0x0D, "LE Extended Advertising Report Event"},
            {0x0E, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Established Event"},
            {0x0F, "LE Periodic Advertising Report Event"},
            {0x10, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Lost Event"},
            {0x11, "LE Extended Scan Timeout Event"},
            {0x12, "LE Extended Advertising Set Terminated Event"},
            {0x13, "LE Scan Request Received Event"},
            {0x14, "LE Channel Selection Algorithm Event"},
            {0x15, "LE Connectionless IQ Report Event"},
            {0x16, "LE Connection IQ Report Event"},
            {0x17, "LE CTE Request Failed Event"},
            {0x18, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Transfer Received Event"},
            {0x19, "LE CIS Established Event"},
            {0x1A, "LE CIS Request Event"},
            {0x1B, "LE Create BIG Complete event"},
            {0x1C, "LE Terminate BIG Complete event"},
            {0x1D, "LE BIG Sync Established event"},
            {0x1E, "LE BIG Sync Lost event"},
            {0x1F, "LE Request Peer SCA Complete event"},
            {0x20, "LE Path Loss Threshold event"},
            {0x21, "LE Transmit Power Reporting event"},
            {0x22, "LE BIGInfo Advertising Report event"},
            {0x23, "LE Subrate Change event"},
            {0x24, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Established Event [V2]"},
            {0x25, "LE Periodic Advertising Report Event [V2]"},
            {0x26, "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Transfer Received Event V2"},
            {0x27, "LE Periodic Advertising Subevent Data Request Event"},
            {0x28, "LE Periodic Advertising Response Report event"},
            {0x29, "LE Enhanced Connection Complete V2 Event"},
            {0x31, "LE Read Remote Supported HADM Capabilities Complete event"},
            {0x32, "LE Read Remote HADM FAE Table Complete event"},
            {0x33, "LE Set HADM Security Enable Complete event"},
            {0x34, "LE Set HADM Config Complete event"},
            {0x35, "LE Set HADM Procedure Enable Complete event"},
            {0x36, "LE HADM Event Result event"},
            {0x37, "LE HADM Event Result Continue event"},
            {0x38, "LE HADM Test End Complete event"}
        };

    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x03) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x04) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x08) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x09) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0C) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x12) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x17) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1F) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x21) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x23) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));

    PARAM "Advertising_Handle"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x12) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x13));

    #############################################################
    # "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Transfer Received Event" 0x18
    # "LE Periodic Advertising Sync Transfer Received Event V2" 0x26
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));

    PARAM "Service_Data"
        uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));

    PARAM "Sync_Handle"
        uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x10) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x15) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));

    PARAM "Advertising_SID"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));

    # "LE Connection Complete Event" 0x01 and "LE Enhanced Connection Complete Event" 0x0A
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0C) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x12) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x16) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x17) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1F) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x20) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x21) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x23) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x32) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x33) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x37) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));

    PARAM "SCA"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x0, "master SCA 251 ppm to 500 ppm"},
            {0x1, "master SCA 151 ppm to 250 ppm"},
            {0x2, "master SCA 101 ppm to 150 ppm"},
            {0x3, "master SCA 76 ppm to 100 ppm"},
            {0x4, "master SCA 51 ppm to 75 ppm"},
            {0x5, "master SCA 31 ppm to 50 ppm"},
            {0x6, "master SCA 21 ppm to 30 ppm"},
            {0x7, "master SCA 0 ppm to 20 ppm"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1F);

    # "LE Subrate Change Event" 0x23
    PARAM "Subrate_Factor"
       uint16
       min = 0x01
       max = 0x01F4
       present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x23);

    PARAM "Peripheral_Latency"
       uint16
       min = 0x0
       max = 0x01F3
       present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x23);

    PARAM "Continuation_Number"
       uint16
       min = 0x0
       max = 0x01F3
       present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x23);

    PARAM "Supervision_Timeout"
       uint16
       min = 0x0A
       max = 0x0C80
       note "* 10ms"
       present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x23);

    PARAM "CIG_Sync_Delay"
        uint24
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "CIS_Sync_Delay"
        uint24
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "Transport_Latency_M_To_S"
        uint24
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "Transport_Latency_S_To_M"
        uint24
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "PHY_M_To_S"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "PHY_S_To_M"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "NSE"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "BN_M_To_S"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "BN_S_To_M"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "FT_M_To_M"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "FT_S_To_M"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "MAX_PDU_M_TO_S"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "MAX_PDU_M_TO_S"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "ISO_Interval"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x19);

    PARAM "ACL_Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1A);

    PARAM "CIS_Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1A);

    PARAM "CIG_ID"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1A);

    PARAM "CIS_ID"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1A);

    PARAM "BIG_Handle"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1C) or
                    ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1E));

    PARAM "Reason"
        errorcode8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1C) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1E));

    PARAM "BIG_Sync_Delay"
        uint24
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B);

    PARAM "Transport_Latency_BIG"
        uint24
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D));

    PARAM "PHY"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B);

    PARAM "Num_BIS"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "NSE"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22));

    PARAM "ISO_Interval"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "BN"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22));

    PARAM "PTO"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22));

    PARAM "IRC"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22));

    PARAM "MAX_PDU"
        uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22) );

    PARAM "ISO_Interval"
        uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D));

    PARAM "SDU_Interval"
        uint24
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "MAX_SDU"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "PHY"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "Framing"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "Encryption"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x22);

    PARAM "Num_BIS"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D));

    # - Entry[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BisConnection_Handle[0]"
        connhandle16
        present_if ((("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Num_BIS" > 0)) or
                    (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) and ("Num_BIS" > 0)));

    # - Entry[1] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BisConnection_Handle[1]"
        connhandle16
        present_if ((("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Num_BIS" > 1)) or
                    (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) and ("Num_BIS" > 1)));

    # - Entry[2] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BisConnection_Handle[2]"
        connhandle16
        present_if ((("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Num_BIS" > 2)) or
                    (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) and ("Num_BIS" > 2)));

    # - Entry[3] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "BisConnection_Handle[3]"
        connhandle16
        present_if ((("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Num_BIS" > 3)) or
                    (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x1D) and ("Num_BIS" > 3)));

        connhandle16

    # Num_BIS ranges from 0x01 to 0x1F(31), so index ends at 30
    # # - Entry[30] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    # PARAM "BisConnection_Handle[30]"
        # connhandle16

    PARAM "Num_Completed_Extended_Advertising_Events"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x12);

    PARAM "Role"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Connection is master"},
            {0x01, "Connection is slave"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Peer_Address_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Peer is using Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Peer is using Random Address"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01);
    PARAM "Peer_Address_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Peer is using Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Peer is using Random Address"},
            {0x02, "Public Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Scanner_Address_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Peer is using Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Peer is using Random Address"},
            {0x02, "Public Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x13);
    PARAM "Peer_Address"
        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Scanner_Address"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x13);
    PARAM "Local_Resolvable_Private_Address"
        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Peer_Resolvable_Private_Address"
        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));

    ####################################
    # LE Periodic Sync Established Event
    PARAM "Advertiser_Address_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Public Device Address or Public Identity Address"},
            {0x01, "Random Device Address or Random (static) Identity Address"},
            {0x02, "Public Identity Address (corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));
    PARAM "Advertiser_Address"
        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));

    PARAM "Advertiser_PHY"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "Advertiser PHY is LE 1M"},
            {0x02, "Advertiser PHY is LE 2M"},
            {0x03, "Advertiser PHY is LE Coded"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));

    PARAM "Connection_Interval"
        uint16
        #min = 0x0002
        max = 0x0C80
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Periodic_Advertising_Interval"
        uint16
        min = 0x0006
        max = 0xFFFF
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));
    PARAM "Connection_Latency"
        uint16
        min = 0x0000
        max = 0x01F4
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Supervision_Timeout"
        uint16
        #min = 0x000A
        max = 0x0C80
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Master_Clock_Accuracy"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "500 ppm"},
            {0x01, "250 ppm"},
            {0x02, "150 ppm"},
            {0x03, "100 ppm"},
            {0x04, "75 ppm"},
            {0x05, "50 ppm"},
            {0x06, "30 ppm"},
            {0x07, "20 ppm"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x01) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0A) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x29));
    PARAM "Advertiser_Clock_Accuracy"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "500 ppm"},
            {0x01, "250 ppm"},
            {0x02, "150 ppm"},
            {0x03, "100 ppm"},
            {0x04, "75 ppm"},
            {0x05, "50 ppm"},
            {0x06, "30 ppm"},
            {0x07, "20 ppm"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0E) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x18) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x26));


    # "Advertising Packet Report Event" 0x02 and "LE Direct Advertising Report Event" 0x0B
    PARAM "Num_Reports"
        uint8
        min = 1
        max = 19
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D));

    # - Advertise Packet[0] - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
    PARAM "Event_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Connectable Undirected Event"},
            {0x01, "Connectable Directed Event"},
            {0x02, "Discoverable Undirected Event"},
            {0x03, "Non-connectable Event"},
            {0x04, "Scan Response Event"},
            {0x05, "Connect Request Event"},    #for debugging
            {0x06, "Scan Request"}              #for debugging
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02);
    PARAM "Event_Type[0]"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
                {0x01, "Connectable advertising"},
                {0x02, "Scannable advertising"},
                {0x04, "Directed advertising"},
                {0x08, "Scan response"},
                {0x10, "Legacy advertising PDUs used"},
                {0x20, "incomplete, more data to come"},
                {0x40, "incomplete, data truncated, no more to come"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "Event_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "Connectable Directed Event"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B);

    PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Random Address"},
            {0x02, "Public Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"}
        }
        present_if ((("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and (("Event_Type[0]" = 0x00) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x01) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x02) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x03) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x04))) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B));
    PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Scan Public Address, Adv Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Scan Random Address, Adv Public Address"},
            {0x02, "Scan Public Address, Adv Random Address"},
            {0x03, "Scan Random Address, Adv Random Address"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x06));
    PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Initiator Public Address, Adv Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Initiator Random Address, Adv Public Address"},
            {0x02, "Initiator Public Address, Adv Random Address"},
            {0x03, "Initiator Random Address, Adv Random Address"}
        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));
    PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Public Address"},
            {0x01, "Random Address"},
            {0x02, "Public Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0xFF, "No address provided (anonymous advertisement)"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);

    PARAM "Address[0]"
        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B));

    PARAM "Primary_PHY[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Unknown"},
            {0x01, "LE 1M PHY"},
            {0x03, "LE Coded S8"},
            {0x04, "LE Coded S2"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "Secondary_PHY[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Unknown"},
            {0x01, "LE 1M PHY"},
            {0x02, "LE 2M PHY"},
            {0x03, "LE Coded S8"},
            {0x04, "LE Coded S2"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "Adv_Set_ID[0]"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);

    PARAM "Tx_Power[0]"
        int8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "Tx_Power"
        int8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F);

    PARAM "RSSI[0]"
        int8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "RSSI"
        int8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F);

    PARAM "Periodic_Advertising_Interval[0]"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);

    PARAM "Direct_Address_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
        {0x01, "Random Address"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B);

    PARAM "Direct_Address[0]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B);

    PARAM "Direct_Address_Type[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Public Device Address"},
            {0x01, "Random Device Address"},
            {0x02, "Public Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
            {0xFE, "Random Device Address (Controller unable to resolve)"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "Direct_Address[0]"
        bdaddr
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);

    #LE Periodic Advertising Report Event
    PARAM "CTE_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "AoA Constant Tone Extension"},
            {0x01, "AoD Constant Tone Extension with 1 us slots"},
            {0x02, "AoD Constant Tone Extension with 2 us slots"},
            {0xFF, "No Constant Tone Extension"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F);

    PARAM "Data_State"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Data complete"},
            {0x01, "Data incomplete, more data to come"},
            {0x02, "Data incomplete, data truncated, no more to come"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F);

    PARAM "Data_Len[0]"
        uint8
        min = 0x00
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02);
    PARAM "Data_Len[0]"
        uint8
        min = 0x00
        max = 236
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D);
    PARAM "Data_Length"
        uint8
        min = 0x00
        max = 247
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F);

    PARAM "Data[0]"
        uint8[249] omit_pad_bytes
        valid_length = "Data_Len[0]"
        present_if ((("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and (("Event_Type[0]" = 0x00) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x01) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x02) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x03) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x04))) and ("Data_Len[0]" > 0));
    PARAM "Data[0]"
        uint8[236] omit_pad_bytes
        valid_length = "Data_Len[0]"
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0D) and ("Data_Len[0]" > 0));
    PARAM "Data"
        uint8[247] omit_pad_bytes
        valid_length = "Data_Length"
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0F) and ("Data_Length" > 0));

    ################## PHY Update Complete Event
    PARAM "TX_PHY"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "the transmitter PHY for the connection is 1Ms/s"},
            {0x02, "the transmitter PHY for the connection is 2Ms/s"},
            {0x03, "the transmitter PHY for the connection is Coded"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0xC);

    PARAM "RX_PHY"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "the receiver PHY for the connection is 1Ms/s"},
            {0x02, "the receiver PHY for the connection is 2Ms/s"},
            {0x03, "the receiver PHY for the connection is Coded"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0xC);

        ############################### only for debugging
    #for scan request

        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x06));

    #for connection request
    PARAM "Initiator_Address[0]"
        bdaddr
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));

        uint32
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));

           uint8[3]
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));

           uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));

           uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));
    PARAM "Intervel"
           uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));
    PARAM "Latency"
           uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));
    PARAM "Timeout"
           uint16
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));
    PARAM "Channel_Map"
        uint8[5]
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));
        PARAM "Hop_SCA"
           #uint8{4:0}
           uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x05));

    # RSSI
    PARAM "RSSI[0]"
        int8
        min = -127
        max = 127
        note "127 means RSSI is not available, Range from -127 to 20 dbm"
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x02) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x0B));

        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "CRC was correct"},
            {0x01, "CRC was incorrect and the Length and CTETime fields used to determine sampling points"},

        }
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x15)or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x16)) ;

    #################################################################
    # LE Read Remote Supported HADM Capabilities Complete event 0x31
    PARAM "Status"

        uint8
        bitmap
        {
            {0x01, "Initiator"},
            {0x02, "Reflector"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "Modes_Supported"
        uint8
        bitmap
        {
            {0x00, "Mode 3"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "RTT_Capability"
        uint8
        bitmap
        {
            {0x01, "if set to 1, the value in RTT_Coarse_N is 10ns precision; otherwise, it is 150ns precision."},
            {0x02, "if set to 1, the value in RTT_Sounding_N is 10ns precision; otherwise, it is 150ns precision."},
            {0x04, "if set to 1, the value in RTT_Random_Payload_N is 10ns precision; otherwise, it is 150ns precision."}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "RTT_Coarse_N"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "RTT_Sounding_N"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "RTT_Random_Payload_N"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "CS_SYNC_PHYs_Supported"
        uint8
        bitmap
        {
            {0x01, "LE 2M PHY"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "Subfeatures_Supported"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
            {0x0001, "CS Companion"},
            {0x0002, "CS with no transmitter Frequency Actuation Error"},
            {0x0004, "CS Channel Selection Algorithm #3c"},
            {0x0008, "CS sounding phase based ranging"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "T_IP1_Times_Supported"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
            {0x01, "10us supported"},
            {0x02, "20us supported"},
            {0x04, "30us supported"},
            {0x08, "40us supported"},
            {0x10, "50us supported"},
            {0x20, "60us supported"},
            {0x40, "80us supported"},
            {0x80, "145us supported"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "T_IP2_Times_Supported"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
            {0x01, "10us supported"},
            {0x02, "20us supported"},
            {0x04, "30us supported"},
            {0x08, "40us supported"},
            {0x10, "50us supported"},
            {0x20, "60us supported"},
            {0x40, "80us supported"},
            {0x80, "145us supported"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "T_FCS_Times_Supported"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
            {0x0001, "15us supported"},
            {0x0002, "20us supported"},
            {0x0004, "30us supported"},
            {0x0008, "40us supported"},
            {0x0010, "50us supported"},

            {0x0080, "100us supported"},
            {0x0100, "120us supported"},
            {0x0200, "150us supported"}
