        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "T_PM_Times_Supported"
        uint16
        bitmap
        {
            {0x01, "10us supported"},
            {0x02, "20us supported"},
            {0x04, "40us supported"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);
    PARAM "T_SW_Times_Supported"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x31);

    #################################################################
    # LE Read Remote HADM FAE Table Complete event 0x32
    PARAM "Status"
        uint8
        present_if (("LE_Event_Code" = 0x32) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x33) or ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x38));
    PARAM "FAE_Table"
        uint8[72]
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x32);

    #################################################################
    # LE HADM Config Complete event 0x34
    PARAM "Config_ID"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Status"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Main_Mode_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "Mode 1"},
            {0x02, "Mode 2"},
            {0x03, "Mode 3"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Sub_Mode_Type"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "Mode 1"},
            {0x02, "Mode 2"},
            {0x03, "Mode 3"},
            {0xFF, "Unused"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Main_Mode_Min_Steps"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Main_Mode_Max_Steps"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Main_Mode_Repetition"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Mode_0_Steps"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "Role"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Initiator"},
            {0x01, "Reflector"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "RTT_Types"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "RTT Coarse"},
            {0x01, "RTT with 32-bit Sounding Sequence"},
            {0x02, "RTT with 96-bit Sounding Sequence"},
            {0x03, "RTT with 32-bit Random Payload"},
            {0x04, "RTT with 64-bit Random Payload"},
            {0x05, "RTT with 96-bit Random Payload"},
            {0x06, "RTT with 128_bit Random Payload"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);
    PARAM "CS_SYNC_PHY"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "LE 1M PHY"},
            {0x02, "LE 2M PHY"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x34);

    #################################################################
    # LE HADM Procedure Enable Complete event 0x35
    PARAM "Config_ID"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Status"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Enable"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "CS procedure is disabled"},
            {0x01, "CS procedure is enabled"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Tone_Antenna_Config_Selection"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "selected_TX_Power"
        int8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Subevent_Len"
        uint32
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Subevents_Per_Interval"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Subevent_Interval"
        uint32
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Event_Interval"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Procedure_Interval"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);
    PARAM "Procedures_Count"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x35);

    #################################################################
    # LE HADM Event Result event 0x36
    PARAM "Config_ID"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Start_ACL_Conn_Event"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Frequency_Compensation"
        uint16
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Procedure_Done_Status"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "All results complete for the CS procedure"},
            {0x01, "Partial results with more to follow for the CS procedure"},
            {0xFE, "Current CS procedure aborted"},
            {0xFF, "Current and all forthcoming CS procedures aborted"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Subevent_Done_Status"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "All results complete for the CS subevent"},
            {0x01, "Partial results with more to follow for the CS subevent"},
            {0xFE, "Current CS Event aborted"},
            {0xFF, "Current and all forthcoming CS subevents aborted in the CS procedure aborted"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Reference_Power_Level"
        int8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Num_Antenna_Paths"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Num_Steps_Reported"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Step_Status[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "CS step scheduled and reported"},
            {0xFE, "Current CS step aborted"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Step_Mode[0]"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Mode 0"},
            {0x01, "Mode 1"},
            {0x02, "Mode 2"},
            {0x03, "Mode 3"}
        }
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Step_Channel[0]"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);
    PARAM "Step_Data_Length[0]"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x36);


    #################################################################
    # LE HADM Event Result Continue event 0x37
    PARAM "Config_ID"
        uint8
        present_if ("LE_Event_Code" = 0x37);
    PARAM "Procedure_Done_Status"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "All results complete for the CS procedure"},

        {
            {0x00, "All results complete for the CS subevent"},
            {0x01, "Partial results with more to follow for the CS subevent"},

        uint8

EVENT "Synchronization Train Complete" 0x4F
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
}

EVENT "Synchronization Train Received" 0x50
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "Clock_Offset"
        uint32;
    PARAM "AFH_Channel_Map"
        uint8[10] little_endian;
    PARAM "LT_ADDR"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Next_Broadcast_Instant"
        uint32;
    PARAM "Broadcast_Interval"
        uint16;
    PARAM "Service_Data"
        uint8;
}

EVENT "Connectionless Broadcast Receive" 0x51
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "LT_ADDR"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Clock"
        uint32;
    PARAM "Offset"
        uint32;
    PARAM "Receive_Status"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Fragment"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0, "Continuation Fragment"},
            {1, "Starting Fragment"},
            {2, "Ending Fragment"},
            {3, "Single fragment (no fragmentation)"}
        };
    PARAM "Data_Length"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Data"
        uint8[235] omit_pad_bytes
        valid_length = "Data_Length";
}

EVENT "Connectionless Broadcast Timeout" 0x52
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
    PARAM "LT_ADDR"
        uint8;
}

EVENT "Truncated Page Complete" 0x53
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Status"
        errorcode8;
    PARAM "BD_ADDR"
        bdaddr;
}

EVENT "Slave Page Response Timeout" 0x54
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
}

EVENT "Connectionless Slave Broadcast Channel Map Change" 0x55
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "AFH_Channel_Map"
        uint8[10] little_endian;
}

EVENT "Inquiry Response Notification" 0x56
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "LAP"
        uint24;
    PARAM "RSSI"
        int8
        min = -100
        max = 127
        note "Range: -100 <= N <= 20, +127 indicates unknown RSSI";
}

EVENT "Authenticated Payload Timeout Expired" 0x57
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
}

EVENT "SAM Status Change Event" 0x58
{
    devs "*"=1, "BCM2035"=0, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Connection_Handle"
        connhandle16;
    PARAM "Local_SAM_Index"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Local_SAM_Tx_Availability"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Local_SAM_Rx_Availability"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Remote_SAM_Index"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Remote_SAM_Tx_Availability"
        uint8;
    PARAM "Remote_SAM_Rx_Availability"
        uint8;
}


EVENT "Vendor Specific Sleep Mode" 0xEF
{
    # Note: this is an illegal event code for a vendor-specific event.  This spec violation is
    # preserved for backward compatibility
    devs "*"=0, "BCM2035"=1, "BCM2045"=1, "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0

    PARAM "Sleep_Mode_Message"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "Sleep request ACK"},
            {0x02, "Sleep request NACK"},
            {0x03, "Sleep request"},
            {0x04, "Wakeup request ACK"}
        };
}

EVENT "Vendor Specific" 0xFF
{
    devs    "*"=1 ( "First byte: Vendor Specific event code, 0xFF<br>"
                    "Second byte: Event length per Bluetooth core specification<br>"
                    "Third byte: Event_Sub_Code<br>"
                    "<br>"
                    "More bytes follow depending on Event_Sub_Code." ),
            "BCM2040"=0, "BCM2042"=0
    PARAM "Event_Sub_Code"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "Automatic pairing request"},
            {0x02, "Rx complete"},
            {0x03, "Link Quality Report"},
            {0x04, "IOP Test Rx 1 Packet Report"},
            {0x05, "IOP Test Rx N Packets Report Summary"},
            {0x06, "Module XRAM Test Report Summary"},

            {0x0B, "TCA Debug Report"},

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "NULL"},
            {0x01, "POLL"},
            {0x02, "FHS"},

            {0x0D, "EV5 / 3-EV5"},
            {0x0E, "DM5 / 2-DH5"},
            {0x0F, "DH5 / 3-DH5"}
        }
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x02);

        uint16
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x02);
    PARAM "Payload"
        uint8[240]
        valid_length = if ("Packet_Length" > 240) then 240 else "Packet_Length"
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x02);

        # Dump Type = 0x03, "Core Dump"
        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            PARAM "Length"
                uint8
                present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03));
            PARAM "Checksum"
                uint8
                present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03));
            PARAM "CoreDumpType"
                uint8
                enum
                {
                    {0x01, "Info"},
                    {0x02, "CPU Regs"},
                    {0x03, "RAM Image"},
                    {0x04, "HW Regs"},
                    {0x05, "CPU Regs Extend"},
                    {0x06, "Debug Variables"},
                    {0x07, "FW Assert Event"},
                    {0xFF, "Core Dump End"}
                }
                present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03));
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            # Core Dump Type = 0x01, "Info"
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                PARAM "Tag"
                    uint8
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));
                PARAM "Reserved"
                    uint16
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));
                PARAM "Chip ID"
                    uint32
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));
                PARAM "Warning"
                    uint32
                    bitmap
                    {
                        {0x00000001, "OS Queue Alloc Fail"},
                        {0x00000002, "OS Queue Free Fail"},
                        {0x00000004, "OS Queue Send Fail"},

                    }
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    uint8
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));

                    uint8[196]
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x1));
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            # Core Dump Type = 0x02, "CPU Registers"
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                PARAM "NofCPURegs"
                    uint8
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2));
                PARAM "CM3 SP"
                    uint32
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2) and ("NofCPURegs" = 10));
                PARAM "CM3 PC"
                    uint32
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2) and ("NofCPURegs" = 10));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2) and ("NofCPURegs" = 10));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2) and ("NofCPURegs" = 10));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2) and ("NofCPURegs" = 10));
                PARAM "CM3 Unused"
                    uint8[196]
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x2) and ("NofCPURegs" = 10));
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            # Core Dump Type = 0x03, "RAM Image"
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                PARAM "Memory Size"
                    uint8
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x3));
                PARAM "Reserved"
                    uint16
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x3));

                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x3));

                    uint8[232]
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x3));
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            # Core Dump Type = 0x04, "HW Registers"
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                PARAM "Number of Registers"
                    uint8
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x4));
                PARAM "Reserved"
                    uint16
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x4));
                PARAM "Address (CPUID)"
                    uint32
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x4));

            # Core Dump Type = 0x07, "FW Assert Event"
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                PARAM "Type"
                    uint32
                    enum
                    {
                        {0x00, "ERROR"},
                        {0x01, "ALERT"},
                        {0x02, "FATAL"}
                    }
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x7));
                PARAM "Level Module ID"
                    uint32
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x7));
                PARAM "ID"
                    uint32
                    enum
                    {
                        {0x80004600, "BT HW Scheduler memory access conflict"}
                    }
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x7));

                    uint8[227]
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0x7));

            # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                PARAM "Unused"
                    uint8[239]
                    present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x03) and ("CoreDumpType" = 0xFF));

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

                uint8
                present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x1B) and ("Dump Type" = 0x05));

                {0x0008, "INT_EVT_TX_BUFFER_OVERFLOW"}
            };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x20, "LE_DVT Report "
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Report_Cmd"
           uint8
           present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20)
           enum
           {
              {0x0, "DVT TxRx Log"},
              {0x1, "ConnTest DVT Report"},
              {0x2, "ScanTest DVT Report"}
           };
#RawData
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log ModuleId"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0, "ConnTest"},
                {1, "Scan"},
                {2, "Adv"},
                {3, "Init"},
                {4, "Conn"},
                {5, "Test"}
            }
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log DataType"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Undefined"},
                {0x01, "RX Pkt"},
                {0x02, "TX Pkt"},
                {0x03, "TX Pkt as RSP"}
            }
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log DataSize"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log Status"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log pktLog"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log Header"
            uint16
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );
        PARAM "LE_DVT_Log Data"
            uint8[60] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("LE_DVT_Log Data")
            min = 0
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x0) );

# ConnTest report
        PARAM "TxTotalPackets"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );
        PARAM "TxCrcErrors"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );
         PARAM "TxNoRsp"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );
        PARAM "RxTotalPackets"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );
        PARAM "RxGoodPackets"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );
        PARAM "RxSyncErrors"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );
        PARAM "RxCrcErrors"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x20) and ("LE_DVT_Report_Cmd" = 0x1) );

            int8
            min = -110
            max = 0
            note "dB"
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x49);


    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x4a, "LTE WCI-2 Transparent Data Received"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

        uint8
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4a);

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x4b, "LTE WCI-2 Message Received"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            PARAM "LTE WCI-2 Byte Received"
        uint8
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4b);

            PARAM "LTE WCI-2 Type Received"
        uint8
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4b);

            PARAM "LTE WCI-2 Type-0 Data Received"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x01, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x02, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x03, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x04, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x05, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x06, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x07, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x08, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x09, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x0A, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x0B, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x0C, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x0D, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x0E, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x0F, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x10, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x11, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x12, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x13, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:0 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x14, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},
            {0x15, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:0 / BT_RX_PRI:1"},
            {0x16, "WLAN_TX:0 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:0"},

            {0x1F, "WLAN_TX:1 / WLAN_RX_PRI:1 / BT_TX:1 / BT_RX_PRI:1"}
        }
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4b) and ("LTE WCI-2 Type Received" = 0));

            PARAM "LTE WCI-2 Data Received"
        uint8
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4b) and ("LTE WCI-2 Type Received" != 0));

        uint8
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4C);
    PARAM "Partially_Received_Packets"

        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4C);

        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x4D) and ("Num_Broadcast_Channels" > 0));

        uint16
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "BT GPIO Address"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "BT GPIO Trigger Type"
        uint16
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "BT GPIO Bit Position"
        uint16
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "WLAN GPIO Address"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "WLAN GPIO Trigger Type"
        uint16
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "WLAN GPIO Bit Position"
        uint16
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "Max Clients"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "CSB **"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    PARAM "CSB *"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF2));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # BLOW subevent = 0xF3, "BLOW Ctrl Msg"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    PARAM "Address"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF3));

    PARAM "Length"
        uint32
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF3));

    PARAM "Direction"
        uint8
        enum
            {
                {0x00, "BT->WL"},
                {0x01, "WL->BT"}
            }
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF3));

        PARAM "CTRL MSG"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT_READY          "},
            {0x02,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_SETUP        "},
            {0x03,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_SETUP_ACK    "},
            {0x04,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_GO           "},
            {0x05,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_READY        "},
            {0x06,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_OFF1         "},
            {0x07,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_OFF2         "},
            {0x08,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_OFF3         "},
            {0x09,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_START_RESUME      "},
            {0x0A,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT_DISC           "},
            {0x0B,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT_DISC_ACK       "},
            {0x0C,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_LINK_DROP    "},
            {0x0D,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_LINK_DROP_ACK"},
            {0x0E,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_SUSPEND_FAIL      "},
            {0x0F,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_RESUME_FAIL       "},
            {0x10,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_RSSI_REQ     "},
            {0x11,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WLAN_RSSI_RSP     "},
            {0x12,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT_RESET_REQ      "},
            {0x13,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT_RESET_ACK      "},
            {0x14,"BLOW_CTRL_MSG_SHUTDOWN_WLAN     "},
            {0x15, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT2WL_INTR          "},
            {0x16, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WL2BT_INTR          "},
            {0x17, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT2WL_INTR_ACK      "},
            {0x18, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WL2BT_INTR_ACK      "},
            {0x19, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT2WL_INTR_CLEAR    "},
            {0x1A, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WL2BT_INTR_CLEAR    "},
            {0x1B, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_BT2WL_INTR_ACK_CLEAR"},
            {0x1C, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_WL2BT_INTR_ACK_CLEAR"},
            {0x1D, "BLOW_CTRL_MSG_GCI_INTR"}
        }
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF3));

    PARAM "Data"
        uint8[128] omit_pad_bytes
        valid_length = ByteArrayValidLength("Data")
        min = 0
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x5B) and ("subevent" = 0xF3));

            max = 20

    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x6B, "Microsoft Report Event"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    PARAM "MSFT_Event_Code"
        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x01, "HCI_VS_MSFT_RSSI_Event"},
            {0x02, "HCI_VS_MSFT_LE_Monitor_Device_Event"}

        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x6B) and ("MSFT_Event_Code" = 0x01));

        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x6B) and ("MSFT_Event_Code" = 0x01));

        PARAM "MSFT_Rssi_Event_RSSI"
        int8
        note "dB"
        present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x6B) and ("MSFT_Event_Code" = 0x01));

        uint8
        enum
        {
            {0x00, "Public Device Address"},
            {0x01, "Random Device Address"}

            {0x00, "Stopped Monitoring"},

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x7C, "Preferred Rate Event"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16
                        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7C);
        PARAM "Enhanced Data Rate"
            uint8{7:3}
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Use DM1 packets or EDR not supported"},
                {0x01, "EDR: No packet-size pref, use 2 Mbps packets"},
                {0x02, "EDR: No packet-size pref, use 3 Mbps packets"},
                {0x04, "EDR: 1-slot packets, use DM1 packets"},
                {0x05, "EDR: 1-slot packets, use 2 Mbps packets"},
                {0x06, "EDR: 1-slot packets, use 3 Mbps packets"},
                {0x08, "EDR: 3-slot packets, use DM1 packets"},
                {0x09, "EDR: 3-slot packets, use 2 Mbps packets"},
                {0x0A, "EDR: 3-slot packets, use 3 Mbps packets"},
                {0x0C, "EDR: 5-slot packets, use DM1 packets"},
                {0x0D, "EDR: 5-slot packets, use 2 Mbps packets"},
                {0x0E, "EDR: 5-slot packets, use 3 Mbps packets"}
            }
                        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7C);
        PARAM "Basic Rate"
            uint8{2:0}
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Basic: No packet-size pref, use FEC"},
                {0x01, "Basic: No packet-size pref, no FEC"},
                {0x02, "Basic: 1-slot packets, use FEC"},
                {0x03, "Basic: 1-slot packets, no FEC"},
                {0x04, "Basic: 3-slot packets, use FEC"},
                {0x05, "Basic: 3-slot packets, no FEC"},
                {0x06, "Basic: 5-slot packets, use FEC"},
                {0x07, "Basic: 5-slot packets, no FEC"}
            }
                        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7C);

            uint8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "History_Length"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x08));

        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code = 0x0A, "LE Connection BTSync Time"
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Piconet Time Offset"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0A));

        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code = 0x0B, "LE Connection BTSync Clock"
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Piconet Clock"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0B));

        PARAM "Piconet Phase Clock"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0B));


        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code = 0x0C, "Transport switch notification"
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0C));

        PARAM "Event_Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "TS_ACCEPTED"},
                {0x01, "TS_REJECTED_HOST_RESPONSE"},
                {0x02, "TS_REJECTED_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES"},
                {0x03, "TS_REJECTED_SWITCH_IN_PROGRESS"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0C));

        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code = 0x0D, "LE Scan Cache"
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Current Time Stamp"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "Last Time Stamp"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "Event_Type[0]"
            uint8
            enum
            {   {0x00, "Connectable Undirected Event"},
                {0x01, "Connectable Directed Event"},
                {0x02, "Discoverable Undirected Event"},
                {0x03, "Non-connectable Event"},
                {0x04, "Scan Response Event"},
                {0x05, "Connect Request Event"},    #for debugging
                {0x06, "Scan Request"}              #for debugging
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
            uint8
            enum
            {   {0x00, "Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Random Address"},
                {0x02, "Public Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"},
                {0x03, "Random (static) Identity Address (Corresponds to Resolved Private Address)"}
            }
            present_if ((("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D)) and (("Event_Type[0]" = 0) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 1) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 2) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 3) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 4)));

        PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
            uint8
            enum
            {   {0x00, "Scan Public Address, Adv Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Scan Random Address, Adv Public Address"},
                {0x02, "Scan Public Address, Adv Random Address"},
                {0x03, "Scan Random Address, Adv Random Address"}
            }
            present_if ((("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D)) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 0x6));

        PARAM "Address_Type[0]"
            uint8
            enum
            { {0x00, "Initiator Public Address, Adv Public Address"},
                {0x01, "Initiator Random Address, Adv Public Address"},
                {0x02, "Initiator Public Address, Adv Random Address"},
                {0x03, "Initiator Random Address, Adv Random Address"}
            }
            present_if ((("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D)) and ("Event_Type[0]" = 5));

        PARAM "Address[0]"
            bdaddr
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "RSSI[0]" int8
            min = -127
            max = 127
            note "127 means RSSI is not available, Range from -127 to 20 dbm"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "Data_Len[0]"
            uint8
            min = 0x00
            #max = 249
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "Data[0]"
            uint8[249]
            omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Data_Len[0]"
            present_if ((("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xE9) and ("Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code" = 0x0D)) and (("Event_Type[0]" = 0) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 2) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 3) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 4) or ("Event_Type[0]" = 1)) and ("Data_Len[0]" > 0));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0xEA, "Payload"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    	PARAM "Payload Offset"
    		uint8
    		present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xEA);
    	PARAM "Payload Length"
    		uint8
    		present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xEA);
    	PARAM "Payload[]"
    		uint8[249]
    		present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xEA);

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x3E, "Phone Comes Back"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x3E);

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x3F, "Phone Goes Away"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x3F);

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x70, "Flood Mesh Event"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "MeshEvent"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_RAW_DATA"},
                {0x01, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_ACTUATOR_DATA"},
                {0x02, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_P2M_DATA"},
                {0x03, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_P2P_DATA"},
                {0x04, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_P2P_ACK"},
                {0x05, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_SYNC_INFO"},
                {0x06, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_P2M_ACK"},
                {0xFE, "HCI_FLOODMESH_EVT_DBG_INFO"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70);
        PARAM "src_id"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x00) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x03) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x04) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x06)));
        PARAM "ack_type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "P2P NO ACK"},
                {0x01, "P2P WITH ACK"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x03));
        PARAM "p2m_ack_type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "P2M NO ACK"},
                {0x01, "P2M WITH ACK"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x02));
        PARAM "p2m_ack_ref"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x02));
        PARAM "ack_ref"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x03));
        PARAM "data_len"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x00) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x03)));
        PARAM "raw_data"
            uint8[19] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "data_len"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x00));
        PARAM "ctrl_byte"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x01));
        PARAM "p2m_data"
            uint8[18] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "data_len"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x02));

        PARAM "p2p_data"
            uint8[13] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "data_len"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x03));

        PARAM "ack_ref"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x04));
        PARAM "ack_timeout"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x04));
        PARAM "ack_len"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x04));
        PARAM "ack_data"
            uint8[13] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "ack_len"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x04));
        PARAM "p2m_ack_ref"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x06));
        PARAM "p2m_ack_timeout"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x06));
        PARAM "p2m_ack_len"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x06));
        PARAM "p2m_ack_data"
            uint8[13] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "p2m_ack_len"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x06));
        PARAM "info_len"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x05));
        PARAM "info"
            uint8[128] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "info_len"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x05));
        PARAM "module"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "MESH_MODULE_APP"},
                {0x01, "MESH_MODULE_HCI"},
                {0x02, "MESH_MODULE_CORE"},
                {0x03, "MESH_MODULE_LIST"},
                {0x04, "MESH_MODULE_UTIL"},
                {0x05, "MESH_MODULE_DSM"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0xFE));
        PARAM "state"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0xFE));
        PARAM "evt"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0xFE));
        PARAM "param"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x70) and ("MeshEvent" = 0xFE));

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------

            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x71);

            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA0));
        PARAM "DMM General Pool[2]"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA0));
        PARAM "DMM General Pool[3]"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA0));
        PARAM "DMM General Pool[4]"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA0));
        PARAM "DMM General Pool[5]"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA0));
        # DMM Special Mem Pool Info ----------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "ACL to Host Memory Pool"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA1));
        PARAM "Host to ACL Memory Pool"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA1));
        PARAM "BLE to Host Memory Pool"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA1));
        PARAM "Host to BLE Memory Pool"
            uint8[16]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0xA1));
        # Unit test / RPC --------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Unit Test / RPC Result"
            uint32
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "HSR Unit Test RPC Result: Failed"},
                {0x01, "HSR Unit Test RPC Result: Passed"},
                {0x02, "HSR Unit Test RPC Result: Alternate Notification"},
                {0x03, "HSR Unit Test RPC Result: Not Applicable"},
                {0x04, "HSR Unit Test RPC Result: Inactive ID"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x78) and ("HSR_Subevent" = 0x10));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x079, "Enhanced Connectionless Rx Test Statistics"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Sync_Timeout_Count"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "HEC_Error_Count"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Total_Received_Packets"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Good_Packets"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "CRC_Error_Packets"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Total_Received_Bits"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Good_Bits"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Error_Bits"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Rx_Pkt_Payload_Hdr_Length_Errors"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Rx_Pkt_Attempts"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);
        PARAM "Rx_Pkt_Errors"
            uint32
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x079);

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x07B, "Smart Mesh Event"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "MeshEvent"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "HCI_SMARTMESH_EVT_DATA"},
                {0x02, "HCI_SMARTMESH_EVT_DEVICE_DATA"},
                {0x03, "HCI_SMARTMESH_MESH_PACKET_EVENT"},
                {0x04, "HCI_SMARTMESH_EVT_GENERIC_BEACON"},
                {0x05, "HCI_SMARTMESH_EVT_SECURE_BEACON"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B);

        PARAM "mesh_index"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x04) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x05)));
        PARAM "net_key_index"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x04) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x05)));
        PARAM "app_key_index"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x01));
        PARAM "SRC"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02)));
        PARAM "DEST"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x04)));
        PARAM "ttl"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02)));
        PARAM "data_length"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and (("MeshEvent" = 0x01) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x02) or ("MeshEvent" = 0x03)));
        PARAM "is_iv_update"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x05));
        PARAM "is_kr_set"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x05));
        PARAM "current_iv"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x05));
        PARAM "data"
            uint8[224] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "data_length"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x01));
        PARAM "mesh_packet_data"
            uint8[31] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "data_length"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x03));
        PARAM "device_data"
            uint8[224] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "data_length"
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x7B) and ("MeshEvent" = 0x02));
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x07A, "CoEx Debug Counter Event"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    PARAM "HCI_handle[0]"
        uint8
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x07A);

        uint8

        uint8
        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x07A);

        present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x07A);

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x7E, "SAM Events"

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x84, "CSB Streamer Events"
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "CSB_Streamer_Subevent"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Sync Train Complete Subevent"},
                {0x01, "Sync Train Received Subevent"},
                {0x02, "Packet Transmitted Subevent"},
                {0x03, "CSB Timeout Subevent"},
                {0x04, "AFH Channel Map Change Subevent"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84);

        ##############  Subevent 0x00 = Sync Train Complete Subevent ##############
        PARAM "Sync_Train_Complete_Status"
            errorcode8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x00));

        ##############  Subevent 0x01 = Sync Train Received Subevent ##############
        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Status"
            errorcode8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_BD_ADDR"
            bdaddr
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Clock_Offset"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_AFH_Channel_Map"
            uint8[10] little_endian
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Service_Data"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_RSSI"
            int8
            min = -120
            max = 20
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels"
            uint8
            max = 4
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01));

        #--------------
        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_LT_ADDR[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 1));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Next_Broadcast_Instant[0]"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 1));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Broadcast_Interval[0]"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 1));

        #--------------
        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_LT_ADDR[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 2));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Next_Broadcast_Instant[1]"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 2));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Broadcast_Interval[1]"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 2));
        #--------------
        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_LT_ADDR[2]"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 3));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Next_Broadcast_Instant[2]"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 3));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Broadcast_Interval[2]"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 3));
        #--------------
        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_LT_ADDR[3]"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 4));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Next_Broadcast_Instant[3]"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 4));

        PARAM "Sync_Train_Received_Broadcast_Interval[3]"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x01) and ("Sync_Train_Received_Num_Channels" = 4));

        ##############  Subevent 0x02 = Packet Transmitted Subevent ##############
        PARAM "Packet_Transmitted_LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x02));

            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x02));
