            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x02));

        PARAM "Packet_Transmitted_Free_Buffers"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x02));

        PARAM "Packet_Transmitted_Queue_Size"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x02));

        ##############  Subevent 0x03 = CSB Timeout Subevent ##############
        PARAM "CSB_Timeout_LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x03));

        PARAM "CSB_Timeout_Connection_Handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x03));

        ##############  Subevent 0x04 = AFH Channel Map Change Subevent ##############
        PARAM "AFH_Channel_Map_Change_LT_ADDR"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x04));

        PARAM "AFH_Channel_Map"
            uint8[10] little_endian
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x84) and ("CSB_Streamer_Subevent" = 0x04));
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x86, "LRAC Meta Event"
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "LRAC_Subevent"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LRAC Connection Status"},
                {0x01, "LRAC FW Statistics"},
                {0x02, "LRAC PS Switch Ready"},
                {0x03, "LRAC PS Switch Executed"},
                {0x04, "LRAC Pause/Unpause Completed"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86);

        ##############  Subevent 0x00 = Eavesdropping Complete Event ##############
        PARAM "LRAC Connection Status"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LRAC Status Connected"},
                {0x01, "LRAC Status Disconnected"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "LRAC Pause/Unpause"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Unpause"},
                {0x01, "Pause"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x04));

# TODO: clean up convention for underscores in names

        PARAM "LRAC_PS_Ready_Status"
            errorcode8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x02));

        PARAM "LRAC_PS_Pause_Status"
            errorcode8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x04));

        PARAM "LRAC_PS_Executed_Local_Status"
            errorcode8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x03));

        PARAM "LRAC_PS_Executed_Remote_Status"
            errorcode8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x03));

        PARAM "LRAC PS Connection Handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and (("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x02) or ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x03)));

        PARAM "LRAC PS Connection Role"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Master"},
                {0x01, "Slave"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x03));

        PARAM "LRAC Connection Handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and (("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x00) or ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x04)));

        PARAM "LRAC BD Address"
            uint8[6]
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "LRAC Reason"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "Eavesdropping Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "SCO"},
                {0x01, "ACL"},
                {0x02, "eSCO"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x00));

        ##############  Subevent 0x00 = Eavesdropping Complete Event ##############

        PARAM "LRAC FW Statistics Connection Handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Number of Good Packets"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Number of Retransmissions"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Number of Missed Packets"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Number of Bad Packets"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x86) and ("LRAC_Subevent" = 0x01));

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0x8C, "BMS Meta Event"
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "BMS_Subevent"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "BMS PAWR Subevent Time"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C);

        ##############  Subevent 0x00 = PAWR Subevent Time ##############
        PARAM "BMS_Handle"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C) and ("BMS_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "Status"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Valid PAWR Subevent Time"},
                {0x01, "Invalid PAWR Subevent Time Miss TX"},
                {0x02, "Invalid PAWR Subevent Time Miss RX"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C) and ("BMS_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "Type"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Periodic ADV"},
                {0x01, "Periodic Scan"}
            }
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C) and ("BMS_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "Advertising_Handle_Or_Sync_Handle"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C) and ("BMS_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "SubeventCounter"
            uint16
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C) and ("BMS_Subevent" = 0x00));

        PARAM "SubeventTimeUs"
            uint32
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" = 0x8C) and ("BMS_Subevent" = 0x00));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_Sub_Code = 0xF0-0xFF, "Customer Specific Group Commands"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # COMMON FEATURES OF ALL CS CHANNELS EVENTS:

        PARAM "RESERVED"
            uint8
            present_if (("Event_Sub_Code" > 0xEF) and ("Event_Sub_Code" != 0xFC));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event "Customer Specific-Additional Bluetooth Functionality Group Events" 0xF0
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "HCI_ext_eventcode"
            uint8
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0)
            enum
            {
                {0x03, "PWR_CONSUMPTION"},
                {0x07, "ENCRYPTION_KEY_LENGTH_READ_EVENT"},
                {0x08, "READ_ACL_RETRANSMISSION_COUNTER_EVENT"},
                {0x09, "WRITE_COEX_ACL_PRIORITY_EVENT"}

            };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x03, "PWR_CONSUMPTION"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Power Consumption Status"
            uint32
            min = 0x0
            max = 0xFFFFFFFE
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x03) );
        PARAM "Current Consumption Minimum"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x03) );
        PARAM "Current Consumption Maximum"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x03) );


    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x07, "ENCRYPTION_KEY_LENGTH_READ_EVENT"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Connection handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x07) );
        PARAM "Encryption length"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x07) )
            note "bits, 0=invalid connection handle";

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x08, "READ_ACL_RETRANSMISSION_COUNTER_EVENT"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Connection handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x08) )
            note "Range: 0x0000-0x0EFF";
        PARAM "Retransmission_Counter"
            uint32
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x08) );

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x09, "WRITE_COEX_ACL_PRIORITY_EVENT"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Connection handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x09) )
            note "Range: 0x0000-0x0EFF";
        PARAM "Status"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Priority level applied successfully"},
                {0x01, "New Priority level was not applied successfully"}
            }
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF0) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x09) );


    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event "Customer Specific-Local Messages Group Events" 0xF3
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "HCI_ext_eventcode"
            uint8
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3)
            enum
            {
                {0x21, "LOC_INFO_READ"},
                {0x05, "LOC_PROD_INFO_READ"},
                {0x85, "LOC_SET_HOST_WAKE_UP"},
                {0x86, "LOC_READ_BT_WAKE_UP"},
                {0x89, "LOC_WLAN_COEX_TEST"},
                {0x01, "LOC_SELF_TEST_RUN"},
                {0x12, "LOC_SELF_TEST_RESULT_GET"},
                {0x25, "LOC_BER_TEST_START"},
                {0x27, "LOC_BER_TEST_RESULT_GET"},
                {0x31, "LOC_BER_PER_TEST_RESULT_GET"},
                {0x39, "LOC_EVENT_FTD_ACTIVATE"},
                {0x40, "LOC_EVENT_FTD_DEACTIVATE"},
                {0x88, "LOC_AUDIO_ROUTING_CONTROL"},
                {0x91, "LOC_VENDOR_DEBUG_CONTROL"},
                {0x92, "LOC_DEBUG_FRAMEWORK"},
                                {0x90, "LOC_SET_MAX_BT_POWER"},
                {0x93, "LOC_RSSI_MONITORING"},
                {0x94, "LOC_RSSI_MONITORING_ALERT"},
                {0x95, "LOC_LE_ADV_REPORTING_CFG"},
                {0x96, "LOC_LE_RP_ADDR_RESOLUTION_CFG"}
        };
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x90, "LOC_SET_MAX_BT_POWER"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Status"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                                {  0x00, "LOC_SET_BT_MAX_POWER_SUCCESS"},
                                {  0x01, "LOC_SET_BT_MAX_POWER_OUT_OF_RANGE"},
                                {  0x02, "LOC_SET_BT_MAX_POWER_CONNECTION_EXISTS"},
                                {  0x03, "LOC_SET_BT_MAX_POWER_UNSPECIFIED_REASON"}

            }
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x90) );

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x21, "LOC_INFO_READ"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x21) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0xC5, "LOC_ERROR_NO_VERSION"},
                {0x10, "LOC_ERROR_PARAM_NOT_SUPPORTED"}
            };

        PARAM "Info-Type"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x21) )
            enum
            {
                {0x01, "LPRF_INFO_MCU_EXT_SW_VER"},
                {0x02, "LPRF_INFO_EXT_SW_CHECKSUM"},
                {0x41, "LPRF_SW_RELEASE_DAY_MONTH_YEAR"}
            };

        PARAM "Length of SW Information"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x21) )
            max = 249;

        PARAM "Software Version"
            utf8[249] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of SW Information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x21) and ("Info-Type" = 0x01));

        PARAM "Software Checksum"
            utf8[249] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of SW Information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x21) and ("Info-Type" = 0x02));

        PARAM "Software Release Date"
            utf8[249] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of SW Information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x21) and ("Info-Type" = 0x41));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x05, "LOC_PROD_INFO_READ"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x12, "LOC_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER"},
                {0xC2, "LOC_ERROR_NO_PROD_INFO"}
            };

        PARAM "Info-Type"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) )
            enum
            {
                {0x0C, "LPRF_PROD_HW"},
                {0x0D, "LPRF_PROD_CODE"},
                {0x0E, "LPRF_PROD_CODE_BASIC"},
                {0x40, "LPRF_HW_RELEASE_DAY_MONTH_YEAR"},
                {0x13, "LPRF_PROD_BT_COUNTRY_CODE"},
                {0x43, "PROD_MANUFACTORER"}
            };

        PARAM "Destination"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) );


        PARAM "Length of product information"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) )
            max = 245;

        PARAM "Hw Product Information"
            utf8[245] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of product information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) and ("Info-Type" = 0x0C));

        PARAM "Product Code"
            utf8[245] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of product information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) and ("Info-Type" = 0x0D));

        PARAM "Product Code Basic"
            utf8[245] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of product information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) and ("Info-Type" = 0x0E));

        PARAM "Hardware Release Date"
            utf8[245] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of product information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) and ("Info-Type" = 0x40));

        PARAM "Product Bluetooth Country Code"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "North America & Europe and Japan"},
                {0x01, "France"}
            }
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) and ("Info-Type" = 0x13));

        PARAM "Product Manufacturer"
            utf8[245] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "Length of product information"
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x05) and ("Info-Type" = 0x43));

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x84, "LOC_SET_SLEEP_CLOCK"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x84) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x01, "LOC_FAIL"}
            };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x85, "LOC_SET_HOST_WAKE_UP"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x85) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x01, "LOC_FAIL"}
            };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x86, "LOC_READ_BT_WAKE_UP"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Port Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x86) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "singal low"},
                {0x01, "singal high"}
            };

        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x86) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x01, "LOC_FAIL"}
            };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x88, "LOC_AUDIO_ROUTING_CONTROL"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x88) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Audio routing applied succesfully"},
                {0x01, "Unsupported Interface or Mode"},
                {0x02, "Audio routing was NOT applied succesfully"},
                {0x03, "Routing not applied. Interface currently active"}
            };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x01, "LOC_SELF_TEST_RUN"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x01) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x01, "LOC_FAIL"}
            };

        PARAM "Test"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x01) )
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0001, "POST"},
                                {0x0002, "FM Antenna Connectivity"},
                                {0x0004, "GPS Antenna Connectivity Start"},
                                {0x0008, "GPS Antenna Connectivity Finish"}
            };
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x12, "LOC_SELF_TEST_RESULT_GET"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x12) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x01, "LOC_FAIL"}
            };

        PARAM "Test Result"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x12) )
            bitmap
            {
                {0x0000, "All tests passed"},
                {0x0001, "POST Failed"},
                                {0x0002, "FM Antenna Connectivity Failed"},
                                {0x0004, "Not A Valid Test Result"},
                                {0x0008, "GPS Antenna Connectivity Failed"}
            };


    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x25, "LOC_BER_TEST_START"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x25) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x12, "LOC_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER"},
                {0x1B, "LOC_ERROR_PROHIBITED (not accessible in the current opearation mode)"}
            };


    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x27, "LOC_BER_TEST_RESULT_GET"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x27) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x10, "LOC_ERROR_PARAM_NOT_SUPPORTED"},
                {0xD0, "LOC_ERROR_BT_CONNECTION_FAIL"},
                {0xD1, "LOC_ERROR_BT_DISCONNECTION_FAIL"},
                {0xD2, "LOC_ERROR_BT_TEST_MODE_FAIL"},
                {0xD3, "LOC_ERROR_BER_TEST_FAIL"},
                {0xD4, "LOC_ERROR_BER_TEST_NOT_STARTED"}
            };
        PARAM "BER test status"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x27) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LPRF_FALSE (BER test not finished yet)"},
                {0x01, "LPRF_TRUE (BER test finished)"}
            };

        PARAM "NUM_TEST_BITS"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x27) )
            max = 0xFFA8
            note "multiple of 216 bits"; #???

        PARAM "NUM_BIT_ERRORS"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x27) )
            max = 0xFFA8;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x31, "LOC_BER_PER_TEST_RESULT_GET"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x31) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x10, "LOC_ERROR_PARAM_NOT_SUPPORTED"},
                {0xD0, "LOC_ERROR_BT_CONNECTION_FAIL"},
                {0xD1, "LOC_ERROR_BT_DISCONNECTION_FAIL"},
                {0xD2, "LOC_ERROR_BT_TEST_MODE_FAIL"},
                {0xD3, "LOC_ERROR_BER_TEST_FAIL"},
                {0xD4, "LOC_ERROR_BER_TEST_NOT_STARTED"}
            };

        PARAM "BER test status"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x31) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LPRF_FALSE (BER test not finished yet)"},
                {0x01, "LPRF_TRUE (BER test finished)"}
            };

        PARAM "NUM_TEST_BITS"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x31) )
            max = 0xFFA8
            note "multiple of 216 bits";

        PARAM "NUM_BIT_ERRORS"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x31) )
            max = 0xFFA8;

        PARAM "NUM_PACKET_ERRORS"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x31) )
            max = 0x012F;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x39, "LOC_EVENT_FTD_ACTIVATE"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Status"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x39) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x10, "LOC_ERROR_PARAM_NOT_SUPPORTED"}
            };
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x40, "LOC_EVENT_FTD_DEACTIVATE"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Status"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x40) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"}
            };

        # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x89, "LOC_WLAN_COEX_TEST"
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Status"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x89) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "Success"},
                {0x01, "Unsupported Interface/mode attempted"},
                {0x02, "Unable to perform the operation requested"}
            };
                PARAM "Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x89) )
                        bitmap
                        {
                {0x01, "WLAN_STATUS"},
                {0x02, "WLAN_RF_ACTIVE"},
                {0x04, "WLAN_TX_CONFX"}
                        };

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # HCI_ext_eventcode = 0x91, "LOC_EVENT_VENDOR_DEBUG_CONTROL"  (Debug Framework)
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Return Value"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF3) and ("HCI_ext_eventcode" = 0x91) )
            enum
            {
                {0x00, "LOC_OK"},
                {0x01, "LOC_FAIL"}
            };
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event "Customer Specific-FTD Messages Group Events" 0xF5
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_EVENT_MSG_ID"
            uint8
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5)
            enum
            {
                {0xFF, "FTD_EVENT_MSG_ID"}
            };
        PARAM "Number_Of_Subblocks"
            uint8
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5)
            max = 62;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Subblock 0
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_ID[0]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0x0000) then    0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF50) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF51) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF52) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF53) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF54) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF55) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF56) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF57) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF58) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF5B) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF19) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF20) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF21) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF23) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF24) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF60) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF25) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF26) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF28) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF29) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF61) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF2A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF2B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF2D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF2E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF62) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF30) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF31) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF33) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF34) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF63) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF35) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF36) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF38) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF39) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF64) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF3A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF3B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF3D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF3E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF65) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF40) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF41) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF43) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF44) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF66) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF45) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF46) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF48) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF49) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[0]" = 0xFF67) then    1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[0]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 1) );    # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 2)       # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 0) ) )   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[0]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 0) );    # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[0]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 2) );    # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[0]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 2)   )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 3) ) # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[0]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[0]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 3) );    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[0]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[0]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[0]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[0]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 0)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[0]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[0]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Subblock 1
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_ID[1]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0x0000) then    0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF50) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF51) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF52) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF53) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF54) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF55) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF56) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF57) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF58) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF5B) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF19) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF20) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF21) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF23) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF24) then  3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF60) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF25) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF26) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF28) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF29) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF61) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF2A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF2B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF2D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF2E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF62) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF30) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF31) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF33) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF34) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF63) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF35) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF36) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF38) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF39) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF64) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF3A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF3B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF3D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF3E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF65) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF40) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF41) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF43) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF44) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF66) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF45) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF46) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF48) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF49) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[1]" = 0xFF67) then    1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[1]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 1) );    # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 2)       # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 0) ) )   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[1]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 0) );    # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[1]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 2) );    # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[1]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 2)   )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 3) ) # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[1]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[1]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 3) );    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[1]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[1]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[1]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[1]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 1)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[1]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[3]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 2) );    # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[3]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 2)   )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[3]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 3) ) # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[3]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[3]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 3) );    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[3]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[3]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[3]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[3]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[3]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[3]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 3)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[3]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[3]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Subblock 4
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_ID[4]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 4) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[4]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 4) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0x0000) then    0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF50) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF51) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF52) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF53) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF54) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF55) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF56) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF57) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF58) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF5B) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF19) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF20) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF21) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF23) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF24) then  3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF60) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF25) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF26) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF28) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF29) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF61) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF2A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF2B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF2D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF2E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF62) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF30) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF31) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF33) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF34) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF63) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF35) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF36) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF38) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF39) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF64) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF3A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF3B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF3D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF3E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF65) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF40) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF41) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF43) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF44) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF66) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF45) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF46) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF48) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF49) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[4]" = 0xFF67) then    1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[4]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 4) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[4]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 4)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[4]" = 1) );    # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[4]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 4)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[4]" = 2)       # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}

            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 1) );    # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 2)       # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 0) ) )   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[6]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 0) );    # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[6]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 2) );    # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[6]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 2)   )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 3) ) # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[6]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[6]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 3) );    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[6]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[6]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 6)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[6]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[6]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[6]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;

            max = 0;

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF29) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF61) then    1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF2B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF2D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF2E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF62) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF30) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF31) then    3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[7]" = 0xFF67) then    1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error

            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 7) )

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF39) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF64) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF3A) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF3B) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF3D) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF3E) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF65) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF40) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF41) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF43) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF44) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF66) then    1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF45) then    2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF46) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF48) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF49) then    3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[9]" = 0xFF67) then    1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[9]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 1) );    # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 2)       # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 0) ) )   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[9]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 0) );    # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 0) )     # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[9]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 2) );    # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[9]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 2)   )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 3) ) # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[9]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[9]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 3) );    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[9]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[9]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 9)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[9]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[9]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;

            uint8

                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[9]" = 3)       # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

            max = 0;

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF24) then  3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF60) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF25) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF26) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF28) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF29) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF61) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF2A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF2B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF2D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF2E) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF33) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF34) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF63) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF35) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF64) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF3A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF3B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF3D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF3E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF65) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF41) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF44) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[12]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[12]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[12]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[12]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[12]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[12]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[12]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[12]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[12]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[12]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[12]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 12)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[12]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[12]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0x0000) then   0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF50) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF51) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF52) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF53) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF54) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF55) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF56) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF57) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF58) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF24) then  3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF26) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF28) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF29) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF61) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF2A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF2B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF2D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF2E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF62) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF30) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF31) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF33) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF34) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF63) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF35) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF64) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF3B) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[15]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[15]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[15]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[15]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[15]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[15]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[15]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[15]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[15]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[15]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[15]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 15)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[15]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[15]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[17]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[17]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 17)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[17]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[17]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[17]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 17)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[17]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[17]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[17]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[17]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 17)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[17]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[17]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Subblock 18
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_ID[18]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0x0000) then   0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF50) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF26) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF28) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF29) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF61) then   1
