                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF2B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF2D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF2E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF62) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF30) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF31) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF33) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF34) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF63) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF64) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[18]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[18]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[18]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[18]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[18]"

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)

        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[18]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[18]"

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[18]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[18]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[18]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[18]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[18]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 18)

                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[20]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[20]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[20]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[20]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[20]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[20]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[20]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[20]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[20]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 20)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[20]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[23]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[23]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[23]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[23]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[23]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[23]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[23]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[23]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[23]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[23]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[23]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[23]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[23]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[23]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)

                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[23]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[23]"

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 23)

                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[23]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[26]" = 0xFF34) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[26]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[26]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[26]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 26) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[26]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 26)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[26]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[26]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 26)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[26]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[26]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;

            max = 0;

            max = 0;

                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[26]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";

            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[26]"

                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[26]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

            max = 0;

                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[26]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF5B) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF26) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF61) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[29]" = 0xFF64) then   1

                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[29]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[29]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[29]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[29]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[29]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[29]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[29]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[29]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[29]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[29]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 29)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[29]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[29]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 31)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[31]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[31]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Subblock 32
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_ID[32]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message

            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0x0000) then   0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF50) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF51) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF52) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF53) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF54) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF55) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF56) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF57) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF58) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF5B) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF19) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF20) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF21) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF23) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF24) then  3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF60) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF25) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF26) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF28) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF29) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF61) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF2A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF2B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF2D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF2E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF62) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF30) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF31) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF33) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF34) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF63) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF35) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF64) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF3A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF3B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF3D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF3E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF65) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF41) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF45) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF46) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF48) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[32]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[32]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[32]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[32]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[32]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[32]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[32]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[32]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[32]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[32]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[32]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 32)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[32]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[32]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 34)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[34]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[34]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[34]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 34)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[34]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[34]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 34)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[34]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[34]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[34]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 34)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[34]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[34]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[34]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;

            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 34)

            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 35) )

            max = 0xF8;

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[37]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[37]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[37]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[37]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)

            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[37]"

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)

            max = 0;

            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[37]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";

            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[37]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 37)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[37]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

            max = 0;

            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 40) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[40]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 40)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[40]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[40]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 40)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[40]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[40]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF62) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF31) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF33) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF35) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF36) then   3

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF64) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF41) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF43) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF44) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF66) then   1

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF46) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF48) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[43]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[43]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 43) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[43]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 43)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[43]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[43]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 43)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[43]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[43]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;

                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[43]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}

            max = 0;

            max = 0;

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 43)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[43]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";

            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[43]"

                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[43]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[43]"

                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[43]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )

        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[46]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[46]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[46]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[46]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[46]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[46]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[46]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[46]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[46]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[46]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 46)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[46]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[46]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[48]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[48]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[48]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 48)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[48]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[48]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 49) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;

            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 49)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[49]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}

            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 49)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[49]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}

            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[49]"

        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[51]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 51)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[51]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[51]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 51)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[51]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[51]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[51]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 51)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[51]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[51]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 51)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[51]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[51]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[51]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 51)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[51]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[51]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[51]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[51]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 51)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[51]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

            max = 0;

        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[52]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 52) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[52]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 52)

        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[54]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[54]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[54]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[54]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[54]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[54]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[54]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[54]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[54]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[54]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[54]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[54]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 54)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[54]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}

                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[54]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )

            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 57) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[57]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 57)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[57]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[57]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 57)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[57]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[57]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;

                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF26) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF28) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF29) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF61) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF2A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF2B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF2D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF2E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF62) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF30) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF31) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF33) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF34) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF63) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF35) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF64) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF3A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF3B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF3D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF3E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF65) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF40) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF41) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF43) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF44) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF66) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF45) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF46) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF48) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[60]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[60]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[60]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[60]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[60]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[60]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[60]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[60]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[60]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[60]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[60]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 60)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[60]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[60]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Subblock 61
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_ID[61]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_ID";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]"
            uint8
            not_in_binary_message
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61) )
            enum "FTD_Subblock_Data_Type"
            decode_value =  if      ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0x0000) then   0
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF50) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF51) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF52) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF53) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF54) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF55) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF56) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF57) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF58) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF5B) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF19) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF20) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF21) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF23) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF24) then  3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF60) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF25) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF26) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF28) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF29) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF61) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF2A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF2B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF2D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF2E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF62) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF30) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF31) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF33) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF34) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF63) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF35) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF36) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF38) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF39) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF64) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF3A) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF3B) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF3D) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF3E) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF65) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF40) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF41) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF43) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF44) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF66) then   1
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF45) then   2
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF46) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF48) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF49) then   3
                            else if ("FTD_Subblock_ID[61]" = 0xFF67) then   1
                            else                                            0xFF; # Error
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Length[61]"
            uint8
            present_if ( ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61) )
            min = 4
            max = 0xF8;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Byte_Value[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 1) );   # {1, "COMM_FTD_DATA_BYTE"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_1[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                            and (       ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 2)      # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
                                    or  ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 0) ) )  # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Not_Identified_Subblock_ID[61]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 0) );   # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
        PARAM "FTD_Fail_Reason[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            enum "FTD_Fail_Reason";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_2[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 0) )        # {0, "COMM_FTD_DATA_FAIL"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Word_Value[61]"
            uint16 big_endian
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 2) );   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_3[61]"
            uint16
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 2)  )   # {2, "COMM_FTD_DATA_WORD"}
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 3) )    # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
            note "includes null character";
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_String[61]"
            utf8[247] omit_pad_bytes
            valid_length = "FTD_Subblock_String_Length[61]"
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 3) );   # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_4[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[61]" & 3) > 0 ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_5[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and (       ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[61]" & 3) = 1 )
                                or  ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[61]" & 3) = 2 ) ) )
            max = 0;
        PARAM "FTD_Subblock_Pad_6[61]"
            uint8
            present_if (    ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xF5) and ("Number_Of_Subblocks" > 61)
                        and ("FTD_Subblock_Data_Type[61]" = 3)      # {3, "COMM_FTD_DATA_STRING"}
                        and ( ("FTD_Subblock_String_Length[61]" & 3) = 1 ) )
            max = 0;

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event_LE_ext_Sub_Code = 0xFC, "BUX State Notification"
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        PARAM "Handle"
            connhandle16
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xFC);

        PARAM "BUX State"
            uint8
            enum
            {
                {0, "Enabled by local device"},
                {1, "Disabled by local device"},
                {2, "Enabled by peer device"},
                {3, "Disabled by peer device"}
            }
            present_if ("Event_Sub_Code" = 0xFC);
}
